### 2. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/unit/test_tdd_infrastructure.py

- **违规**: ['for dir_name in required_dirs:\n            dir_path = tests_dir / dir_name\n            assert dir_path.exists(), f"测试目录 {dir_name} 不存在"\n            assert dir_path.is_dir(), f"{dir_name} 不是一个目录"\n\n    def test_jest_setup_file_exists(self):\n        """测试Jest设置文件是否存在"""\n        # Arrange\n        jest_setup_path = project_root / "tests" / "config" / "jest-setup.ts"\n\n        # Act & Assert\n        assert jest_setup_path.exists(), "jest-setup.ts文件不存在"\n\n        # 验证文件内容\n        with open(jest_setup_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:\n            content = f.read()\n            assert "reflect-metadata" in content\n            assert "process.env.NODE_ENV" in content\n            assert "global.testUtils" in content\n\n    def test_conftest_file_exists(self):\n        """测试conftest.py文件是否存在"""\n        # Arrange\n        conftest_path = project_root / "tests" / "conftest.py"\n\n        # Act & Assert\n        assert conftest_path.exists(), "conftest.py文件不存在"\n\n        # 验证文件内容\n        with open(conftest_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:\n            content = f.read()\n            assert "pytest.fixture" in content\n            assert "test_db" in content\n            assert "test_redis" in content\n            assert "mock_llm_service" in content\n\n    def test_coverage_threshold_is_set(self):\n        """测试覆盖率阈值是否设置"""\n        # Arrange\n        jest_config_path = project_root / "tests" / "jest.config.js"\n\n        # Act\n        with open(jest_config_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:\n            content = f.read()\n\n        # Assert\n        assert "coverageThreshold" in content\n        assert "branches: 80" in content\n        assert "functions: 80" in content\n        assert "lines: 80" in content\n        assert "statements: 80" in content\n\n    def test_test_markers_are_defined(self):\n        """测试测试标记是否定义"""\n        # Arrange\n        conftest_path = project_root / "tests" / "conftest.py"\n\n        # Act\n        with open(conftest_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:\n            content = f.read()\n\n        # Assert\n        required_markers = [\n            "unit: 单元测试",\n            "integration: 集成测试",\n            "e2e: 端到端测试",\n            "slow: 慢速测试",\n            "database: 需要数据库的测试",\n            "llm: LLM相关测试",\n        ]\n\n        for marker in required_markers:\n            assert marker in content, f"测试标记 {marker} 未定义"\n\n    def test_project_structure_follows_tdd_principles(self):\n        """测试项目结构是否遵循TDD原则"""\n        # Arrange\n        required_files = [\n            "docs/开发文档第0章-开发流程准则.md",\n            "docs/开发文档第1章-系统概述.md",\n            "docs/开发文档第2章-核心功能模块-上.md",\n            "docs/开发文档第4章-技术架构.md",\n            "docs/开发文档第5章-部署运维.md",\n            "docs/开发文档第6章-开发实施计划.md",\n        ]\n\n        # - **规则**: 第4条：简单性优先
- **违规**: ['ifecycle(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试完整的报告生命周期"""\n        # 1. 创建报告\n        report_data = {\n            "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n            "title": "集成测试报告",\n            "description": "集成测试报告描述",\n            "target_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n            "content": "集成测试报告内容",\n            "summary": "集成测试报告摘要",\n            "author": "integration_test",\n            "template_id": "integration_template",\n            "generation_params": {"test_param": "test_value"}\n        }\n        \n        create_response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n        assert create_response.status_code == 200\n        create_data = create_response.json()\n        assert create_data["success"] is True\n        report_id = create_data["data"]["report_id"]\n        \n        # 2. 获取报告详情\n        get_response = client.get(f"/{report_id}")\n        assert get_response.status_code == 200\n        get_data = get_response.json()\n        assert get_data["success"] is True\n        assert get_data["data"]["title"] == "集成测试报告"\n        assert get_data["data"]["author"] == "integration_test"\n        \n        # 3. 更新报告\n        update_data = {\n            "title": "更新后的集成测试报告",\n            "status": "completed",\n            "content": "更新后的集成测试报告内容",\n            "summary": "更新后的集成测试报告摘要",\n            "sections": [{"title": "新章节", "content": "新内容"}],\n            "conclusions": ["新结论"],\n            "recommendations": ["新建议"],\n            "metrics": {"test_score": 0.95}\n        }\n        \n        update_response = client.put(f"/{report_id}", json=update_data)\n        assert update_response.status_code == 200\n        update_result = update_response.json()\n        assert update_result["success"] is True\n        assert update_result["data"]["title"] == "更新后的集成测试报告"\n        assert update_result["data"]["status"] == "completed"\n        \n        # 4. 获取报告列表\n        list_response = client.get("/")\n        assert list_response.status_code == 200\n        list_data = list_response.json()\n        assert list_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(list_data["data"]) >= 1\n        \n        # 5. 获取统计信息\n        stats_response = client.get("/statistics")\n        assert stats_response.status_code == 200\n        stats_data = stats_response.json()\n        assert stats_data["success"] is True\n        assert stats_data["data"]["total_reports"] >= 1\n        \n        # 6. 删除报告\n        delete_response = client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n        assert delete_response.status_code == 200\n        delete_data = delete_response.json()\n        assert delete_data["success"] is True\n        \n        # 7. 验证报告已删除\n        get_deleted_response = client.get(f"/{report_id}")\n        assert get_deleted_response.status_code == 404\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_comparison_workflow(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告对比工作流"""\n        # 创建两个报告\n        report1_data = {\n            "report_type": "fact_analysis",\n            "title": "对比报告1",\n            "description": "对比报告1描述",\n            "target_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n            "content": "这是第一个报告的内容,包含一些关键词",\n            "summary": "第一个报告摘要",\n            "author": "comparison_test"\n        }\n        \n        report2_data = {\n            "report_type": "sentiment_analysis",\n            "title": "对比报告2",\n            "description": "对比报告2描述",\n            "target_code": "000002.SZ",\n            "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n            "content": "这是第二个报告的内容,包含不同的关键词",\n            "summary": "第二个报告摘要",\n            "author": "comparison_test"\n        }\n        \n        # 创建第一个报告\n        create1_response = client.post("/", json=report1_data)\n        assert create1_response.status_code == 200\n        report1_id = create1_response.json()["data"]["report_id"]\n        \n        # 创建第二个报告\n        create2_response = client.post("/", json=report2_data)\n        assert create2_response.status_code == 200\n        report2_id = create2_response.json()["data"]["report_id"]\n        \n        # 对比报告\n        compare_response = client.post(f"/compare?report1_id={report1_id}&report2_id={report2_id}")\n        assert compare_response.status_code == 200\n        compare_data = compare_response.json()\n        assert compare_data["success"] is True\n        assert "similarity_score" in compare_data["data"]\n        assert "differences" in compare_data["data"]\n        assert compare_data["data"]["report1_id"] == report1_id\n        assert compare_data["data"]["report2_id"] == report2_id\n        \n        # 清理\n        client.delete(f"/{report1_id}")\n        client.delete(f"/{report2_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_filtering_workflow(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告过滤工作流"""\n        # 创建多个不同类型的报告\n        reports_data = [\n            {\n                "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n                "title": "日常分析报告1",\n                "description": "日常分析报告1描述",\n                "target_code": "000001.SZ",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": "日常分析报告1内容",\n                "summary": "日常分析报告1摘要",\n                "author": "filter_test"\n            },\n            {\n                "report_type": "fact_analysis",\n                "title": "事实分析报告1",\n                "description": "事实分析报告1描述",\n                "target_code": "000002.SZ",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": "事实分析报告1内容",\n                "summary": "事实分析报告1摘要",\n                "author": "filter_test"\n            },\n            {\n                "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n                "title": "日常分析报告2",\n                "description": "日常分析报告2描述",\n                "target_code": "000001.SZ",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": "日常分析报告2内容",\n                "summary": "日常分析报告2摘要",\n                "author": "filter_test"\n            }\n        ]\n        \n        created_reports = []\n        for report_data in reports_data:\n            response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n            created_reports.append(response.json()["data"]["report_id"])\n        \n        # 测试按类型过滤\n        daily_response = client.get("/?report_type=daily_analysis")\n        assert daily_response.status_code == 200\n        daily_data = daily_response.json()\n        assert daily_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(daily_data["data"]) == 2  # 2个日常分析报告\n        \n        # 测试按目标代码过滤\n        stock_response = client.get("/?target_code=000001.SZ")\n        assert stock_response.status_code == 200\n        stock_data = stock_response.json()\n        assert stock_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(stock_data["data"]) == 2  # 2个000001.SZ的报告\n        \n        # 测试多重过滤\n        combined_response = client.get("/?report_type=daily_analysis&target_code=000001.SZ")\n        assert combined_response.status_code == 200\n        combined_data = combined_response.json()\n        assert combined_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(combined_data["data"]) == 2  # 2个日常分析且为000001.SZ的报告\n        \n        # 清理\n        for report_id in created_reports:\n            client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_pagination_workflow(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告分页工作流"""\n        # 创建多个报告\n        created_reports = []\n        for i in range(15):\n            report_data = {\n                "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n                "title": f"分页测试报告{i}",\n                "description": f"分页测试报告{i}描述",\n                "target_code": f"00000{i+1}.SZ",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": f"分页测试报告{i}内容",\n                "summary": f"分页测试报告{i}摘要",\n                "author": "pagination_test"\n            }\n            \n            response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n            created_reports.append(response.json()["data"]["report_id"])\n        \n        # 测试第一页\n        page1_response = client.get("/?page=1&size=5")\n        assert page1_response.status_code == 200\n        page1_data = page1_response.json()\n        assert page1_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(page1_data["data"]) == 5\n        assert page1_data["page"] == 1\n        assert page1_data["size"] == 5\n        \n        # 测试第二页\n        page2_response = client.get("/?page=2&size=5")\n        assert page2_response.status_code == 200\n        page2_data = page2_response.json()\n        assert page2_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(page2_data["data"]) == 5\n        assert page2_data["page"] == 2\n        \n        # 测试最后一页\n        page4_response = client.get("/?page=4&size=5")\n        assert page4_response.status_code == 200\n        page4_data = page4_response.json()\n        assert page4_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(page4_data["data"]) == 1  # 剩余1个报告\n        assert page4_data["page"] == 4\n        \n        # 清理\n        for report_id in created_reports:\n            client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_error_handling_workflow(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告错误处理工作流"""\n        # 测试获取不存在的报告\n        not_found_response = client.get("/NON_EXISTING")\n        assert not_found_response.status_code == 404\n        \n        # 测试更新不存在的报告\n        update_response = client.put("/NON_EXISTING", json={"title": "新标题"})\n        assert update_response.status_code == 404\n        \n        # 测试删除不存在的报告\n        delete_response = client.delete("/NON_EXISTING")\n        assert delete_response.status_code == 404\n        \n        # 测试对比不存在的报告\n        compare_response = client.post("/compare?report1_id=NON_EXISTING&report2_id=ALSO_NON_EXISTING")\n        assert compare_response.status_code == 400\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_data_consistency(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告数据一致性"""\n        # 创建报告\n        report_data = {\n            "report_type": "custom",\n            "title": "一致性测试报告",\n            "description": "一致性测试报告描述",\n            "target_code": "000999.SZ",\n            "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n            "content": "一致性测试报告内容",\n            "summary": "一致性测试报告摘要",\n            "author": "consistency_test",\n            "template_id": "consistency_template",\n            "generation_params": {"param1": "value1", "param2": "value2"}\n        }\n        \n        create_response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n        assert create_response.status_code == 200\n        report_id = create_response.json()["data"]["report_id"]\n        \n        # 获取报告并验证数据一致性\n        get_response = client.get(f"/{report_id}")\n        assert get_response.status_code == 200\n        get_data = get_response.json()["data"]\n        \n        # 验证所有字段都正确保存和返回\n        assert get_data["report_type"] == "custom"\n        assert get_data["title"] == "一致性测试报告"\n        assert get_data["description"] == "一致性测试报告描述"\n        assert get_data["target_code"] == "000999.SZ"\n        assert get_data["content"] == "一致性测试报告内容"\n        assert get_data["summary"] == "一致性测试报告摘要"\n        assert get_data["author"] == "consistency_test"\n        assert get_data["template_id"] == "consistency_template"\n        assert get_data["generation_params"] == {"param1": "value1", "param2": "value2"}\n        \n        # 清理\n        client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_statistics_accuracy(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告统计信息准确性"""\n        # 创建不同状态的报告\n        reports_data = [\n            {\n                "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n                "title": "已完成报告",\n                "description": "已完成报告描述",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": "已完成报告内容",\n                "summary": "已完成报告摘要",\n                "author": "stats_test"\n            },\n            {\n                "report_type": "fact_analysis",\n                "title": "待处理报告",\n                "description": "待处理报告描述",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": "待处理报告内容",\n                "summary": "待处理报告摘要",\n                "author": "stats_test"\n            }\n        ]\n        \n        created_reports = []\n        for report_data in reports_data:\n            response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n            created_reports.append(response.json()["data"]["report_id"])\n        \n        # 更新第二个报告为待处理状态\n        update_response = client.put(f"/{created_reports[1]}", json={"status": "pending"})\n        assert update_response.status_code == 200\n        \n        # 获取统计信息\n        stats_response = client.get("/statistics")\n        assert stats_response.status_code == 200\n        stats_data = stats_response.json()["data"]\n        \n        # 验证统计信息准确性\n        assert stats_data["total_reports"] >= 2  # 至少2个报告\n        assert "completed" in stats_data["status_distribution"]\n        assert "pending" in stats_data["status_distribution"]\n        assert "daily_analysis" in stats_data["type_distribution"]\n        assert "fact_analysis" in stats_data["type_distribution"]\n        \n        # 清理\n        for report_id in created_reports:\n            client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_performance_under_load(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告模块在负载下的性能"""\n        import time\n        import concurrent.futures\n        \n        # 创建多个报告\n        created_reports = []\n        start_time = time.time()\n        \n        for i in range(10):\n            report_data = {\n                "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n                "title": f"性能测试报告{i}",\n                "description": f"性能测试报告{i}描述",\n                "target_code": f"00000{i+1}.SZ",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": f"性能测试报告{i}内容",\n                "summary": f"性能测试报告{i}摘要",\n                "author": "performance_test"\n            }\n            \n            response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n            created_reports.append(response.json()["data"]["report_id"])\n        \n        creation_time = time.time() - start_time\n        \n        # 并发获取报告\n        def get_report(report_id):\n            return client.get(f"/{report_id}")\n        \n        start_time = time.time()\n        with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=5) as executor:\n            futures = [executor.submit(get_report, report_id) for report_id in created_reports]\n            responses = [future.result() for future in futures]\n        \n        retrieval_time = time.time() - start_time\n        \n        # 验证所有请求都成功\n        for response in responses:\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n        \n        # 验证性能在合理范围内\n        assert creation_time < 5.0  # 创建10个报告应在5秒内完成\n        assert retrieval_time < 2.0  # 并发获取10个报告应在2秒内完成\n        \n        # 清理\n        for report_id in created_reports:\n            client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_concurrent_modif', 'for report_data in reports_data:\n            response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n            created_reports.append(response.json()["data"]["report_id"])\n        \n        # 测试按类型过滤\n        daily_response = client.get("/?report_type=daily_analysis")\n        assert daily_response.status_code == 200\n        daily_data = daily_response.json()\n        assert daily_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(daily_data["data"]) == 2  # 2个日常分析报告\n        \n        # 测试按目标代码过滤\n        stock_response = client.get("/?target_code=000001.SZ")\n        assert stock_response.status_code == 200\n        stock_data = stock_response.json()\n        assert stock_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(stock_data["data"]) == 2  # 2个000001.SZ的报告\n        \n        # 测试多重过滤\n        combined_response = client.get("/?report_type=daily_analysis&target_code=000001.SZ")\n        assert combined_response.status_code == 200\n        combined_data = combined_response.json()\n        assert combined_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(combined_data["data"]) == 2  # 2个日常分析且为000001.SZ的报告\n        \n        # 清理\n        for report_id in created_reports:\n            client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_pagination_workflow(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告分页工作流"""\n        # 创建多个报告\n        created_reports = []\n        for i in range(15):\n            report_data = {\n                "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n                "title": f"分页测试报告{i}",\n                "description": f"分页测试报告{i}描述",\n                "target_code": f"00000{i+1}.SZ",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": f"分页测试报告{i}内容",\n                "summary": f"分页测试报告{i}摘要",\n                "author": "pagination_test"\n            }\n            \n            response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n            created_reports.append(response.json()["data"]["report_id"])\n        \n        # 测试第一页\n        page1_response = client.get("/?page=1&size=5")\n        assert page1_response.status_code == 200\n        page1_data = page1_response.json()\n        assert page1_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(page1_data["data"]) == 5\n        assert page1_data["page"] == 1\n        assert page1_data["size"] == 5\n        \n        # 测试第二页\n        page2_response = client.get("/?page=2&size=5")\n        assert page2_response.status_code == 200\n        page2_data = page2_response.json()\n        assert page2_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(page2_data["data"]) == 5\n        assert page2_data["page"] == 2\n        \n        # 测试最后一页\n        page4_response = client.get("/?page=4&size=5")\n        assert page4_response.status_code == 200\n        page4_data = page4_response.json()\n        assert page4_data["success"] is True\n        assert len(page4_data["data"]) == 1  # 剩余1个报告\n        assert page4_data["page"] == 4\n        \n        # 清理\n        for report_id in created_reports:\n            client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_error_handling_workflow(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告错误处理工作流"""\n        # 测试获取不存在的报告\n        not_found_response = client.get("/NON_EXISTING")\n        assert not_found_response.status_code == 404\n        \n        # 测试更新不存在的报告\n        update_response = client.put("/NON_EXISTING", json={"title": "新标题"})\n        assert update_response.status_code == 404\n        \n        # 测试删除不存在的报告\n        delete_response = client.delete("/NON_EXISTING")\n        assert delete_response.status_code == 404\n        \n        # 测试对比不存在的报告\n        compare_response = client.post("/compare?report1_id=NON_EXISTING&report2_id=ALSO_NON_EXISTING")\n        assert compare_response.status_code == 400\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_data_consistency(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告数据一致性"""\n        # 创建报告\n        report_data = {\n            "report_type": "custom",\n            "title": "一致性测试报告",\n            "description": "一致性测试报告描述",\n            "target_code": "000999.SZ",\n            "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n            "content": "一致性测试报告内容",\n            "summary": "一致性测试报告摘要",\n            "author": "consistency_test",\n            "template_id": "consistency_template",\n            "generation_params": {"param1": "value1", "param2": "value2"}\n        }\n        \n        create_response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n        assert create_response.status_code == 200\n        report_id = create_response.json()["data"]["report_id"]\n        \n        # 获取报告并验证数据一致性\n        get_response = client.get(f"/{report_id}")\n        assert get_response.status_code == 200\n        get_data = get_response.json()["data"]\n        \n        # 验证所有字段都正确保存和返回\n        assert get_data["report_type"] == "custom"\n        assert get_data["title"] == "一致性测试报告"\n        assert get_data["description"] == "一致性测试报告描述"\n        assert get_data["target_code"] == "000999.SZ"\n        assert get_data["content"] == "一致性测试报告内容"\n        assert get_data["summary"] == "一致性测试报告摘要"\n        assert get_data["author"] == "consistency_test"\n        assert get_data["template_id"] == "consistency_template"\n        assert get_data["generation_params"] == {"param1": "value1", "param2": "value2"}\n        \n        # 清理\n        client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_statistics_accuracy(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告统计信息准确性"""\n        # 创建不同状态的报告\n        reports_data = [\n            {\n                "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n                "title": "已完成报告",\n                "description": "已完成报告描述",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": "已完成报告内容",\n                "summary": "已完成报告摘要",\n                "author": "stats_test"\n            },\n            {\n                "report_type": "fact_analysis",\n                "title": "待处理报告",\n                "description": "待处理报告描述",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": "待处理报告内容",\n                "summary": "待处理报告摘要",\n                "author": "stats_test"\n            }\n        ]\n        \n        created_reports = []\n        for report_data in reports_data:\n            response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n            created_reports.append(response.json()["data"]["report_id"])\n        \n        # 更新第二个报告为待处理状态\n        update_response = client.put(f"/{created_reports[1]}", json={"status": "pending"})\n        assert update_response.status_code == 200\n        \n        # 获取统计信息\n        stats_response = client.get("/statistics")\n        assert stats_response.status_code == 200\n        stats_data = stats_response.json()["data"]\n        \n        # 验证统计信息准确性\n        assert stats_data["total_reports"] >= 2  # 至少2个报告\n        assert "completed" in stats_data["status_distribution"]\n        assert "pending" in stats_data["status_distribution"]\n        assert "daily_analysis" in stats_data["type_distribution"]\n        assert "fact_analysis" in stats_data["type_distribution"]\n        \n        # 清理\n        for report_id in created_reports:\n            client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_performance_under_load(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告模块在负载下的性能"""\n        import time\n        import concurrent.futures\n        \n        # 创建多个报告\n        created_reports = []\n        start_time = time.time()\n        \n        for i in range(10):\n            report_data = {\n                "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n                "title": f"性能测试报告{i}",\n                "description": f"性能测试报告{i}描述",\n                "target_code": f"00000{i+1}.SZ",\n                "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n                "content": f"性能测试报告{i}内容",\n                "summary": f"性能测试报告{i}摘要",\n                "author": "performance_test"\n            }\n            \n            response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n            created_reports.append(response.json()["data"]["report_id"])\n        \n        creation_time = time.time() - start_time\n        \n        # 并发获取报告\n        def get_report(report_id):\n            return client.get(f"/{report_id}")\n        \n        start_time = time.time()\n        with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=5) as executor:\n            futures = [executor.submit(get_report, report_id) for report_id in created_reports]\n            responses = [future.result() for future in futures]\n        \n        retrieval_time = time.time() - start_time\n        \n        # 验证所有请求都成功\n        for response in responses:\n            assert response.status_code == 200\n        \n        # 验证性能在合理范围内\n        assert creation_time < 5.0  # 创建10个报告应在5秒内完成\n        assert retrieval_time < 2.0  # 并发获取10个报告应在2秒内完成\n        \n        # 清理\n        for report_id in created_reports:\n            client.delete(f"/{report_id}")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_report_concurrent_modifications(self, client):\n        pass\n        """测试报告并发修改"""\n        # 创建报告\n        report_data = {\n            "report_type": "daily_analysis",\n            "title": "并发修改测试报告",\n            "description": "并发修改测试报告描述",\n            "report_date": "2024-01-01",\n            "content": "并发修改测试报告内容",\n            "summary": "并发修改测试报告摘要",\n            "author": "concurrent_test"\n        }\n        \n        create_response = client.post("/", json=report_data)\n        assert create_response.status_code == 200\n        report_id = create_response.json()["data"]["report_id"]\n        \n        # 并发更新报告\n        def update_report(update_data):\n            return client.put(f"/{report_id}", json=update_data)\n        \n        update_data_list = [\n            {"title": "并发更新1", "content": "并发更新内容1"},\n            {"title": "并发更新2", "content": "并发更新内容2"},\n            {"title": "并发更新3", "content": "并发更新内容3"},\n        ]\n        \n        import concurrent.futures\n        with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=3) as executor:\n            futures = [executor.submit(update_report, data) for data in update_data_list]\n            responses = [future.result() for future in futures]\n        \n        # 验证所有更新都成功\n        for']
- **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

### 9. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/utils/test_constitution_base.py
- **规则**: 第4条：简单性优先
- **违规**: ['if expected_status == 200:\n            data = response.json()\n            for key, expected_value in expected_data.items():\n                assert data[key] == expected_value, f"字段 {key} 期望值 {expected_value},实际值 {data[key]}"\n    \n    def assert_error_response(self, response, expected_status: int, expected_error_contains: str):\n        """\n        错误响应断言 - 遵循第7条断言铁律\n        """\n        assert response.status_code == expected_status, f"期望状态码 {expected_status},实际 {response.status_code}"\n        \n        data = response.json()\n        assert data[\'detail\'] is not None, "错误响应必须包含 \'detail\' 字段"\n        assert expected_error_contains in data[\'detail\'], f"错误信息应包含 \'{expected_error_contains}\',实际: {data[\'detail\']}"\n    \n    def assert_performance(self, response, max_response_time: float = 1.0):\n        """\n        性能断言 - 遵循测试宪法性能要求\n        """\n        assert response.status_code == 200, "性能测试要求响应成功"\n        # 注意：实际的时间测量应该在调用此方法前进行\n        # 这里只是验证响应成功,时间测量由调用者负责\n    \n    def create_mock_service_data(self, service_name: str, method_name: str, return_data: Any):\n        """\n        创建模拟服务数据 - 遵循第6条模拟铁律\n        只模拟外部边界,不模拟内部逻辑\n        """\n        service_mappings = {\n            \'arbitration_service\': \'src.api.admin.ArbitrationService\',\n            \'report_service\': \'src.api.reports.ReportService\',\n            \'workflow_adapter\': \'src.api.workflow.WorkflowAdapter\',\n            \'data_pipeline_service\': \'src.api.data_router.DataPipelineService\',\n            \'quant_signal_service\': \'src.api.calculation_router.QuantSignalService\'\n        }\n        \n        if service_name not in service_mappings:\n            raise ValueError(f"未知的服务名称: {service_name}")\n        \n        service_path = service_mappings[service_name]\n        \n        def mock_patcher():\n            return patch(service_path) as mock_service_class:\n                mock_service = mock_service_class.return_value\n                getattr(mock_service, method_name).return_value = return_data\n                return mock_service_class\n        \n        return mock_patcher()\n\n\nclass RedPhaseTestMixin:\n    """\n    红灯阶段测试混入类\n    用于编写会失败的测试 - 遵循第3条红灯-绿灯-重构原则\n    """\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_red_phase_failing_test(self):\n        pass\n        """\n        红灯阶段测试 - 这个测试会失败\n        用于验证TDD流程的第一步\n        """\n        # 这个测试会失败,因为功能可能还未实现\n        # 这是TDD流程中的"红灯"阶段\n        response = self.client.get(\'/api/v1/non-existent-endpoint\')\n        \n        # 期望的响应格式（当功能实现后）\n        expected_data = {\n            \'success\': True,\n            \'message\': \'功能实现成功\',\n            \'data\': []\n        }\n        \n        # 这个断言会失败,直到功能被实现\n        self.assert_exact_response(response, 200, expected_data)\n\n\nclass GreenPhaseTestMixin:\n    """\n    绿灯阶段测试混入类\n    用于编写让测试通过的代码 - 遵循第3条红灯-绿灯-重构原则\n    """\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_green_phase_passing_test(self):\n        pass\n        """\n        绿灯阶段测试 - 这个测试会通过\n        用于验证TDD流程的第二步\n        """\n        # 这个测试会通过,因为功能已经实现\n        # 这是TDD流程中的"绿灯"阶段\n        response = self.client.get(\'/api/v1/admin/arbitration-cases\')\n        \n        # 验证响应格式\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n        data = response.json()\n        assert data[\'success\'] is True\n        assert isinstance(data[\'data\'], list)\n        assert isinstance(data[\'total\'], int)\n\n\nclass RefactorPhaseTestMixin:\n    """\n    重构阶段测试混入类\n    用于重构后的测试 - 遵循第3条红灯-绿灯-重构原则\n    """\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_refactor_phase_optimized_test(self):\n        pass\n        """\n        重构阶段测试 - 这个测试会通过\n        用于验证TDD流程的第三步\n        """\n        # 这个测试会通过,验证重构后的代码仍然正确\n        # 这是TDD流程中的"重构"阶段\n        response = self.client.get(\'/api/v1/admin/arbitration-cases\')\n        \n        # 验证优化后的响应格式\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n        data = response.json()\n        assert data[\'success\'] is True\n        assert data[\'message\'] == \'获取仲裁案件列表成功\'\n        assert isinstance(data[\'data\'], list)\n        assert isinstance(data[\'total\'], int)\n        assert data[\'page\'] == 1\n        assert data[\'size\'] == 10\n\n\nclass DockerTestEnvironmentMixin:\n    """\n    Docker测试环境混入类\n    用于Docker容器化的测试环境 - 遵循第10条环境一致性铁律\n    """\n    \n    @pytest.fixture(scope="session")\n    def docker_test_environment(self):\n        """\n        Docker测试环境设置\n        使用Docker容器化的独立环境\n        """\n        # 启动Docker容器\n        # 连接测试数据库\n        # 初始化测试数据\n        yield\n        # 清理Docker容器\n        # 清理测试数据\n    \n    def setup_docker_test_data(self):\n        """\n        设置Docker测试数据\n        """\n        pass\n    \n    def cleanup_docker_test_data(self):\n        """\n        清理Docker测试数据\n        """\n        pass\n\n\nclass TestConstitutionValidator:\n    """\n    测试宪法验证器\n    用于验证测试是否符合测试宪法要求\n    """\n    \n    @staticmethod\n    def validate_assertions(test_method):\n        """\n        验证断言是否符合第7条断言铁律\n        """\n        # 检查是否使用了"存在性"断言\n        forbidden_assertions = [\n            \'assert.*not.*toBeNull\',\n            \'assert.*toBeDefined\',\n            \'assert.*not.*toBeUndefined\',\n            \'assert.*in.*data\',\n            \'assert.*hasattr\'\n        ]\n        \n        import inspect\n        source = inspect.getsource(test_method)\n        \n        for pattern in forbidden_assertions:\n            import re\n            if re.search(pattern, source):\n                raise ValueError(f"测试方法 {test_method.__name__} 使用了禁止的\'存在性\'断言: {pattern}")\n    \n    @staticmethod\n    def validate_mocking(test_method):\n        """\n        验证模拟是否符合第6条模拟铁律\n        """\n        # 检查是否模拟了内部逻辑\n        forbidden_mocks = [\n            \'patch.*internal\',\n            \'patch.*private\',\n            \'patch.*_method\'\n        ]\n        \n        import inspect\n        source = inspect.getsource(test_method)\n        \n        for pattern in forbidden_mocks:\n            import re\n            if re.search(pattern, source):\n                raise ValueError(f"测试方法 {test_method.__name__} 模拟了内部逻辑: {pattern}")\n    \n    @staticmethod\n    def validate_tdd_flow(test_class):\n        """\n        验证TDD流程是否符合第3条红灯-绿灯-重构原则\n        """\n        # 检查是否有红灯、绿灯、重构阶段的测试\n        red_tests = [method for method in dir(test_class) if \'red_phase\' in method.lower()]\n        green_tests = [method for method in dir(test_class) if \'green_phase\' in method.lower()]\n        refactor_tests = [method for method in dir(test_class) if \'refactor_phase\' in method.lower()]\n        \n        if not red_tests:\n            print("警告: 缺少红灯阶段测试")\n        if not green_tests:\n            print("警告: 缺少绿灯阶段测试")\n        if', 'for key, expected_value in expected_data.items():\n                assert data[key] == expected_value, f"字段 {key} 期望值 {expected_value},实际值 {data[key]}"\n    \n    def assert_error_response(self, response, expected_status: int, expected_error_contains: str):\n        """\n        错误响应断言 - 遵循第7条断言铁律\n        """\n        assert response.status_code == expected_status, f"期望状态码 {expected_status},实际 {response.status_code}"\n        \n        data = response.json()\n        assert data[\'detail\'] is not None, "错误响应必须包含 \'detail\' 字段"\n        assert expected_error_contains in data[\'detail\'], f"错误信息应包含 \'{expected_error_contains}\',实际: {data[\'detail\']}"\n    \n    def assert_performance(self, response, max_response_time: float = 1.0):\n        """\n        性能断言 - 遵循测试宪法性能要求\n        """\n        assert response.status_code == 200, "性能测试要求响应成功"\n        # 注意：实际的时间测量应该在调用此方法前进行\n        # 这里只是验证响应成功,时间测量由调用者负责\n    \n    def create_mock_service_data(self, service_name: str, method_name: str, return_data: Any):\n        """\n        创建模拟服务数据 - 遵循第6条模拟铁律\n        只模拟外部边界,不模拟内部逻辑\n        """\n        service_mappings = {\n            \'arbitration_service\': \'src.api.admin.ArbitrationService\',\n            \'report_service\': \'src.api.reports.ReportService\',\n            \'workflow_adapter\': \'src.api.workflow.WorkflowAdapter\',\n            \'data_pipeline_service\': \'src.api.data_router.DataPipelineService\',\n            \'quant_signal_service\': \'src.api.calculation_router.QuantSignalService\'\n        }\n        \n        if service_name not in service_mappings:\n            raise ValueError(f"未知的服务名称: {service_name}")\n        \n        service_path = service_mappings[service_name]\n        \n        def mock_patcher():\n            return patch(service_path) as mock_service_class:\n                mock_service = mock_service_class.return_value\n                getattr(mock_service, method_name).return_value = return_data\n                return mock_service_class\n        \n        return mock_patcher()\n\n\nclass RedPhaseTestMixin:\n    """\n    红灯阶段测试混入类\n    用于编写会失败的测试 - 遵循第3条红灯-绿灯-重构原则\n    """\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_red_phase_failing_test(self):\n        pass\n        """\n        红灯阶段测试 - 这个测试会失败\n        用于验证TDD流程的第一步\n        """\n        # 这个测试会失败,因为功能可能还未实现\n        # 这是TDD流程中的"红灯"阶段\n        response = self.client.get(\'/api/v1/non-existent-endpoint\')\n        \n        # 期望的响应格式（当功能实现后）\n        expected_data = {\n            \'success\': True,\n            \'message\': \'功能实现成功\',\n            \'data\': []\n        }\n        \n        # 这个断言会失败,直到功能被实现\n        self.assert_exact_response(response, 200, expected_data)\n\n\nclass GreenPhaseTestMixin:\n    """\n    绿灯阶段测试混入类\n    用于编写让测试通过的代码 - 遵循第3条红灯-绿灯-重构原则\n    """\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_green_phase_passing_test(self):\n        pass\n        """\n        绿灯阶段测试 - 这个测试会通过\n        用于验证TDD流程的第二步\n        """\n        # 这个测试会通过,因为功能已经实现\n        # 这是TDD流程中的"绿灯"阶段\n        response = self.client.get(\'/api/v1/admin/arbitration-cases\')\n        \n        # 验证响应格式\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n        data = response.json()\n        assert data[\'success\'] is True\n        assert isinstance(data[\'data\'], list)\n        assert isinstance(data[\'total\'], int)\n\n\nclass RefactorPhaseTestMixin:\n    """\n    重构阶段测试混入类\n    用于重构后的测试 - 遵循第3条红灯-绿灯-重构原则\n    """\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_refactor_phase_optimized_test(self):\n        pass\n        """\n        重构阶段测试 - 这个测试会通过\n        用于验证TDD流程的第三步\n        """\n        # 这个测试会通过,验证重构后的代码仍然正确\n        # 这是TDD流程中的"重构"阶段\n        response = self.client.get(\'/api/v1/admin/arbitration-cases\')\n        \n        # 验证优化后的响应格式\n        assert response.status_code == 200\n        data = response.json()\n        assert data[\'success\'] is True\n        assert data[\'message\'] == \'获取仲裁案件列表成功\'\n        assert isinstance(data[\'data\'], list)\n        assert isinstance(data[\'total\'], int)\n        assert data[\'page\'] == 1\n        assert data[\'size\'] == 10\n\n\nclass DockerTestEnvironmentMixin:\n    """\n    Docker测试环境混入类\n    用于Docker容器化的测试环境 - 遵循第10条环境一致性铁律\n    """\n    \n    @pytest.fixture(scope="session")\n    def docker_test_environment(self):\n        """\n        Docker测试环境设置\n        使用Docker容器化的独立环境\n        """\n        # 检查是否使用了"存在性"断言\n        forbidden_assertions = [\n            \'assert.*not.*toBeNull\',\n            \'assert.*toBeDefined\',\n            \'assert.*not.*toBeUndefined\',\n            \'assert.*in.*data\',\n            \'assert.*hasattr\'\n        ]\n        \n        import inspect\n        source = inspect.getsource(test_method)\n        \n        for pattern in forbidden_assertions:\n            import re\n            if re.search(pattern, source):\n                raise ValueError(f"测试方法 {test_method.__name__} 使用了禁止的\'存在性\'断言: {pattern}")\n    \n    @staticmethod\n    def validate_mocking(test_method):\n        """\n        验证模拟是否符合第6条模拟铁律\n        """\n        # 创建10个线程,每个发送10个请求\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(10):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=make_sustained_request)\n            threads.append(thread)\n - **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

### 11. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/performance/stress_test.py
- **规则**: 第4条：简单性优先
- **违规**: ['if errors:\n            print(f"错误详情: {errors[:5]}")  # 只显示前5个错误\n        \n        # 验证请求成功率（允许一定的失败率）\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        assert success_rate >= 0.8, f"成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于80%"\n        \n        # 验证响应时间（在压力下允许更长的响应时间）\n        response_times = [r[\'response_time\'] for r in results if r[\'success\']]\n        if response_times:\n            avg_time = statistics.mean(response_times)\n            max_time = max(response_times)\n            \n            assert avg_time < 5000, f"平均响应时间 {avg_time:.2f}ms 超过5秒"\n            assert max_time < 30000, f"最大响应时间 {max_time:.2f}ms 超过30秒"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_burst_traffic_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试突发流量压力"""\n        results = []\n        \n        def burst_worker():\n            try:\n                # 突发发送10个请求\n                for _ in range(10):\n                    start_time = time.time()\n                    response = client.get("/api/v1/admin/arbitration-cases")\n                    end_time = time.time()\n                    \n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'response_time\': (end_time - start_time) * 1000,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code in [200, 401, 403]\n                    })\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'response_time\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e)\n                })\n        \n        # 同时启动50个突发线程\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(50):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=burst_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results)\n        \n        # 在突发流量下,允许较低的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.7, f"突发流量成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于70%"\n        \n        # 验证系统没有完全崩溃\n        assert len(results) > 0, "系统在突发流量下完全无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_memory_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试内存压力"""\n        import psutil\n        import os\n        \n        process = psutil.Process(os.getpid())\n        initial_memory = process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024  # MB\n        \n        results = []\n        \n        def memory_stress_worker():\n            try:\n                # 发送大量请求测试内存使用\n                for _ in range(50):\n                    response = client.get("/health")\n                    results.append(response.status_code == 200)\n                    \n                    # 创建一些临时数据增加内存压力\n                    temp_data = [i for i in range(1000)]\n                    del temp_data\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append(False)\n        \n        # 创建多个线程\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(20):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=memory_stress_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 检查内存使用\n        final_memory = process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024  # MB\n        memory_increase = final_memory - initial_memory\n        \n        # 验证内存增长在合理范围内\n        assert memory_increase < 200, f"内存增长 {memory_increase:.2f}MB 超过200MB"\n        \n        # 验证系统仍然响应\n        success_count = sum(results)\n        assert success_count > 0, "系统在内存压力下无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_connection_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试连接压力"""\n        results = []\n        \n        def connection_worker():\n            try:\n                # 快速连续发送请求\n                for _ in range(30):\n                    start_time = time.time()\n                    response = client.get("/health")\n                    end_time = time.time()\n                    \n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'response_time\': (end_time - start_time) * 1000,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code == 200\n                    })\n                    \n                    # 极短延迟\n                    time.sleep(0.001)\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'response_time\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e)\n                })\n        \n        # 创建大量连接\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(200):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=connection_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        \n        # 在连接压力下,允许较低的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.6, f"连接压力成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于60%"\n        \n        # 验证系统没有完全崩溃\n        assert len(results) > 0, "系统在连接压力下完全无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_error_recovery_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试错误恢复压力"""\n        results = []\n        \n        def error_recovery_worker():\n            try:\n                # 混合正常请求和可能导致错误的请求\n                for i in range(20):\n                    if i % 3 == 0:\n                        # 正常请求\n                        response = client.get("/health")\n                    elif i % 3 == 1:\n                        # 可能返回404的请求\n                        response = client.get("/api/v1/non-existent")\n                    else:\n                        # 可能返回400的请求\n                        response = client.post("/api/v1/ai/analyze", json={})\n                    \n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code in [200, 400, 404, 422]\n                    })\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e)\n                })\n        \n        # 创建多个线程\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(30):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=error_recovery_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        \n        # 在错误恢复压力下,允许较低的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.5, f"错误恢复成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于50%"\n        \n        # 验证系统能够处理错误并继续运行\n        assert len(results) > 0, "系统在错误恢复压力下无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_sustained_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试持续压力"""\n        results = []\n        start_time = time.time()\n        \n        def sustained_worker():\n            try:\n                while time.time() - start_time < 30:  # 持续30秒\n                    response = client.get("/health")\n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code == 200,\n                        \'timestamp\': time.time()\n                    })\n                    time.sleep(0.1)  # 100ms间隔\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e),\n                    \'timestamp\': time.time()\n                })\n        \n        # 创建持续工作线程\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(10):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=sustained_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        \n        # 在持续压力下,要求较高的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.9, f"持续压力成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于90%"\n        \n        # 验证系统能够持续运行\n        assert len(results) > 100, f"持续压力下请求数 {len(results)} 过少"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_resource_exhaustion_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试资源耗尽压力"""\n        results = []\n        \n        def resource_exhaustion_worker():\n            try:\n                # 发送大量请求消耗资源\n                for _ in range(100):\n                    response = client.get("/api/v1/data/status")\n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code in [200, 401, 403]\n                    })\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e)\n                })\n        \n        # 创建大量线程消耗资源\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(50):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=resource_exhaustion_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        \n        # 在资源耗尽压力下,允许较低的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.3, f"资源耗尽成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于30%"\n        \n        # 验证系统没有完全崩溃\n        assert len(results) > 0, "系统在资源耗尽压力下完全无响应"\n\nif', 'formance:\n    """压力性能测试类"""\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_green_phase_high_concurrency_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试高并发压力"""\n        results = []\n        errors = []\n        \n        def stress_worker(worker_id):\n            try:\n                for i in range(20):  # 每个线程发送20个请求\n                    start_time = time.time()\n                    response = client.get("/health")\n                    end_time = time.time()\n                    \n                    results.append({\n                        \'worker_id\': worker_id,\n                        \'request_id\': i,\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'response_time\': (end_time - start_time) * 1000,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code == 200,\n                        \'timestamp\': time.time()\n                    })\n                    \n                    # 短暂延迟避免过于密集的请求\n                    time.sleep(0.01)\n            except Exception as e:\n                errors.append(f"Worker {worker_id}: {e}")\n        \n        # 创建100个并发线程\n        threads = []\n        for i in range(100):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=stress_worker, args=(i,))\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        print(f"总请求数: {len(results)}")\n        print(f"错误数: {len(errors)}")\n        \n        if errors:\n            print(f"错误详情: {errors[:5]}")  # 只显示前5个错误\n        \n        # 验证请求成功率（允许一定的失败率）\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        assert success_rate >= 0.8, f"成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于80%"\n        \n        # 验证响应时间（在压力下允许更长的响应时间）\n        response_times = [r[\'response_time\'] for r in results if r[\'success\']]\n        if response_times:\n            avg_time = statistics.mean(response_times)\n            max_time = max(response_times)\n            \n            assert avg_time < 5000, f"平均响应时间 {avg_time:.2f}ms 超过5秒"\n            assert max_time < 30000, f"最大响应时间 {max_time:.2f}ms 超过30秒"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_burst_traffic_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试突发流量压力"""\n        results = []\n        \n        def burst_worker():\n            try:\n                # 突发发送10个请求\n                for _ in range(10):\n                    start_time = time.time()\n                    response = client.get("/api/v1/admin/arbitration-cases")\n                    end_time = time.time()\n                    \n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'response_time\': (end_time - start_time) * 1000,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code in [200, 401, 403]\n                    })\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'response_time\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e)\n                })\n        \n        # 同时启动50个突发线程\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(50):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=burst_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results)\n        \n        # 在突发流量下,允许较低的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.7, f"突发流量成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于70%"\n        \n        # 验证系统没有完全崩溃\n        assert len(results) > 0, "系统在突发流量下完全无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_memory_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试内存压力"""\n        import psutil\n        import os\n        \n        process = psutil.Process(os.getpid())\n        initial_memory = process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024  # MB\n        \n        results = []\n        \n        def memory_stress_worker():\n            try:\n                # 发送大量请求测试内存使用\n                for _ in range(50):\n                    response = client.get("/health")\n                    results.append(response.status_code == 200)\n                    \n                    # 创建一些临时数据增加内存压力\n                    temp_data = [i for i in range(1000)]\n                    del temp_data\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append(False)\n        \n        # 创建多个线程\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(20):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=memory_stress_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 检查内存使用\n        final_memory = process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024  # MB\n        memory_increase = final_memory - initial_memory\n        \n        # 验证内存增长在合理范围内\n        assert memory_increase < 200, f"内存增长 {memory_increase:.2f}MB 超过200MB"\n        \n        # 验证系统仍然响应\n        success_count = sum(results)\n        assert success_count > 0, "系统在内存压力下无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_connection_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试连接压力"""\n        results = []\n        \n        def connection_worker():\n            try:\n                # 快速连续发送请求\n                for _ in range(30):\n                    start_time = time.time()\n                    response = client.get("/health")\n                    end_time = time.time()\n                    \n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'response_time\': (end_time - start_time) * 1000,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code == 200\n                    })\n                    \n                    # 极短延迟\n                    time.sleep(0.001)\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'response_time\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e)\n                })\n        \n        # 创建大量连接\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(200):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=connection_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        \n        # 在连接压力下,允许较低的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.6, f"连接压力成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于60%"\n        \n        # 验证系统没有完全崩溃\n        assert len(results) > 0, "系统在连接压力下完全无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_error_recovery_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试错误恢复压力"""\n        results = []\n        \n        def error_recovery_worker():\n            try:\n                # 极短延迟\n                    time.sleep(0.001)\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'response_time\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e)\n                })\n        \n        # 创建大量连接\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(200):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=connection_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        \n        # 在连接压力下,允许较低的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.6, f"连接压力成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于60%"\n        \n        # 验证系统没有完全崩溃\n        assert len(results) > 0, "系统在连接压力下完全无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_error_recovery_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试错误恢复压力"""\n        results = []\n        \n        def error_recovery_worker():\n            try:\n                # 混合正常请求和可能导致错误的请求\n                for i in range(20):\n                    if i % 3 == 0:\n                        # 正常请求\n                        response = client.get("/health")\n                    elif i % 3 == 1:\n                        # 可能返回404的请求\n                        response = client.get("/api/v1/non-existent")\n                    else:\n                        # 可能返回400的请求\n                        response = client.post("/api/v1/ai/analyze", json={})\n                    \n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code in [200, 400, 404, 422]\n                    })\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e)\n                })\n        \n        # 创建多个线程\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(30):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=error_recovery_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        \n        # 在错误恢复压力下,允许较低的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.5, f"错误恢复成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于50%"\n        \n        # 验证系统能够处理错误并继续运行\n        assert len(results) > 0, "系统在错误恢复压力下无响应"\n    \n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\ndef test_sustained_stress(self):\n        pass\n        """测试持续压力"""\n        results = []\n        start_time = time.time()\n        \n        def sustained_worker():\n            try:\n                while time.time() - start_time < 30:  # 持续30秒\n                    response = client.get("/health")\n                    results.append({\n                        \'status_code\': response.status_code,\n                        \'success\': response.status_code == 200,\n                        \'timestamp\': time.time()\n                    })\n                    time.sleep(0.1)  # 100ms间隔\n            except Exception as e:\n                results.append({\n                    \'status_code\': 0,\n                    \'success\': False,\n                    \'error\': str(e),\n                    \'timestamp\': time.time()\n                })\n        \n        # 创建持续工作线程\n        threads = []\n        for _ in range(10):\n            thread = threading.Thread(target=sustained_worker)\n            threads.append(thread)\n            thread.start()\n        \n        # 等待所有线程完成\n        for thread in threads:\n            thread.join()\n        \n        # 验证结果\n        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r[\'success\'])\n        success_rate = success_count / len(results) if results else 0\n        \n        # 在持续压力下,要求较高的成功率\n        assert success_rate >= 0.9, f"持续压力成功率 {success_rate:.2%} 低于90%"\n        \n        # 验证系统能够持续运行\n        assert len(results) > 100, f"持续压力下请求数 {len(results)} 过少"\n    \n    # ### 13. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/e2e/backend/test_real_world_e2e.py
- **规则**: 第4条：简单性优先
- **违规**: ['try:\n            # 步骤1: 从真实Tushare API获取数据\n            print("📡 从真实Tushare API获取数据...")\n            start_time = time.time()\n\n            raw_data = await real_data_pipeline_service.fetch_tushare_data(\n                stable_test_data["stock_code"], stable_test_data["trade_date"]\n            )\n\n            api_time = time.time() - start_time\n            print(f"✅ API调用完成,耗时: {api_time:.2f}秒")\n\n            # 验证API返回的数据结构\n            assert "stock_basic" in raw_data, "缺少股票基本信息"\n            assert "daily_basic" in raw_data, "缺少日度基本面数据"\n            assert "daily" in raw_data, "缺少日度行情数据"\n\n            # 验证数据不为空\n            assert len(raw_data["stock_basic"]) > 0, "股票基本信息为空"\n            assert len(raw_data["daily_basic"]) > 0, "日度基本面数据为空"\n            assert len(raw_data["daily"]) > 0, "日度行情数据为空"\n\n            # 步骤2: 提取财务因子\n            print("🔧 提取财务因子...")\n            financial_factors = (\n                await real_data_pipeline_service.extract_financial_factors(\n                    stable_test_data["stock_code"],\n                    stable_test_data["trade_date"],\n                    raw_data,\n                )\n            )\n\n            # 验证财务因子的合理性（银行股的特征）\n            assert financial_factors["stock_code"] == stable_test_data["stock_code"]\n            assert financial_factors["trade_date"] == stable_test_data["trade_date"]\n\n            # 验证PE和PB在合理范围内（银行股特征）\n            pe_ratio = financial_factors["pe_ratio"]\n            pb_ratio = financial_factors["pb_ratio"]\n\n            print(f"📊 财务指标: PE={pe_ratio:.2f}, PB={pb_ratio:.2f}")\n\n            # 银行股的PE和PB通常较低\n            assert (\n                stable_test_data["expected_pe_range"][0]\n                <= pe_ratio\n                <= stable_test_data["expected_pe_range"][1]\n            ), f"PE比率 {pe_ratio} 超出银行股合理范围 {stable_test_data[\'expected_pe_range\']}"\n\n            assert (\n                stable_test_data["expected_pb_range"][0]\n                <= pb_ratio\n                <= stable_test_data["expected_pb_range"][1]\n            ), f"PB比率 {pb_ratio} 超出银行股合理范围 {stable_test_data[\'expected_pb_range\']}"\n\n            # 步骤3: 计算超级财务因子\n            print("🧮 计算超级财务因子...")\n            super_factors = (\n                await real_data_pipeline_service.calculate_super_financial_factors(\n                    financial_factors\n                )\n            )\n\n            # 验证超级财务因子的合理性\n            assert "overall_score" in super_factors\n            assert "value_score" in super_factors\n            assert "calculated_at" in super_factors\n\n            overall_score = super_factors["overall_score"]\n            print(f"🎯 综合评分: {overall_score:.2f}")\n\n            # 评分应该在合理范围内\n            assert 0 <= overall_score <= 100, f"综合评分 {overall_score} 超出合理范围"\n\n            # 步骤4: 验证数据一致性\n            print("🔍 验证数据一致性...")\n            assert super_factors["stock_code"] == financial_factors["stock_code"]\n            assert super_factors["trade_date"] == financial_factors["trade_date"]\n            assert super_factors["pe_ratio"] == financial_factors["pe_ratio"]\n            assert super_factors["pb_ratio"] == financial_factors["pb_ratio"]\n\n            total_time = time.time() - start_time\n            print(f"🎉 真实世界E2E测试完成！总耗时: {total_time:.2f}秒")\n\n            # 输出关键指标供人工审查\n            print("\\n📋 关键指标摘要:")\n            print(f"   股票代码: {financial_factors[\'stock_code\']}")\n            print(f"   交易日期: {financial_factors[\'trade_date\']}")\n            print(f"   PE比率: {pe_ratio:.2f}")\n            print(f"   PB比率: {pb_ratio:.2f}")\n            print(f"   综合评分: {overall_score:.2f}")\n            print(f"   总耗时: {total_time:.2f}秒")\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            print(f"\\n❌ 真实世界E2E测试失败: {e}")\n            print("🔍 请人工判断失败原因:")\n            print("   1. 网络连接问题？")\n            print("   2. Tushare API问题？")\n            print("   3. 我们的代码问题？")\n            print("   4. 数据格式变化？")\n            print("\\n如果是外部问题,可以忽略此失败")\n            print("如果是代码问题,请立即修复")\n            raise\n\n    @pytest.mark.e2e\n    @pytest.mark.slow\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_data_pipeline_error_handling_real_world(\n        self, real_data_pipeline_service\n    ):\n        """\n        真实世界错误处理测试\n\n        测试我们的系统在遇到真实API错误时的表现\n        """\n        print("\\n🚀 开始真实世界错误处理测试")\n\n        # 测试无效股票代码\n        try:\n            await real_data_pipeline_service.fetch_tushare_data(\n                "INVALID.SH", "20230101"\n            )\n            assert False, "应该抛出异常"\n        except Exception as e:\n            print(f"✅ 无效股票代码正确抛出异常: {e}")\n            assert "API调用失败" in str(e) or "股票代码" in str(e)\n\n        # 测试无效日期格式\n        try']

- **规则**: 第4条：简单性优先
- **违规**: ['formance(\n        self, data_pipeline_service, sample_tushare_data\n    ):\n        """测试数据管道的性能"""\n        import time\n\n        start_time = time.time()\n\n        # 执行完整流程\n        raw_data = sample_tushare_data\n        financial_factors = await data_pipeline_service.extract_financial_factors(\n            "000001.SZ", "20240101", raw_data\n        )\n        super_factors = await data_pipeline_service.calculate_super_financial_factors(\n            financial_factors\n        )\n        save_result = await data_pipeline_service.save_financial_factors(\n            financial_factors\n        )\n        save_super_result = await data_pipeline_service.save_super_financial_factors(\n            super_factors\n        )\n\n        end_time = time.time()\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert save_result is True\n        assert save_super_result is True\n\n        # 验证性能（整个流程应该在合理时间内完成）\n        total_time = end_time - start_time\n        assert total_time < 5.0  # 5秒内完成\n        print(f"完整数据管道流程耗时: {total_time:.3f}秒")\n\n    # ==================== 错误恢复测试 ====================\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_data_pipeline_error_recovery(\n        self, data_pipeline_service, sample_tushare_data\n    ):\n        """测试数据管道的错误恢复能力"""\n        # 测试部分失败的情况\n        raw_data = sample_tushare_data\n\n        # 正常提取财务因子\n        financial_factors = await data_pipeline_service.extract_financial_factors(\n            "000001.SZ", "20240101", raw_data\n        )\n\n        # 模拟保存失败\n        with patch.object(\n            data_pipeline_service,\n            "_persist_financial_factors",\n            side_effect=Exception("数据库连接失败"),\n        ):\n            with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n                await data_pipeline_service.save_financial_factors(financial_factors)\n\n            assert "财务因子保存失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n            assert "数据库连接失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    # ==================== 并发测试 ====================\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_data_pipeline_concurrent_processing(self, data_pipeline_service):\n        """测试数据管道的并发处理能力"""\n        import asyncio\n\n        # 创建多个并发任务\n        tasks = []\n        for i in range(5):\n            task = data_pipeline_service.extract_financial_factors(\n                f"00000{i}.SZ",\n                "20240101",\n                {\n                    "daily_basic": [\n                        {\n                            "ts_code": f"00000{i}.SZ",\n                            "trade_date": "20240101",\n                            "pe": 15.0 + i,\n                            "pb": 2.0 + i * 0.1,\n                            "ps": 3.0 + i * 0.2,\n                            "dv_ratio": 2.5 + i * 0.1,\n                        }\n                    ],\n                    "daily": [\n                        {\n                            "ts_code": f"00000{i}.SZ",\n                            "trade_date": "20240101",\n                            "open": 10.0 + i,\n                            "high": 10.5 + i,\n                            "low": 9.5 + i,\n                            "close": 10.2 + i,\n                            "vol": 1000000 + i * 100000,\n                            "amount": 10000000 + i * 1000000,\n                        }\n                    ],\n                },\n            )\n            tasks.append(task)\n\n        # 并发执行\n        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)\n\n        # 验证所有任务都成功完成\n        assert len(results) == 5\n        for']
- **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

"""验证超级财务因子是否正确保存到数据库"""\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n        cursor.execute(\n            """\n            SELECT stock_code, trade_date, pe_ratio, pb_ratio, ps_ratio, dividend_yield,\n                   market_cap, turnover_rate, volume_ratio, float_market_cap, total_shares,\n                   float_shares, free_shares, open_price, high_price,               overall_score, calculated_at\n            FROM super_financial_factors\n            WHERE stock_code = ? AND trade_date = ?\n        """,\n            (expected_data["stock_code"], expected_data["trade_date"]),\n        )\n\n        result = cursor.fetchone()\n        conn.close()\n\n        assert result is not None  # 验证评分数据一致性\n        assert result[22] == expected_data["value_score"]\n        assert result[23] == expected_data["growth_score"]\n        assert result[24] == expected_data["profitability_score"]\n        assert result[25] == expected_data["financial_health_score"]\n        assert result[26] == expected_data["overall_score"]\n        assert result[27] == expected_data["calculated_at"]\n\n    # ==================== 真实数据库集成测试 ====================\n\n    def test_save_financial_factors_to_real_database(\n        self, data_pipeline_service, sample_financial_factors, setup_test_tables\n    ):\n        """测试将财务因子保存到真实数据库"""\n\n\n    \n\n        # 使用真实数据库保存\n        self._save_financial_factors_to_db(\n            data_pipeline_service.db_path, sample_financial_factors\n        )\n\n        # 验证数据是否正确保存\n        self._verify_financial_factors_in_db(\n            data_pipeline_service.db_path, sample_financial_factors\n        )\n\n    def test_save_super_financial_factors_to_real_database(\n        self, data_pipeline_service, sample_super_financial_factors, setup_test_tables\n    ):\n        """测试将超级财务因子保存到真实数据库"""\n\n\n    \n\n        # 使用真实数据库保存\n        self._save_super_financial_factors_to_db(\n            data_pipeline_service.db_path, sample_super_financial_factors\n        )\n\n        # 验证数据是否正确保存\n        self._verify_super_financial_factors_in_db(\n            data_pipeline_service.db_path, sample_super_financial_factors\n        )\n\n    def test_database_constraints_and_uniqueness(\n        self, data_pipeline_service, sample_financial_factors, setup_test_tables\n    ):\n        """测试数据库约束和唯一性"""\n\n\n    \n\n        # 第一次保存\n        self._save_financial_factors_to_db(\n            data_pipeline_service.db_path, sample_financial_factors\n        )\n\n        # 修改数据后再次保存（应该更新而不是插入）\n        modified_data = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        modified_data["pe_ratio"] = 20.0\n        modified_data["pb_ratio"] = 3.0\n\n        self._save_financial_factors_to_db(data_pipeline_service.db_path, modified_data)\n\n        # 验证数据已更新\n        self._verify_financial_factors_in_db(\n            data_pipeline_service.db_path, modif']

### 20. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/integration/backend/test_datapipeline_io.py
