- **违规**: ['try": "银行",\n                    "market": "主板",\n                    "list_date": "19910403",\n                }\n            ]\n        )\n\n        with (\n            patch.object(service.pro, "daily_basic", return_value=mock_daily_basic),\n            patch.object(service.pro, "daily", return_value=mock_daily),\n            patch.object(service.pro, "stock_basic", return_value=mock_stock_basic),\n        ):\n            result = await service.fetch_tushare_data("000001.SZ", "20240117")\n\n            # 验证返回数据结构\n            assert "daily_basic" in result\n            assert "daily" in result\n            assert "stock_basic" in result\n\n            # 验证数据内容\n            assert len(result["daily_basic"]) == 1\n            assert result["daily_basic"][0]["ts_code"] == "000001.SZ"\n            assert result["daily_basic"][0]["close"] == 12.50\n            assert result["daily_basic"][0]["pe"] == 15.0\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_tushare_api_null_values(self, service):\n        """测试:Tushare API返回预期外null值的情况"""\n        # 模拟Tushare API返回包含null值的数据\n        mock_daily_basic = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "trade_date": "20240117",\n                    "close": 12.50,\n                    "pe": None,  # 关键财务指标为null\n                    "pb": None,\n                    "ps": None,\n                    "dv_ratio": None,\n                    "turnover_rate": 1.5,\n                    "volume_ratio": 1.2,\n                    "total_mv": 1000000.0,\n                    "circ_mv": 900000.0,\n                }\n            ]\n        )\n\n        mock_daily = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "trade_date": "20240117",\n                    "open": 12.30,\n                    "high": 12.80,\n                    "low": 12.20,\n                    "close": 12.50,\n                    "pct_chg": 2.5,\n                    "vol": 150000000,\n                }\n            ]\n        )\n\n        mock_stock_basic = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "symbol": "000001",\n                    "name": "平安银行",\n                    "area": "深圳",\n                    "industry": "银行",\n                    "market": "主板",\n                    "list_date": "19910403",\n                }\n            ]\n        )\n\n        with (\n            patch.object(service.pro, "daily_basic", return_value=mock_daily_basic),\n            patch.object(service.pro, "daily", return_value=mock_daily),\n            patch.object(service.pro, "stock_basic", return_value=mock_stock_basic),\n        ):\n            result = await service.fetch_tushare_data("000001.SZ", "20240117")\n\n            # 验证系统能处理null值\n            assert "daily_basic" in result\n            assert len(result["daily_basic"]) == 1\n\n            # 验证财务因子提取能处理null值\n            financial_factors = await service.extract_financial_factors(\n                "000001.SZ", "20240117", result\n            )\n\n            # 验证null值被正确处理为0.0或默认值\n            assert financial_factors["pe_ratio"] == 0.0\n            assert financial_factors["pb_ratio"] == 0.0\n            assert financial_factors["ps_ratio"] == 0.0\n            assert financial_factors["dividend_yield"] == 0.0\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_tushare_api_exception(self, service):\n        """测试:Tushare API抛出异常的情况"""\n        # 模拟Tushare API抛出异常\n        with patch.object(\n            service.pro, "daily_basic", side_effect=Exception("API调用失败")\n        ):\n            with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n                await service.fetch_tushare_data("000001.SZ", "20240117")\n\n            assert "API调用失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_empty_tushare_response(self, service):\n        """测试:Tushare API返回空数据的情况"""\n        # 模拟Tushare API返回空DataFrame\n        mock_daily_basic = pd.DataFrame()\n        mock_daily = pd.DataFrame()\n        mock_stock_basic = pd.DataFrame()\n\n        with (\n            patch.object(service.pro, "daily_basic", return_value=mock_daily_basic),\n            patch.object(service.pro, "daily", return_value=mock_daily),\n            patch.object(service.pro, "stock_basic", return_value=mock_stock_basic),\n        ):\n            result = await service.fetch_tushare_data("000001.SZ", "20240117")\n\n            # 验证返回空数据结构\n            assert "daily_basic" in result\n            assert "daily" in result\n            assert "stock_basic" in result\n            assert len(result["daily_basic"]) == 0\n            assert len(result["daily"]) == 0\n            assert len(result["stock_basic"]) == 0\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_validate_stock_code_format(self, service):\n        """测试:股票代码格式验证"""\n        # 测试无效股票代码\n        with pytest.raises(ValueError) as exc_info:\n            await service.fetch_tushare_data("", "20240117")\n\n        assert "股票代码不能为空" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n        # 测试无效日期格式\n        with pytest.raises(ValueError) as exc_info:\n            await service.fetch_tushare_data("000001.SZ", "invalid_date")\n\n        assert "无效的日期格式" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_extract_financial_factors_with_real_data_structure(\n        self, service\n    ):\n        """测试:使用真实数据结构提取财务因子"""\n        # 模拟真实的Tushare数据结构\n        raw_data = {\n            "daily_basic": [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "trade_date": "20240117",\n                    "close": 12.50,\n                    "pe": 15.0,\n                    "pb": 2.0,\n                    "ps": 3.0,\n                    "dv_ratio": 2.5,\n                    "turnover_rate": 1.5,\n                    "volume_ratio": 1.2,\n                    "total_mv": 1000000.0,\n                    "circ_mv": 900000.0,\n                }\n            ],\n            "daily": [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "trade_date": "20240117",\n                    "open": 12.30,\n                    "high": 12.80,\n                    "low": 12.20,\n                    "close": 12.50,\n                    "pct_chg": 2.5,\n                    "vol": 150000000,\n                }\n            ],\n            "stock_basic": [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "symbol": "000001",\n                    "name": "平安银行",\n                    "area": "深圳",\n                    "industry": "银行",\n                    "market": "主板",\n                    "list_date": "19910403",\n                }\n            ],\n        }\n\n        result = await service.extract_financial_factors(\n            "000001.SZ", "20240117", raw_data\n        )\n\n        # 验证财务因子提取结果\n        assert result["stock_code"] == "000001.SZ"\n        assert result["trade_date"] == "20240117"\n        assert result["pe_ratio"] == 15.0\n        assert result["pb_ratio"] == 2.0\n        assert result["ps_ratio"] == 3.0\n        assert result["dividend_yield"] == 2.5\n        assert result["close_price"] == 12.50\n        assert result["open_price"] == 12.30\n        assert result["high_price"] == 12.80\n        assert result["low_price"] == 12.20\n        assert result["price_change_pct"] == 2.5\n        assert result["volume"] == 150000000\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_calculate_super_financial_factors_with_edge_cases(\n        self, service\n    ):\n        """测试:超级财务因子计算边界情况"""\n        # 测试极端值情况\n        financial_factors = {\n            "pe_ratio": 0.0,  # 极端低值\n            "pb_ratio": 100.0,  # 极端高值\n            "ps_ratio": 0.0,\n            "dividend_yield": 0.0,\n        }\n\n        result = await service.calculate_super_financial_factors(financial_factors)\n\n        # 验证边界值处理\n        assert "value_score" in result\n        assert "growth_score" in result\n        assert "profitability_score" in result\n        assert "financial_health_score" in result\n        assert "overall_score" in result\n        assert "calculated_at" in result\n\n        # 验证评分范围\n        assert 0 <= result["value_score"] <= 100\n        assert 0 <= result["overall_score"] <= 100\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_database_connection_failure(self, service):\n        """测试:数据库连接失败的情况"""\n        # 当前DataPipelineService没有直接使用数据库,但为未来扩展预留\n        # 这个测试暂时跳过,当DataPipelineService添加数据库功能时再实现\n        pytest.skip("DataPipelineService当前不直接使用数据库,待未来扩展时实现此测试")\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_concurrent_api_calls(self, service):\n        """测试:并发API调用的情况"""\n        # 模拟多个并发API调用\n        mock_daily_basic = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "trade_date": "20240117",\n                    "close": 12.50,\n                    "pe": 15.0,\n                    "pb": 2.0,\n                    "ps": 3.0,\n                    "dv_ratio": 2.5,\n                    "turnover_rate": 1.5,\n                    "volume_ratio": 1.2,\n                    "total_mv": 1000000.0,\n                    "circ_mv": 900000.0,\n                }\n            ]\n        )\n\n        mock_daily = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "trade_date": "20240117",\n                    "open": 12.30,\n                    "high": 12.80,\n                    "low": 12.20,\n                    "close": 12.50,\n                    "pct_chg": 2.5,\n                    "vol": 150000000,\n                }\n            ]\n        )\n\n        mock_stock_basic = pd.DataFrame(\n            [\n                {\n                    "ts_code": "000001.SZ",\n                    "symbol": "000001",\n                    "name": "平安银行",\n                    "area": "深圳",\n                    "industry']
- **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

### 22. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/integration/backend/test_llm_gateway_io.py
- **规则**: 第4条：简单性优先
- **违规**: ['formed_json_response(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:LLM API返回格式错误的JSON的情况"""\n        # 模拟LLM API返回格式错误的JSON\n        malformed_json = \'{"analysis": "基于技术指标分析", "confidence": 0.85, "reasoning": "RSI指标显示超卖状态"\'  # 缺少闭合括号\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.return_value = malformed_json\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n            "context": "银行业整体表现良好",\n        }\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data)\n\n        # 验证系统能处理格式错误的JSON,返回默认结果\n        assert isinstance(result, AnalysisResult)\n        assert "基于000001.SZ的基本面分析" in result.analysis\n        assert result.confidence == 0.6\n        assert "无法解析模型响应" in result.reasoning\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_low_confidence_response(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:LLM API返回低置信度响应的情况"""\n        # 模拟LLM API返回低置信度响应\n        low_confidence_response = {\n            "analysis": "基于有限信息分析,该股票可能呈现上涨趋势",\n            "confidence": 0.3,  # 低置信度\n            "reasoning": "数据不足,分析结果仅供参考",\n        }\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.return_value = json.dumps(\n            low_confidence_response\n        )\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n            "context": "银行业整体表现良好",\n        }\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data)\n\n        # 验证系统能处理低置信度响应\n        assert isinstance(result, AnalysisResult)\n        assert result.analysis == low_confidence_response["analysis"]\n        assert result.confidence == 0.3\n        assert result.reasoning == low_confidence_response["reasoning"]\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_llm_provider_timeout_error(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:LLM提供商超时异常的情况"""\n        # 模拟LLM提供商抛出超时异常\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.side_effect = LlmProviderTimeoutError(\n            "请求超时"\n        )\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n            "context": "银行业整体表现良好",\n        }\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data)\n\n        assert "事实分析失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n        assert "请求超时" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_llm_provider_rate_limit_error(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:LLM提供商限流异常的情况"""\n        # 模拟LLM提供商抛出限流异常\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.side_effect = LlmProviderRateLimitError(\n            "请求频率过高"\n        )\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n            "context": "银行业整体表现良好",\n        }\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data)\n\n        assert "事实分析失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n        assert "请求频率过高" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_llm_provider_auth_error(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:LLM提供商认证异常的情况"""\n        # 模拟LLM提供商抛出认证异常\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.side_effect = LlmProviderAuthenticationError(\n            "API密钥无效"\n        )\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n            "context": "银行业整体表现良好",\n        }\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data)\n\n        assert "事实分析失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n        assert "API密钥无效" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_llm_provider_general_error(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:LLM提供商一般异常的情况"""\n        # 模拟LLM提供商抛出一般异常\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.side_effect = LlmProviderError("未知错误")\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n            "context": "银行业整体表现良好",\n        }\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data)\n\n        assert "事实分析失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n        assert "未知错误" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_sentiment_analysis_with_fallback(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:情感分析JSON解析失败时的回退逻辑"""\n        # 模拟LLM API返回无法解析的响应\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.return_value = "这不是一个有效的JSON响应"\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报,净利润同比增长15%,市场表现强劲",\n        }\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_sentiment(input_data)\n\n        # 验证回退逻辑被正确触发\n        assert isinstance(result, SentimentAnalysis)\n        assert result.sentiment == "positive"  # 包含"增长","强劲"等积极词汇\n        assert result.score > 0.5\n        assert "基于关键词的情感分析" in result.reasoning\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_negative_sentiment_analysis(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:负面情感分析的回退逻辑"""\n        # 模拟LLM API返回无法解析的响应\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.return_value = "这不是一个有效的JSON响应"\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报,净利润同比下降15%,市场表现疲软,存在风险",\n        }\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_sentiment(input_data)\n\n        # 验证负面情感分析\n        assert isinstance(result, SentimentAnalysis)\n        assert result.sentiment == "negative"  # 包含"下降","疲软","风险"等负面词汇\n        assert result.score < 0.5\n        assert "基于关键词的情感分析" in result.reasoning\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_retry_mechanism(self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider):\n        """测试:重试机制的正确性"""\n        # 模拟前两次调用失败,第三次成功\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.side_effect = [\n            LlmProviderError("第一次失败"),\n            LlmProviderError("第二次失败"),\n            json.dumps(\n                {\n                    "analysis": "重试成功后的分析结果",\n                    "confidence": 0.8,\n                    "reasoning": "经过重试后获得的分析",\n                }\n            ),\n        ]\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n        }\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_with_retry(\n            llm_service.analyze_fact, input_data, max_retries=3\n        )\n\n        # 验证重试机制工作正常\n        assert isinstance(result, AnalysisResult)\n        assert result.analysis == "重试成功后的分析结果"\n        assert result.confidence == 0.8\n        assert result.reasoning == "经过重试后获得的分析"\n\n        # 验证LLM提供商被调用了3次\n        assert mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.call_count == 3\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_retry_exhaustion(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:重试次数耗尽的情况"""\n        # 模拟所有重试都失败\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.side_effect = LlmProviderError("持续失败")\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n        }\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await llm_service.analyze_with_retry(\n                llm_service.analyze_fact, input_data, max_retries=3\n            )\n\n        assert "事实分析失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n        assert "持续失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n        # 验证LLM提供商被调用了3次\n        assert mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.call_count == 3\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_batch_analysis_with_mixed_results(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:批量分析混合结果的情况"""\n        # 模拟批量分析中部分成功,部分失败\n        mock_responses = [\n            json.dumps({"analysis": "分析1", "confidence": 0.8, "reasoning": "推理1"}),\n            LlmProviderError("分析2失败"),\n            json.dumps({"analysis": "分析3", "confidence": 0.7, "reasoning": "推理3"}),\n        ]\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.side_effect = mock_responses\n\n        batch_data = [\n            {"stock_code": "000001.SZ", "news_content": "新闻1"},\n            {"stock_code": "000002.SZ", "news_content": "新闻2"},\n            {"stock_code": "000003.SZ", "news_content": "新闻3"},\n        ]\n\n        results = await llm_service.batch_analyze_facts(batch_data)\n\n        # 验证批量分析结果\n        assert len(results) == 3\n        assert isinstance(results[0], AnalysisResult)\n        assert isinstance(\n            results[1], Exception\n        )  # 修改为Exception,因为LLMService会包装异常\n        assert isinstance(results[2], AnalysisResult)\n\n        # 验证成功的结果\n        assert results[0].analysis == "分析1"\n        assert results[0].confidence == 0.8\n        assert results[2].analysis == "分析3"\n        assert results[2].confidence == 0.7\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_concurrent_requests(\n        self, llm_service, mock_qwen_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:并发请求的情况"""\n        # 模拟并发请求\n        mock_qwen_provider.generate_text.return_value = json.dumps(\n            {"analysis": "并发分析结果", "confidence": 0.8, "reasoning": "并发推理过程"}\n        )\n\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "news_content": "平安银行发布2024年Q1财报",\n        }\n\n        # 并发执行多个分析请求\n        tasks = [\n            llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data),\n            llm_service.analyze_sentiment(input_data),\n            llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data),\n        ]\n\n        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)\n\n        # 验证所有请求都成功完成\n        assert len(results) == 3\n        for']
- **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

### 43. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/unit/backend/test_datapipeline_postgresql.py

# 步骤2: 提取财务因子\n        print("🔧 步骤2: 提取财务因子...")\n        start_time = datetime.now()\n\n        financial_factors = await service.extract_financial_factors(\n            stock_code, trade_date, raw_data\n        )\n\n        process_time = (datetime.now() - start_time).total_seconds()\n        print(f"✅ 财务因子提取完成,耗时: {process_time:.2f}秒")\n\n        # 展示财务因子数据\n        print("📊 财务因子数据:")\n {value}")\n        print()\n\n        # 步骤3: 计算超级财务因子\n        print("🧮 步骤3: 计算超级财务因子...")\n        start_time = datetime.now()\n\n        super_factors = await service.calculate_super_financial_factors(\n            financial_factors\n        )\n\n        calc_time = (datetime.now() - start_time).total_seconds()\n        print(f"✅ 超级财务因子计算完成,耗时: {calc_time:.2f}秒")\n\n        # 展示超级财务因子数据\n        print("🎯 超级财务因子数据:")\n        for key, value in super_factors.items():\n            if isinstance(value, float):\n                print(f"   {key}: {value:.4f}")\n            else:\n                print(f"   {key}: {value}")\n        print()\n\n        # 步骤4: 连接PostgreSQL数据库\n        print("🗄️ 步骤4: 连接PostgreSQL数据库...")\n        start_time = datetime.now()\n\n        try:\n            # 创建PostgreSQL连接\n            engine = create_engine(DATABASE_URL, echo=False)\n            Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)\n            session = Session()\n\n            # 创建表结构\n            session.execute(\n                text("""\n                CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS financial_factors (\n                    stock_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\n                    trade_date VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL,\n                    pe_ratio DECIMAL(10,4),\n                    pb_ratio DECIMAL(10,4),\n                    ps_ratio DECIMAL(10,4),\n                    dividend_yield DECIMAL(10,4),\n                    market_cap DECIMAL(20,4),\n                    turnover_rate DECIMAL(10,4),\n                    volume_ratio DECIMAL(10,4),\n financial_health_score = EXCLUDED.financial_health_score,\n                overall_score = EXCLUDED.overall_score,\n                calculated_at = EXCLUDED.calculated_at\n        """),\n            super_factors,\n        )\n\n        session.commit()\n        store_time = (datetime.now() - start_time).total_seconds()\n        print(f"✅ 数据存储到PostgreSQL完成,耗时: {store_time:.2f}秒")\n        print()\n\n        # 步骤6: 验证PostgreSQL中的数据\n        print("🔍 步骤6: 验证PostgreSQL中的数据...")\n\n        # 查询财务因子\n        result = session.execute(\n            text("""\n            SELECT stock_code, AND trade_date = :trade_date\n        """),\n            {"stock_code": stock_code, "trade_date": trade_date},\n        )\n\n        financial_result = result.fetchone()\n        if financial_result:\n            print("📊 PostgreSQL中的财务因子:")\n            print(f"   股票代码: {financial_result[0]}")\n            print(f"   交易日期: {financial_result[1]}")\n            print(f"   PE比率: {financial_result[8]:.4f}")\n        else:\n            print("❌ 财务因子数据未找到")\n\n        print()\n\n        # 查询超级财务因子\n        result = session.execute(\n            text("""\n            SELECT "PB比率不一致"\n            print("✅ 财务因子数据一致性验证通过")\n\n        # 验证超级财务因子一致性\n        if super_result:\n            assert super_result[0] == super_factors["stock_code"], "股票代码不一致"\n            assert      print("✅ 超级财务因子数据一致性验证通过")\n\n        session.close()\n\n        # 总结\n        total_time = api_time + process_time + calc_time + store_time\n        print("=" * 70)\n        print("🎉 DataPipeline PostgreSQL真实数据库测试完成！")\n        print(f"📊 测试股票: {stock_code}")\n        print(f"📅 测试日期: {trade_date}")\n        print("🗄️ 数据库: PostgreSQL")\n        print(f"⏱️ 总耗时: {total_time:.2f}秒")\n        print(f"   - API调用: {api_time:.2f}秒")\n        print(f"   - 数据处理: {process_time:.2f}秒")\n        print(f"   - 因子计算: {calc_time:.2f}秒")\n        print(f"   - 数据存储: {store_time:.2f}秒")\n ### 45. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/unit/backend/test_concurrency_control.py

所有重试失败,操作终止")\n\n        # 所有重试都失败了\n        await self._send_critical_alert(\n            f"{operation_name}重试失败", str(last_exception)\n        )\n        raise last_exception\n\n    async def _send_critical_alert(\n        self, title: str, message: str, trade_date: Optional[str] = None\n    ):\n        """发送告警"""\n        self.logger.critical(f"🚨 最高级别告警: {title} - {message}")\n        self.logger.info("告警已发送")\n\n\nclass TestConcurrencyControl:\n    """测试并发控制机制"""\n\n    @pytest.fixture\n    def mock_workflow(self):\n        """创建模拟的工作流实例"""\n        config = {\n            "concurrency": {\n                "max_db_connections": 3,\n                "max_llm_requests": 2,\n                "max_stock_processing": 5,\n            }\n        }\n        return MockMainWorkflow(config)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_green_phase_semaphore_limits_concurrency(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试信号量限制并发数量"""\n        # 创建多个并发任务\n        tasks = []\n        for i in range(10):  # 创建10个任务,但信号量限制为3\n            task = asyncio.create_task(\n                mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore(f"00000{i}", "2025-01-17")\n            )\n            tasks.append(task)\n\n        # 记录开始时间\n        start_time = datetime.now()\n        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)\n        end_time = datetime.now()\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert len(results) == 10\n        for i, result in enumerate(results):\n            assert result["stock_code"] == f"00000{i}"\n\n        # 验证并发控制(总时间应该明显大于0.1秒,因为信号量限制了并发)\n        execution_time = (end_time - start_time).total_seconds()\n        assert execution_time > 0.3  # 至少需要3个批次,每批次0.1秒\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_semaphore_logging(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试信号量日志记录"""\n        # 创建3个并发任务(正好等于信号量限制)\n        tasks = [\n            mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore("000001", "2025-01-17"),\n            mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore("000002", "2025-01-17"),\n            mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore("000003", "2025-01-17"),\n        ]\n\n        await asyncio.gather(*tasks)\n\n        # 验证日志调用\n        assert mock_workflow.logger.info.call_count >= 3  # 每个任务至少1次info调用\n        assert mock_workflow.logger.info.call_count <= 6  # 最多2次info调用\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_retry_wrapper_success_on_first_attempt(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试重试包装器第一次尝试成功"""\n\n        async def successful_operation():\n            return "success"\n\n        result = await mock_workflow._retry_wrapper(\n            successful_operation, retries=3, delay=0.01, operation_name="测试操作"\n        )\n\n        assert result == "success"\n        mock_workflow.logger.info.assert_called_with("测试操作 - 尝试 1/4")\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_retry_wrapper_success_on_retry(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试重试包装器重试后成功"""\n        attempt_count = 0\n\n        async def failing_then_successful_operation():\n            nonlocal attempt_count\n            attempt_count += 1\n            if attempt_count < 3:\n                raise Exception("临时失败")\n            return "success"\n\n        result = await mock_workflow._retry_wrapper(\n            failing_then_successful_operation,\n            retries=3,\n            delay=0.01,\n            operation_name="测试操作",\n        )\n\n        assert result == "success"\n        assert attempt_count == 3\n\n        # 验证日志调用\n        mock_workflow.logger.info.assert_any_call("测试操作 - 重试成功")\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_retry_wrapper_all_retries_fail(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试重试包装器所有重试都失败"""\n\n        async def always_failing_operation():\n            raise Exception("永久失败")\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await mock_workflow._retry_wrapper(\n                always_failing_operation,\n                retries=2,\n                delay=0.01,\n                operation_name="测试操作",\n            )\n\n        assert "永久失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n        # 验证告警被发送\n        mock_workflow.logger.critical.assert_called_with(\n            "🚨 最高级别告警: 测试操作重试失败 - 永久失败"\n        )\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_retry_wrapper_logging(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试重试包装器日志记录"""\n        attempt_count = 0\n\n        async def failing_operation():\n            nonlocal attempt_count\n            attempt_count += 1\n            if', 'for attempt in range(retries + 1):\n            try:\n                self.logger.info(f"{operation_name} - 尝试 {attempt + 1}/{retries + 1}")\n                result = await func(*args, **kwargs)\n                if attempt > 0:\n                    self.logger.info(f"{operation_name} - 重试成功")\n                return result\n\n            except Exception as e:\n                last_exception = e\n                self.logger.warning(f"{operation_name} - 尝试 {attempt + 1} 失败: {e}")\n\n                if attempt < retries:\n                    self.logger.info(f"{operation_name} - 等待 {delay} 秒后重试...")\n                    await asyncio.sleep(delay)\n                else:\n                    self.logger.critical(f"{operation_name} - 所有重试失败,操作终止")\n\n        # 所有重试都失败了\n        await self._send_critical_alert(\n            f"{operation_name}重试失败", str(last_exception)\n        )\n        raise last_exception\n\n    async def _send_critical_alert(\n        self, title: str, message: str, trade_date: Optional[str] = None\n    ):\n        """发送告警"""\n        self.logger.critical(f"🚨 最高级别告警: {title} - {message}")\n        self.logger.info("告警已发送")\n\n\nclass TestConcurrencyControl:\n    """测试并发控制机制"""\n\n    @pytest.fixture\n    def mock_workflow(self):\n        """创建模拟的工作流实例"""\n        config = {\n            "concurrency": {\n                "max_db_connections": 3,\n                "max_llm_requests": 2,\n                "max_stock_processing": 5,\n            }\n        }\n        return MockMainWorkflow(config)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_green_phase_semaphore_limits_concurrency(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试信号量限制并发数量"""\n        # 创建多个并发任务\n        tasks = []\n        for i in range(10):  # 创建10个任务,但信号量限制为3\n            task = asyncio.create_task(\n                mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore(f"00000{i}", "2025-01-17")\n            )\n            tasks.append(task)\n\n        # 记录开始时间\n        start_time = datetime.now()\n        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)\n        end_time = datetime.now()\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert len(results) == 10\n        for', 'try:\n                self.logger.info(\n                    f"加载股票数据: {stock_code} (并发控制: {self.db_semaphore._value})"\n                )\n\n                # 模拟数据库调用\n                await asyncio.sleep(0.1)  # 模拟数据库延迟\n\n                return {\n                    "stock_code": stock_code,\n                    "trade_date": trade_date,\n                    "financial_data": {"revenue": 1000},\n                    "price_data": {"close": 10.5},\n                }\n\n            except Exception as e:\n                self.logger.error(f"加载股票数据失败: {stock_code} - {e}")\n                raise QuantDataProviderError(\n                    f"加载股票数据失败: {stock_code} - {e}"\n                ) from e\n\n    async def _retry_wrapper(\n        self,\n        func,\n        *args,\n        retries: int = 3,\n        delay: int = 0.1,\n        operation_name: str = "操作",\n        **kwargs,\n    ):\n        """重试包装器"""\n        last_exception = None\n\n        for attempt in range(retries + 1):\n            try:\n                self.logger.info(f"{operation_name} - 尝试 {attempt + 1}/{retries + 1}")\n                result = await func(*args, **kwargs)\n                if attempt > 0:\n                    self.logger.info(f"{operation_name} - 重试成功")\n                return result\n\n            except Exception as e:\n                last_exception = e\n                self.logger.warning(f"{operation_name} - 尝试 {attempt + 1} 失败: {e}")\n\n                if attempt < retries:\n                    self.logger.info(f"{operation_name} - 等待 {delay} 秒后重试...")\n                    await asyncio.sleep(delay)\n                else:\n                    self.logger.critical(f"{operation_name} - 所有重试失败,操作终止")\n\n        # 所有重试都失败了\n        await self._send_critical_alert(\n            f"{operation_name}重试失败", str(last_exception)\n        )\n        raise last_exception\n\n    async def _send_critical_alert(\n        self, title: str, message: str, trade_date: Optional[str] = None\n    ):\n        """发送告警"""\n        self.logger.critical(f"🚨 最高级别告警: {title} - {message}")\n        self.logger.info("告警已发送")\n\n\nclass TestConcurrencyControl:\n    """测试并发控制机制"""\n\n    @pytest.fixture\n    def mock_workflow(self):\n        """创建模拟的工作流实例"""\n        config = {\n            "concurrency": {\n                "max_db_connections": 3,\n                "max_llm_requests": 2,\n                "max_stock_processing": 5,\n            }\n        }\n        return MockMainWorkflow(config)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_green_phase_semaphore_limits_concurrency(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试信号量限制并发数量"""\n        # 创建多个并发任务\n        tasks = []\n        for i in range(10):  # 创建10个任务,但信号量限制为3\n            task = asyncio.create_task(\n                mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore(f"00000{i}", "2025-01-17")\n            )\n            tasks.append(task)\n\n        # 记录开始时间\n        start_time = datetime.now()\n        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)\n        end_time = datetime.now()\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert len(results) == 10\n        for i, result in enumerate(results):\n            assert result["stock_code"] == f"00000{i}"\n\n        # 验证并发控制(总时间应该明显大于0.1秒,因为信号量限制了并发)\n        execution_time = (end_time - start_time).total_seconds()\n        assert execution_time > 0.3  # 至少需要3个批次,每批次0.1秒\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_semaphore_logging(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试信号量日志记录"""\n        # 创建3个并发任务(正好等于信号量限制)\n        tasks = [\n            mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore("000001", "2025-01-17"),\n            mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore("000002", "2025-01-17"),\n            mock_workflow._load_stock_data_with_semaphore("000003", "2025-01-17"),\n        ]\n\n        await asyncio.gather(*tasks)\n\n        # 验证日志调用\n        assert mock_workflow.logger.info.call_count >= 3  # 每个任务至少1次info调用\n        assert mock_workflow.logger.info.call_count <= 6  # 最多2次info调用\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_retry_wrapper_success_on_first_attempt(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试重试包装器第一次尝试成功"""\n\n        async def successful_operation():\n            return "success"\n\n        result = await mock_workflow._retry_wrapper(\n            successful_operation, retries=3, delay=0.01, operation_name="测试操作"\n        )\n\n        assert result == "success"\n        mock_workflow.logger.info.assert_called_with("测试操作 - 尝试 1/4")\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_retry_wrapper_success_on_retry(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试重试包装器重试后成功"""\n        attempt_count = 0\n\n        async def failing_then_successful_operation():\n            nonlocal attempt_count\n            attempt_count += 1\n            if attempt_count < 3:\n                raise Exception("临时失败")\n            return "success"\n\n        result = await mock_workflow._retry_wrapper(\n            failing_then_successful_operation,\n            retries=3,\n            delay=0.01,\n            operation_name="测试操作",\n        )\n\n        assert result == "success"\n        assert attempt_count == 3\n\n        # 验证日志调用\n        mock_workflow.logger.info.assert_any_call("测试操作 - 重试成功")\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_retry_wrapper_all_retries_fail(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试重试包装器所有重试都失败"""\n\n        async def always_failing_operation():\n            raise Exception("永久失败")\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await mock_workflow._retry_wrapper(\n                always_failing_operation,\n                retries=2,\n                delay=0.01,\n                operation_name="测试操作",\n            )\n\n        assert "永久失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n        # 验证告警被发送\n        mock_workflow.logger.critical.assert_called_with(\n            "🚨 最高级别告警: 测试操作重试失败 - 永久失败"\n        )\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_retry_wrapper_logging(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试重试包装器日志记录"""\n        attempt_count = 0\n\n        async def failing_operation():\n            nonlocal attempt_count\n            attempt_count += 1\n            if attempt_count < 2:\n                raise Exception("临时失败")\n            return "success"\n\n        await mock_workflow._retry']
- **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_default_score_rules_structure(self, config_data):\n        pass\n        """测试:默认评分规则结构"""\n        required_defaults = [\n            "growth_score_rules",\n            "profitability_score_rules",\n            "financial_health_score_rules",\n        ]\n\n        for rule_name in required_defaults:\n            assert rule_name in config_data, f"缺少{rule_name}"\n            assert "default" in config_data[rule_name], f"{rule_name}缺少default字段"\n            default_value = config_data[rule_name]["default"]\n            assert isinstance(\n                default_value, (int, float)\n            ), f"{rule_name}.default必须是数字"\n            assert 0 <= default_value <= 100, f"{rule_name}.default必须在0-100之间"\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_business_logic_consistency(self, config_data):\n        pass\n        """测试:业务逻辑一致性"""\n        # 测试PE规则:低PE应该得高分\n        pe_rules = config_data["value_score_rules"]["pe"]\n        low_pe_score = self._get_score_for_value(pe_rules, 5.0)  # 低PE\n        high_pe_score = self._get_score_for_value(pe_rules, 50.0)  # 高PE\n        assert low_pe_score > high_pe_score, "低PE应该得高分"\n\n        # 测试股息率规则:高股息率应该得高分\n        dividend_rules = config_data["value_score_rules"]["dividend_yield"]\n        high_dividend_score = self._get_score_for_value(dividend_rules, 6.0)  # 高股息率\n        low_dividend_score = self._get_score_for_value(dividend_rules, 0.5)  # 低股息率\n        assert high_dividend_score > low_dividend_score, "高股息率应该得高分"\n\n    def _validate_rules_continuity(self, rules, rule_name):\n        """验证规则连续性"""\n        if not rules:\n            pytest.fail(f"{rule_name}规则不能为空")\n\n        # 按最小值排序\n        sorted_rules = sorted(rules, key=lambda x: x[0])\n\n        # 检查是否有重叠\n        for i in range(len(sorted_rules) - 1):\n            current_max = sorted_rules[i][1]\n            next_min = sorted_rules[i + 1][0]\n            if current_max > next_min:\n                pytest.fail(\n                    f"{rule_name}规则存在重叠: [{sorted_rules[i][0]}, {current_max}) 与 [{next_min}, {sorted_rules[i + 1][1]})"\n                )\n\n        # 检查是否有间隙(警告,但不失败)\n        for i in range(len(sorted_rules) - 1):\n            current_max = sorted_rules[i][1]\n            next_min = sorted_rules[i + 1][0]\n            if current_max < next_min:\n                print(f"警告: {rule_name}规则存在间隙: [{current_max}, {next_min})")\n\n    def _validate_score_range(self, rules, rule_name):\n        """验证得分范围"""\n        for i, rule in enumerate(rules):\n            if len(rule) != 3:\n                pytest.fail(f"{rule_name}规则{i}格式错误,应为[min, max, score]")\n\n            _min_val, _max_val, score = rule\n            assert isinstance(score, (int, float)), f"{rule_name}规则{i}得分必须是数字"\n            assert 0 <= score <= 100, f"{rule_name}规则{i}得分必须在0-100之间"\n\n    def _validate_value_range(self, rules, rule_name, expected_min, expected_max):\n        """验证数值范围合理性"""\n        for i, rule in enumerate(rules):\n            min_val, max_val, _score = rule\n            assert isinstance(\n                min_val, (int, float)\n            ), f"{rule_name}规则{i}最小值必须是数字"\n            assert isinstance(\n                max_val, (int, float)\n            ), f"{rule_name}规则{i}最大值必须是数字"\n            assert min_val < max_val, f"{rule_name}规则{i}最小值必须小于最大值"\n\n            # 检查范围是否合理\n            if min_val < expected_min or max_val > expected_max:\n                print(\n                    f"警告: {rule_name}规则{i}范围[{min_val}, {max_val})可能超出合理范围[{expected_min}, {expected_max})"\n                )\n\n    def _get_score_for_value(self, rules, value):\n        """获取指定值的得分"""\n        for rule in rules:\n            min_val, max_val, score = rule\n            if min_val <= value < max_val:\n                return score\n        return rules[-1][2] if', 'for metric in required_metrics:\n            assert metric in value_rules, f"缺少{metric}评分规则"\n            assert isinstance(value_rules[metric], list), f"{metric}规则必须是列表"\n            assert len(value_rules[metric]) > 0, f"{metric}规则不能为空"\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_pe_rules_continuity(self, config_data):\n        pass\n        """测试:PE规则连续性"""\n        pe_rules = config_data["value_score_rules"]["pe"]\n        self._validate_rules_continuity(pe_rules, "PE")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_dividend_yield_rules_continuity(self, config_data):\n        pass\n        """测试:股息率规则连续性"""\n        dividend_rules = config_data["value_score_rules"]["dividend_yield"]\n        self._validate_rules_continuity(dividend_rules, "股息率")\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_default_score_rules_structure(self, config_data):\n        pass\n        """测试:默认评分规则结构"""\n        required_defaults = [\n            "growth_score_rules",\n            "profitability_score_rules",\n            "financial_health_score_rules",\n        ]\n\n        for rule_name in required_defaults:\n            assert rule_name in config_data, f"缺少{rule_name}"\n            assert "default" in config_data[rule_name], f"{rule_name}缺少default字段"\n            default_value = config_data[rule_name]["default"]\n            assert isinstance(\n                default_value, (int, float)\n            ), f"{rule_name}.default必须是数字"\n            assert 0 <= default_value <= 100, f"{rule_name}.default必须在0-100之间"\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_business_logic_consistency(self, config_data):\n        pass\n        """测试:业务逻辑一致性"""\n        # 测试PE规则:低PE应该得高分\n        pe_rules = config_data["value_score_rules"]["pe"]\n        low_pe_score = self._get_score_for_value(pe_rules, 5.0)  # 低PE\n        high_pe_score = self._get_score_for_value(pe_rules, 50.0)  # 高PE\n        assert low_pe_score > high_pe_score, "低PE应该得高分"\n\n        # 测试股息率规则:高股息率应该得高分\n        dividend_rules = config_data["value_score_rules"]["dividend_yield"]\n        high_dividend_score = self._get_score_for_value(dividend_rules, 6.0)  # 高股息率\n        low_dividend_score = self._get_score_for_value(dividend_rules, 0.5)  # 低股息率\n        assert high_dividend_score > low_dividend_score, "高股息率应该得高分"\n\n    def _validate_rules_continuity(self, rules, rule_name):\n        """验证规则连续性"""\n        if not rules:\n            pytest.fail(f"{rule_name}规则不能为空")\n\n        # 按最小值排序\n        sorted_rules = sorted(rules, key=lambda x: x[0])\n\n        # 检查是否有重叠\n        for i in range(len(sorted_rules) - 1):\n            current_max = sorted_rules[i][1]\n            next_min = sorted_rules[i + 1][0]\n            if current_max > next_min:\n                pytest.fail(\n                    f"{rule_name}规则存在重叠: [{sorted_rules[i][0]}, {current_max}) 与 [{next_min}, {sorted_rules[i + 1][1]})"\n                )\n\n        # 检查是否有间隙(警告,但不失败)\n        for i in range(len(sorted_rules) - 1):\n            current_max = sorted_rules[i][1]\n            next_min = sorted_rules[i + 1][0]\n            if current_max < next_min:\n                print(f"警告: {rule_name}规则存在间隙: [{current_max}, {next_min})")\n\n    def _validate_score_range(self, rules, rule_name):\n        """验证得分范围"""\n        for i, rule in enumerate(rules):\n            if len(rule) != 3:\n                pytest.fail(f"{rule_name}规则{i}格式错误,应为[min, max, score]")\n\n            _min_val, _max_val, score = rule\n            assert isinstance(score, (int, float)), f"{rule_name}规则{i}得分必须是数字"\n            assert 0 <= score <= 100, f"{rule_name}规则{i}得分必须在0-100之间"\n\n    def _validate_value_range(self, rules, rule_name, expected_min, expected_max):\n        """验证数值范围合理性"""\n        for i, rule in enumerate(rules):\n            min_val, max_val, _score = rule\n            assert isinstance(\n                min_val, (int, float)\n            ), f"{rule_name}规则{i}最小值必须是数字"\n            assert isinstance(\n                max_val, (int, float)\n            ), f"{rule_name}规则{i}最大值必须是数字"\n            assert min_val < max_val, f"{rule_name}规则{i}最小值必须小于最大值"\n\n            # 检查范围是否合理\n            if min_val < expected_min or max_val > expected_max:\n                print(\n                    f"警告: {rule_name}规则{i}范围[{min_val}, {max_val})可能超出合理范围[{expected_min}, {expected_max})"\n                )\n\n    def _get_score_for_value(self, rules, value):\n        """获取指定值的得分"""\n        for']

检查LLM服务\n            try:\n                await self._test_llm_connections()\n                health_status["checks"]["llm_services"] = "healthy"\n            except Exception as e:\n                health_status["checks"]["llm_services"] = f"unhealthy: {e}"\n                health_status["status"] = "unhealthy"\n\n            return health_status\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            return {\n                "status": "unhealthy",\n                "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n                "error": str(e),\n            }\n\n    async def _test_llm_connections(self):\n        """测试LLM连接"""\n        # 模拟LLM连接测试\n        await self.llm_service.test_connection()\n\n\nclass TestHealthCheck:\n    """测试健康检查方法"""\n\n    @pytest.fixture\n    def mock_workflow(self):\n        """创建模拟的工作流实例"""\n        config = {\n            "llm_service": {\n                "qwen": {"api_key": "test_key"},\n                "doubao": {"api_key": "test_key"},\n            }\n        }\n        return MockMainWorkflow(config)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_green_phase_health_check_all_healthy(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试所有服务都健康"""\n        # 模拟所有服务都正常\n        mock_workflow.db_manager.test_connection.return_value = None\n        mock_workflow.llm_service.test_connection.return_value = None\n\n        result = await mock_workflow.health_check()\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert result["status"] == "healthy"\n        assert "timestamp" in result\n        assert result["checks"]["database"] == "healthy"\n        assert result["checks"]["llm_services"] == "healthy"\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_health_check_database_unhealthy(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试数据库不健康"""\n        # 模拟数据库连接失败\n        mock_workflow.db_manager.test_connection.side_effect = Exception(\n            "数据库连接失败"\n        )\n        mock_workflow.llm_service.test_connection.return_value = None\n\n        result = await mock_workflow.health_check()\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert result["status"] == "unhealthy"\n        assert "数据库连接失败" in result["checks"]["database"]\n        assert result["checks"]["llm_services"] == "healthy"\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_health_check_llm_services_unhealthy(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试LLM服务不健康"""\n        # 模拟LLM服务连接失败\n        mock_workflow.db_manager.test_connection.return_value = None\n        mock_workflow.llm_service.test_connection.side_effect = Exception(\n            "LLM服务连接失败"\n        )\n\n        result = await mock_workflow.health_check()\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert result["status"] == "unhealthy"\n        assert result["checks"]["database"] == "healthy"\n        assert "LLM服务连接失败" in result["checks"]["llm_services"]\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_health_check_both_unhealthy(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试所有服务都不健康"""\n        # 模拟所有服务都失败\n        mock_workflow.db_manager.test_connection.side_effect = Exception(\n            "数据库连接失败"\n        )\n        mock_workflow.llm_service.test_connection.side_effect = Exception(\n            "LLM服务连接失败"\n        )\n\n        result = await mock_workflow.health_check()\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert result["status"] == "unhealthy"\n        assert "数据库连接失败" in result["checks"]["database"]\n        assert "LLM服务连接失败" in result["checks"]["llm_services"]\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_health_check_critical_error(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试健康检查本身出错"""\n        # 模拟数据库和LLM都失败,但健康检查本身正常处理\n        mock_workflow.db_manager.test_connection.side_effect = Exception(\n            "数据库连接失败"\n        )\n        mock_workflow.llm_service.test_connection.side_effect = Exception(\n            "LLM服务连接失败"\n        )\n\n        result = await mock_workflow.health_check()\n\n        # 验证结果 - 健康检查应该正常处理异常,返回unhealthy状态\n        assert result["status"] == "unhealthy"\n        assert "数据库连接失败" in result["checks"]["database"]\n        assert "LLM服务连接失败" in result["checks"]["llm_services"]\n        assert "timestamp" in result\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_health_check_timestamp_format(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试时间戳格式"""\n        mock_workflow.db_manager.test_connection.return_value = None\n        mock_workflow.llm_service.test_connection.return_value = None\n\n        result = await mock_workflow.health_check()\n\n        # 验证时间戳格式\n        timestamp = result["timestamp"]\n        # 应该能解析为ISO格式\n        parsed_time = datetime.fromisoformat(timestamp.replace("Z", "+00:00"))\n        assert isinstance(parsed_time, datetime)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_health_check_checks_structure(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试检查结果结构"""\n        mock_workflow.db_manager.test_connection.return_value = None\n        mock_workflow.llm_service.test_connection.return_value = None\n\n        result = await mock_workflow.health_check()\n\n        # 验证结构\n        assert "status" in result\n        assert "timestamp" in result\n        assert "checks" in result\n        assert isinstance(result["checks"], dict)\n        assert "database" in result["checks"]\n        assert "llm_services" in result["checks"]\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_health_check_database_exception_types(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试不同类型的数据库异常"""\n        # 测试不同类型的异常\n        exceptions = [\n            Exception("通用异常"),\n            ConnectionError("连接错误"),\n            TimeoutError("超时错误"),\n            ValueError("值错误"),\n        ]\n\n        for exc in exceptions:\n            mock_workflow.db_manager.test_connection.side_effect = exc\n            mock_workflow.llm_service.test_connection.return_value = None\n\n            result = await mock_workflow.health_check()\n\n            # 验证异常信息被正确记录\n            assert result["status"] == "unhealthy"\n            assert str(exc) in result["checks"]["database"]\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_health_check_llm_exception_types(self, mock_workflow):\n        """测试不同类型的LLM异常"""\n        # 测试不同类型的异常\n        exceptions = [\n            Exception("通用异常"),\n            ConnectionError("连接错误"),\n            TimeoutError("超时错误"),\n            ValueError("值错误"),\n        ]\n\n        for', 'try:\n            health_status = {\n                "status": "healthy",\n                "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n                "checks": {},\n            }\n\n            # 检查数据库连接\n            try:\n                await self.db_manager.test_connection()\n                health_status["checks"]["database"] = "healthy"\n            except Exception as e:\n                health_status["checks"]["database"] = f"unhealthy: {e}"\n                health_status["status"] = "unhealthy"\n\n            # 检查LLM服务\n            try']

TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n        \n        # 日志配置\n        assert hasattr(config, \'LOG_FILE_PATH\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_type_consistency(self):\n        pass\n        """测试配置类型一致性"""\n        config = get_settings()\n        \n        # 测试字符串类型\n        assert isinstance(config.APP_NAME, str)\n        assert isinstance(config.APP_VERSION, str)\n        assert isinstance(config.LOG_LEVEL, str)\n        assert isinstance(config.DATABASE_URL, str)\n        assert isinstance(config.REDIS_URL, str)\n        \n        # 测试布尔类型\n        assert isinstance(config.DEBUG, bool)  # TODO: 替换为具体的True/False断言\n        assert isinstance(config.DATABASE_ECHO, bool)  # TODO: 替换为具体的True/False断言\n        assert isinstance(config.MACRO_RISK_CALCULATION_ENABLED, bool)  # TODO: 替换为具体的True/False断言\n        assert isinstance(config.STYLE_ROTATION_CALCULATION_ENABLED, bool)  # TODO: 替换为具体的True/False断言\n        assert isinstance(config.ANOMALY_DETECTION_ENABLED, bool)  # TODO: 替换为具体的True/False断言\n        assert isinstance(config.HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, bool)  # TODO: 替换为具体的True/False断言\n        assert isinstance(config.NOTIFICATION_ENABLED, bool)  # TODO: 替换为具体的True/False断言\n        \n        # 测试数值类型\n        assert isinstance(config.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES, int)\n        assert isinstance(config.Z_SCORE_THRESHOLD, float)\n        assert isinstance(config.ROLLING_WINDOW_SIZE, int)\n        assert isinstance(config.ANOMALY_THRESHOLD, float)\n        assert isinstance(config.ANOMALY_DETECTION_INTERVAL, int)\n        assert isinstance(config.AUTO_ARBITRATION_THRESHOLD, float)\n        assert isinstance(config.CACHE_TTL, int)\n        assert isinstance(config.CACHE_MAX_SIZE, int)\n        \n        # 测试列表类型\n        assert isinstance(config.ALLOWED_HOSTS, list)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_edge_cases(self):\n        pass\n        """测试配置边界情况"""\n        # 测试空字符串环境变量\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\'DEBUG\': \'\'}):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            assert test_settings.DEBUG is False\n        \n        # 测试无效数值环境变量\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\'ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES\': \'invalid\'}):\n            with pytest.raises(ValueError):\n                Settings()\n        \n        # 测试无效浮点数环境变量\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\'Z_SCORE_THRESHOLD\': \'invalid\'}):\n            with pytest.raises(ValueError):\n                Settings()\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_import_error_handling(self):\n        pass\n        """测试配置导入错误处理"""\n        # 直接测试默认配置类的功能\n        # 模拟DefaultSettings类的行为\n        class DefaultSettings:\n            API_HOST = "0.0.0.0"\n            API_PORT = 8000\n            DEBUG = True\n            ALLOWED_HOSTS = ["*"]\n            LOG_LEVEL = "INFO"\n            LOG_FILE = "logs/backend.log"\n\n        _settings = DefaultSettings()\n        \n        # 验证默认配置的属性\n        assert hasattr(_settings, \'API_HOST\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n        assert hasattr(_settings, \'API_PORT\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n        assert hasattr(_settings, \'DEBUG\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n        assert hasattr(_settings, \'LOG_LEVEL\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n        assert hasattr(_settings, \'ALLOWED_HOSTS\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n        assert hasattr(_settings, \'LOG_FILE\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n        \n        # 验证默认值\n        assert _settings.API_HOST == "0.0.0.0"\n        assert _settings.API_PORT == 8000\n        assert _settings.DEBUG is True\n        assert _settings.ALLOWED_HOSTS == ["*"]\n        assert _settings.LOG_LEVEL == "INFO"\n        assert _settings.LOG_FILE == "logs/backend.log"\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_import_error_handling_lambda_functions(self):\n        pass\n        """测试导入错误处理中的lambda函数"""\n        # 测试get_settings lambda函数\n        class DefaultSettings:\n            API_HOST = "0.0.0.0"\n            API_PORT = 8000\n            DEBUG = True\n            ALLOWED_HOSTS = ["*"]\n            LOG_LEVEL = "INFO"\n            LOG_FILE = "logs/backend.log"\n\n        _settings = DefaultSettings()\n        get_settings = lambda: _settings\n        validate_critical_config = lambda: True\n        \n        # 测试get_settings函数\n        result = get_settings()\n        assert result is _settings\n        assert result.API_HOST == "0.0.0.0"\n        \n        # 测试validate_critical_config函数\n        result = validate_critical_config()\n        assert result is True\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_import_error_handling_settings_assignment(self):\n        pass\n        """测试导入错误处理中的settings赋值"""\n        # 测试settings变量赋值\n        class DefaultSettings:\n            API_HOST = "0.0.0.0"\n            API_PORT = 8000\n            DEBUG = True\n            ALLOWED_HOSTS = ["*"]\n            LOG_LEVEL = "INFO"\n            LOG_FILE = "logs/backend.log"\n\n        _settings = DefaultSettings()\n        settings = _settings\n        \n        # 验证settings变量\n        assert settings is _settings\n        assert settings.API_HOST == "0.0.0.0"\n        assert settings.API_PORT == 8000\n        assert settings.DEBUG is True\n        assert settings.ALLOWED_HOSTS == ["*"]\n        assert settings.LOG_LEVEL == "INFO"\n        assert settings.LOG_FILE == "logs/backend.log"\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_import_error_handling_module_level_execution(self):\n        pass\n        """测试导入错误处理在模块级别的执行"""\n        # 测试模块级别的try/except块逻辑\n        import sys\n        from pathlib import Path\n        \n        # 模拟项目根目录路径添加\n        project_root = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent.parent.parent\n        original_path = sys.path.copy()\n        \n        try:\n            # 模拟路径插入\n            sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))\n            assert str(project_root) in sys.path\n            \n            # 模拟导入失败的情况\n            try:\n                from config.settings import get_settings, settings, validate_critical_config\n                # 如果导入成功,测试导入的内容\n                assert callable(get_settings)\n                assert hasattr(settings, \'APP_NAME\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言\n                assert callable(validate_critical_config)\n            except ImportError:\n                # 模拟导入失败时的默认配置\n                class DefaultSettings:\n                    API_HOST = "0.0.0.0"\n                    API_PORT = 8000\n                    DEBUG = True\n                    ALLOWED_HOSTS = ["*"]\n                    LOG_LEVEL = "INFO"\n                    LOG_FILE = "logs/backend.log"\n\n                _settings = DefaultSettings()\n                settings = _settings\n                get_settings = lambda: _settings\n                validate_critical_config = lambda: True\n                \n                # 验证默认配置\n                assert settings.API_HOST == "0.0.0.0"\n                assert callable(get_settings)\n                assert callable(validate_critical_config)\n                \n        finally:\n            # 恢复原始路径\n            sys.path = original_path\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_module_exports(self):\n        pass\n        """测试配置模块导出"""\n        # 测试__all__导出\n        from core.config import __all__\n        expected_exports = ["get_settings", "settings", "validate_critical_config"]\n        \n        for export in expected_exports:\n            assert export in __all__\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_validation_error_handling(self):\n        pass\n        """测试配置验证错误处理"""\n        # 测试validate_critical_config函数的错误处理\n        with patch(\'builtins.print\') as mock_print:\n            # 模拟缺失关键配置的情况\n            with patch.dict(os.environ, {}, clear=True):\n                test_settings = Settings()\n                \n                # 模拟validate_critical_config函数\n                def mock_validate_critical_config():\n                    critical_vars = ["QWEN_API_KEY", "DOUBAO_API_KEY", "DATABASE_URL", "TUSHARE_TOKEN"]\n                    missing_vars = []\n                    for var in critical_vars:\n                        if not getattr(test_settings, var, None):\n                            missing_vars.append(var)\n                    \n                    if missing_vars:\n                        print(f"❌ 关键配置缺失: {\', \'.join(missing_vars)}")\n                        print("💡 请设置环境变量或检查.env文件")\n                        return False\n                    \n                    print("✅ 关键配置验证通过")\n                    return True\n                \n                result = mock_validate_critical_config()\n                assert result is False\n                assert mock_print.call_count >= 2\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_config_validation_success_message(self):\n        pass\n        """测试配置验证成功消息"""\n        with patch(\'builtins.print\') as mock_print:\n            # 模拟完整配置的情况\n            with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n                \'QWEN_API_KEY\': \'test-qwen-key\',\n                \'DOUBAO_API_KEY\': \'test-doubao-key\',\n                \'DATABASE_URL\': \'postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/testdb\',\n                \'TUSHARE_TOKEN\': \'test-tushare-token\'\n            }):\n                test_settings = Settings()\n                \n                # 模拟validate_critical_config函数\n                def mock_validate_critical_config():\n                    critical_vars = ["QWEN_API_KEY", "DOUBAO_API_KEY", "DATABASE_URL", "TUSHARE_TOKEN"]\n                    missing_vars = []\n                    for var in critical_vars:\n                        if not getattr(test_settings, var, None):\n                            missing_vars.append(var)\n                    \n                    if', 'for env_value, expected in test_cases:\n            with patch.dict(os.environ, {\'DEBUG\': env_value}):\n                test_settings = Settings()\n                assert test_settings.DEBUG == expected, f"Failed for DEBUG={env_value}"\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_numeric_environment_variables(self):\n        pass\n        """测试数值类型环境变量解析"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES\': \'60\',\n            \'Z_SCORE_THRESHOLD\': \'3.0\',\n            \'ROLLING_WINDOW_SIZE\': \'120\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES == 60\n            assert test_settings.Z_SCORE_THRESHOLD == 3.0\n            assert test_settings.ROLLING_WINDOW_SIZE == 120\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_list_environment_variables(self):\n        pass\n        """测试列表类型环境变量解析"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\'ALLOWED_HOSTS\': \'localhost,127.0.0.1,example.com\'}):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.ALLOWED_HOSTS == [\'localhost\', \'127.0.0.1\', \'example.com\']\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_list_environment_variables_default(self):\n        pass\n        """测试列表类型环境变量默认值"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {}, clear=True):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.ALLOWED_HOSTS == [\'*\']\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_database_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试数据库配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'DATABASE_URL\': \'postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/testdb\',\n            \'DATABASE_ECHO\': \'true\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.DATABASE_URL == \'postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/testdb\'\n            assert test_settings.DATABASE_ECHO is True\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_redis_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试Redis配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\'REDIS_URL\': \'redis://localhost:6379/1\'}):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.REDIS_URL == \'redis://localhost:6379/1\'\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_llm_api_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试LLM API配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'QWEN_API_KEY\': \'test-qwen-key\',\n            \'QWEN_BASE_URL\': \'https://test-qwen.com/api\',\n            \'QWEN_MODEL\': \'qwen-test\',\n            \'DOUBAO_API_KEY\': \'test-doubao-key\',\n            \'DOUBAO_BASE_URL\': \'https://test-doubao.com/api\',\n            \'DOUBAO_MODEL\': \'doubao-test\',\n            \'OPENAI_API_KEY\': \'test-openai-key\',\n            \'OPENAI_MODEL\': \'gpt-3.5-turbo\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.QWEN_API_KEY == \'test-qwen-key\'\n            assert test_settings.QWEN_BASE_URL == \'https://test-qwen.com/api\'\n            assert test_settings.QWEN_MODEL == \'qwen-test\'\n            assert test_settings.DOUBAO_API_KEY == \'test-doubao-key\'\n            assert test_settings.DOUBAO_BASE_URL == \'https://test-doubao.com/api\'\n            assert test_settings.DOUBAO_MODEL == \'doubao-test\'\n            assert test_settings.OPENAI_API_KEY == \'test-openai-key\'\n            assert test_settings.OPENAI_MODEL == \'gpt-3.5-turbo\'\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_tushare_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试Tushare配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'TUSHARE_TOKEN\': \'test-tushare-token\',\n            \'TUSHARE_BASE_URL\': \'https://test-tushare.com\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.TUSHARE_TOKEN == \'test-tushare-token\'\n            assert test_settings.TUSHARE_BASE_URL == \'https://test-tushare.com\'\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_security_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试安全配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'SECRET_KEY\': \'test-secret-key\',\n            \'ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES\': \'120\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.SECRET_KEY == \'test-secret-key\'\n            assert test_settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES == 120\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_quantitative_engine_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试量化引擎配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'Z_SCORE_THRESHOLD\': \'3.0\',\n            \'ROLLING_WINDOW_SIZE\': \'180\',\n            \'MACRO_RISK_CALCULATION_ENABLED\': \'false\',\n            \'STYLE_ROTATION_CALCULATION_ENABLED\': \'false\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.Z_SCORE_THRESHOLD == 3.0\n            assert test_settings.ROLLING_WINDOW_SIZE == 180\n            assert test_settings.MACRO_RISK_CALCULATION_ENABLED is False\n            assert test_settings.STYLE_ROTATION_CALCULATION_ENABLED is False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_anomaly_detection_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试异常检测配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'ANOMALY_DETECTION_ENABLED\': \'false\',\n            \'ANOMALY_THRESHOLD\': \'3.0\',\n            \'ANOMALY_DETECTION_INTERVAL\': \'600000\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.ANOMALY_DETECTION_ENABLED is False\n            assert test_settings.ANOMALY_THRESHOLD == 3.0\n            assert test_settings.ANOMALY_DETECTION_INTERVAL == 600000\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_arbitration_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试仲裁配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'AUTO_ARBITRATION_THRESHOLD\': \'0.9\',\n            \'HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED\': \'false\',\n            \'NOTIFICATION_ENABLED\': \'false\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.AUTO_ARBITRATION_THRESHOLD == 0.9\n            assert test_settings.HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED is False\n            assert test_settings.NOTIFICATION_ENABLED is False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_cache_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试缓存配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'CACHE_TTL\': \'600\',\n            \'CACHE_MAX_SIZE\': \'2000\'\n        }):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.CACHE_TTL == 600\n            assert test_settings.CACHE_MAX_SIZE == 2000\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_log_configuration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试日志配置"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\'LOG_FILE_PATH\': \'/tmp/test.log\'}):\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            assert test_settings.LOG_FILE_PATH == \'/tmp/test.log\'\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_validate_critical_config_success(self):\n        pass\n        """测试关键配置验证成功"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {\n            \'QWEN_API_KEY\': \'test-qwen-key\',\n            \'DOUBAO_API_KEY\': \'test-doubao-key\',\n            \'DATABASE_URL\': \'postgresql://test:test@localhost:5432/testdb\',\n            \'TUSHARE_TOKEN\': \'test-tushare-token\'\n        }):\n            # 重新创建配置实例\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            # 模拟validate_critical_config函数\n            def mock_validate_critical_config():\n                critical_vars = ["QWEN_API_KEY", "DOUBAO_API_KEY", "DATABASE_URL", "TUSHARE_TOKEN"]\n                missing_vars = []\n                for var in critical_vars:\n                    if not getattr(test_settings, var, None):\n                        missing_vars.append(var)\n                \n                if missing_vars:\n                    return False\n                return True\n            \n            result = mock_validate_critical_config()\n            assert result is True\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_validate_critical_config_failure(self):\n        pass\n        """测试关键配置验证失败"""\n        with patch.dict(os.environ, {}, clear=True):\n            # 重新创建配置实例\n            test_settings = Settings()\n            \n            # 模拟validate_critical_config函数\n            def mock_validate_critical_config():\n                critical_vars = ["QWEN_API_KEY", "DOUBAO_API_KEY", "DATABASE_URL", "TUSHARE_TOKEN"]\n                missing_vars = []\n                for var in critical_vars:\n                    if not getattr(test_settings, var, None):\n                        missing_vars.append(var)\n                \n                if missing_vars:\n                    return False\n                return True\n            \n            result = mock_validate_critical_config()\n            assert result is False\n\n    #
