### 90. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/unit/backend/contracts/test_suite_generator.py
- **规则**: 第4条：简单性优先
- **违规**: ['ification",\n            "get_concept_data",\n            "get_market_data",\n            "health_check",\n        ]\n\n        for method_name in required_methods:\n            assert hasattr(\n                self.data_source, method_name\n            ), f"缺少必需方法: {method_name}"\n            method = getattr(self.data_source, method_name)\n            assert callable(method), f"方法不可调用: {method_name}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_return_types(self) -> bool:\n        """测试返回类型是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试get_daily_quotes返回DataFrame\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, pd.DataFrame), "get_daily_quotes必须返回DataFrame"\n        except Exception:\n            pass  # 允许API调用失败,但返回类型必须正确\n\n        # 测试get_announcements返回List[Dict]\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_announcements("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "get_announcements必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], dict), "get_announcements的元素必须是Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_financial_data返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_financial_data("000001.SZ", "20241231")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_financial_data必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_industry_classification返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_industry_classification("000001.SZ")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_industry_classification必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_concept_data返回List[Dict]\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_concept_data("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "get_concept_data必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], dict), "get_concept_data的元素必须是Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_market_data返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_market_data("20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_market_data必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试health_check返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.health_check()\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "health_check必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_exception_handling(self) -> bool:\n        """测试异常处理是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试无效输入时抛出DataSourceError\n        try:\n            await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("INVALID_CODE", "INVALID_DATE")\n        except DataSourceError:\n            pass  # 期望的异常\n        except Exception as e:\n            # 其他异常也应该被包装为DataSourceError\n            assert isinstance(e, DataSourceError), f"异常类型错误: {type(e)}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_data_formats(self) -> bool:\n        """测试数据格式是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试get_daily_quotes的DataFrame格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            if not result.empty:\n                required_columns = [\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "trade_date",\n                    "open",\n                    "high",\n                    "low",\n                    "close",\n                    "volume",\n                    "amount",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_columns).issubset(\n                    result.columns\n                ), f"DataFrame缺少必需列: {required_columns}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_announcements的Dict格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_announcements("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            if result:\n                announcement = result[0]\n                required_keys = [\n                    "announcement_id",\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "title",\n                    "content",\n                    "publish_date",\n                    "announcement_type",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                    announcement.keys()\n                ), f"公告Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_financial_data的Dict格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_financial_data("000001.SZ", "20241231")\n            if result:\n                required_keys = [\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "report_date",\n                    "revenue",\n                    "net_profit",\n                    "total_assets",\n                    "total_liabilities",\n                    "roe",\n                    "roa",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                    result.keys()\n                ), f"财务数据Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_health_check(self) -> bool:\n        """测试健康检查格式"""\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.health_check()\n            required_keys = [\n                "status",\n                "response_time",\n                "last_success",\n                "error_count",\n                "rate_limit_remaining",\n            ]\n            assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                result.keys()\n            ), f"健康检查Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n\n            # 测试status值\n            assert result["status"] in [\n                "healthy",\n                "unhealthy",\n                "degraded",\n            ], f"无效的status值: {result[\'status\']}"\n\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n\nclass LlmProviderContractTester:\n    """\n    LLM提供商契约测试器 - 自动验证LlmProviderInterface实现是否符合契约\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, llm_provider: LlmProviderInterface):\n        """\n        初始化LLM提供商契约测试器\n\n        Args:\n            llm_provider: 实现了LlmProviderInterface的实例\n        """\n        self.llm_provider = llm_provider\n\n    async def run_all_contract_tests(self):\n        """运行所有契约测试"""\n        test_results = []\n\n        # 测试基本方法存在性\n        test_results.append(await self._test_method_existence())\n\n        # 测试返回类型\n        test_results.append(await self._test_return_types())\n\n        # 测试异常处理\n        test_results.append(await self._test_exception_handling())\n\n        # 测试健康检查\n        test_results.append(await self._test_health_check())\n\n        return all(test_results)\n\n    async def _test_method_existence(self) -> bool:\n        """测试所有必需方法是否存在"""\n        required_methods = [\n            "generate_text",\n            "chat_completion",\n            "generate_embeddings",\n            "analyze_sentiment",\n            "analyze_fact",\n            "batch_process",\n            "get_available_models",\n            "get_model_info",\n            "health_check",\n        ]\n\n        for method_name in required_methods:\n            assert hasattr(\n                self.llm_provider, method_name\n            ), f"缺少必需方法: {method_name}"\n            method = getattr(self.llm_provider, method_name)\n            assert callable(method), f"方法不可调用: {method_name}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_return_types(self) -> bool:\n        """测试返回类型是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试generate_text返回str\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.generate_text("测试", "qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, str), "generate_text必须返回str"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试chat_completion返回str\n        try:\n            messages = [{"role": "user", "content": "测试"}]\n            result = await self.llm_provider.chat_completion(messages, "qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, str), "chat_completion必须返回str"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试generate_embeddings返回List[List[float]]\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.generate_embeddings(\n                ["测试"], "text-embedding-v1"\n            )\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "generate_embeddings必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(\n                    result[0], list\n                ), "generate_embeddings的元素必须是List"\n                assert isinstance(result[0][0], (int, float)), "embedding元素必须是数字"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试analyze_sentiment返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.analyze_sentiment("测试文本", "qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "analyze_sentiment必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试analyze_fact返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.analyze_fact(\n                "测试文本", "测试上下文", "qwen-plus"\n            )\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "analyze_fact必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试batch_process返回List[Dict]\n        try:\n            requests = [{"id": "1", "type": "text_generation", "prompt": "测试"}]\n            result = await self.llm_provider.batch_process(requests, "qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "batch_process必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], dict), "batch_process的元素必须是Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_available_models返回List[str]\n        try:\n            result = self.llm_provider.get_available_models()\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "get_available_models必须返回List"\n            if', 'formats())\n\n        # 测试健康检查\n        test_results.append(await self._test_health_check())\n\n        return all(test_results)\n\n    async def _test_method_existence(self) -> bool:\n        """测试所有必需方法是否存在"""\n        required_methods = [\n            "get_daily_quotes",\n            "get_announcements",\n            "get_financial_data",\n            "get_industry_classification",\n            "get_concept_data",\n            "get_market_data",\n            "health_check",\n        ]\n\n        for method_name in required_methods:\n            assert hasattr(\n                self.data_source, method_name\n            ), f"缺少必需方法: {method_name}"\n            method = getattr(self.data_source, method_name)\n            assert callable(method), f"方法不可调用: {method_name}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_return_types(self) -> bool:\n        """测试返回类型是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试get_daily_quotes返回DataFrame\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, pd.DataFrame), "get_daily_quotes必须返回DataFrame"\n        except Exception:\n            pass  # 允许API调用失败,但返回类型必须正确\n\n        # 测试get_announcements返回List[Dict]\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_announcements("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "get_announcements必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], dict), "get_announcements的元素必须是Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_financial_data返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_financial_data("000001.SZ", "20241231")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_financial_data必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_industry_classification返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_industry_classification("000001.SZ")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_industry_classification必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_concept_data返回List[Dict]\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_concept_data("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "get_concept_data必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], dict), "get_concept_data的元素必须是Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_market_data返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_market_data("20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_market_data必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试health_check返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.health_check()\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "health_check必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_exception_handling(self) -> bool:\n        """测试异常处理是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试无效输入时抛出DataSourceError\n        try:\n            await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("INVALID_CODE", "INVALID_DATE")\n        except DataSourceError:\n            pass  # 期望的异常\n        except Exception as e:\n            # 其他异常也应该被包装为DataSourceError\n            assert isinstance(e, DataSourceError), f"异常类型错误: {type(e)}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_data_formats(self) -> bool:\n        """测试数据格式是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试get_daily_quotes的DataFrame格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            if not result.empty:\n                required_columns = [\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "trade_date",\n                    "open",\n                    "high",\n                    "low",\n                    "close",\n                    "volume",\n                    "amount",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_columns).issubset(\n                    result.columns\n                ), f"DataFrame缺少必需列: {required_columns}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_announcements的Dict格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_announcements("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            if result:\n                announcement = result[0]\n                required_keys = [\n                    "announcement_id",\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "title",\n                    "content",\n                    "publish_date",\n                    "announcement_type",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                    announcement.keys()\n                ), f"公告Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_financial_data的Dict格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_financial_data("000001.SZ", "20241231")\n            if result:\n                required_keys = [\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "report_date",\n                    "revenue",\n                    "net_profit",\n                    "total_assets",\n                    "total_liabilities",\n                    "roe",\n                    "roa",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                    result.keys()\n                ), f"财务数据Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_health_check(self) -> bool:\n        """测试健康检查格式"""\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.health_check()\n            required_keys = [\n                "status",\n                "response_time",\n                "last_success",\n                "error_count",\n                "rate_limit_remaining",\n            ]\n            assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                result.keys()\n            ), f"健康检查Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n\n            # 测试status值\n            assert result["status"] in [\n                "healthy",\n                "unhealthy",\n                "degraded",\n            ], f"无效的status值: {result[\'status\']}"\n\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n\nclass LlmProviderContractTester:\n    """\n    LLM提供商契约测试器 - 自动验证LlmProviderInterface实现是否符合契约\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, llm_provider: LlmProviderInterface):\n        """\n        初始化LLM提供商契约测试器\n\n        Args:\n            llm_provider: 实现了LlmProviderInterface的实例\n        """\n        self.llm_provider = llm_provider\n\n    async def run_all_contract_tests(self):\n        """运行所有契约测试"""\n        test_results = []\n\n        # 测试基本方法存在性\n        test_results.append(await self._test_method_existence())\n\n        # 测试返回类型\n        test_results.append(await self._test_return_types())\n\n        # 测试异常处理\n        test_results.append(await self._test_exception_handling())\n\n        # 测试健康检查\n        test_results.append(await self._test_health_check())\n\n        return all(test_results)\n\n    async def _test_method_existence(self) -> bool:\n        """测试所有必需方法是否存在"""\n        required_methods = [\n            "generate_text",\n            "chat_completion",\n            "generate_embeddings",\n            "analyze_sentiment",\n            "analyze_fact",\n            "batch_process",\n            "get_available_models",\n            "get_model_info",\n            "health_check",\n        ]\n\n        for', 'try_classification",\n            "get_concept_data",\n            "get_market_data",\n            "health_check",\n        ]\n\n        for method_name in required_methods:\n            assert hasattr(\n                self.data_source, method_name\n            ), f"缺少必需方法: {method_name}"\n            method = getattr(self.data_source, method_name)\n            assert callable(method), f"方法不可调用: {method_name}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_return_types(self) -> bool:\n        """测试返回类型是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试get_daily_quotes返回DataFrame\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, pd.DataFrame), "get_daily_quotes必须返回DataFrame"\n        except Exception:\n            pass  # 允许API调用失败,但返回类型必须正确\n\n        # 测试get_announcements返回List[Dict]\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_announcements("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "get_announcements必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], dict), "get_announcements的元素必须是Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_financial_data返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_financial_data("000001.SZ", "20241231")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_financial_data必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_industry_classification返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_industry_classification("000001.SZ")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_industry_classification必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_concept_data返回List[Dict]\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_concept_data("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "get_concept_data必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], dict), "get_concept_data的元素必须是Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_market_data返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_market_data("20250126")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_market_data必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试health_check返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.health_check()\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "health_check必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_exception_handling(self) -> bool:\n        """测试异常处理是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试无效输入时抛出DataSourceError\n        try:\n            await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("INVALID_CODE", "INVALID_DATE")\n        except DataSourceError:\n            pass  # 期望的异常\n        except Exception as e:\n            # 其他异常也应该被包装为DataSourceError\n            assert isinstance(e, DataSourceError), f"异常类型错误: {type(e)}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_data_formats(self) -> bool:\n        """测试数据格式是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试get_daily_quotes的DataFrame格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_daily_quotes("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            if not result.empty:\n                required_columns = [\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "trade_date",\n                    "open",\n                    "high",\n                    "low",\n                    "close",\n                    "volume",\n                    "amount",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_columns).issubset(\n                    result.columns\n                ), f"DataFrame缺少必需列: {required_columns}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_announcements的Dict格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_announcements("000001.SZ", "20250126")\n            if result:\n                announcement = result[0]\n                required_keys = [\n                    "announcement_id",\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "title",\n                    "content",\n                    "publish_date",\n                    "announcement_type",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                    announcement.keys()\n                ), f"公告Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_financial_data的Dict格式\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.get_financial_data("000001.SZ", "20241231")\n            if result:\n                required_keys = [\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "report_date",\n                    "revenue",\n                    "net_profit",\n                    "total_assets",\n                    "total_liabilities",\n                    "roe",\n                    "roa",\n                ]\n                assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                    result.keys()\n                ), f"财务数据Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_health_check(self) -> bool:\n        """测试健康检查格式"""\n        try:\n            result = await self.data_source.health_check()\n            required_keys = [\n                "status",\n                "response_time",\n                "last_success",\n                "error_count",\n                "rate_limit_remaining",\n            ]\n            assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                result.keys()\n            ), f"健康检查Dict缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n\n            # 测试status值\n            assert result["status"] in [\n                "healthy",\n                "unhealthy",\n                "degraded",\n            ], f"无效的status值: {result[\'status\']}"\n\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n\nclass LlmProviderContractTester:\n    """\n    LLM提供商契约测试器 - 自动验证LlmProviderInterface实现是否符合契约\n    """\n\n    def __init__(self, llm_provider: LlmProviderInterface):\n        """\n        初始化LLM提供商契约测试器\n\n        Args:\n            llm_provider: 实现了LlmProviderInterface的实例\n        """\n        self.llm_provider = llm_provider\n\n    async def run_all_contract_tests(self):\n        """运行所有契约测试"""\n        test_results = []\n\n        # 测试基本方法存在性\n        test_results.append(await self._test_method_existence())\n\n        # 测试返回类型\n        test_results.append(await self._test_return_types())\n\n        # 测试异常处理\n        test_results.append(await self._test_exception_handling())\n\n        # 测试健康检查\n        test_results.append(await self._test_health_check())\n\n        return all(test_results)\n\n    async def _test_method_existence(self) -> bool:\n        """测试所有必需方法是否存在"""\n        required_methods = [\n            "generate_text",\n            "chat_completion",\n            "generate_embeddings",\n            "analyze_sentiment",\n            "analyze_fact",\n            "batch_process",\n            "get_available_models",\n            "get_model_info",\n            "health_check",\n        ]\n\n        for method_name in required_methods:\n            assert hasattr(\n                self.llm_provider, method_name\n            ), f"缺少必需方法: {method_name}"\n            method = getattr(self.llm_provider, method_name)\n            assert callable(method), f"方法不可调用: {method_name}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_return_types(self) -> bool:\n        """测试返回类型是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试generate_text返回str\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.generate_text("测试", "qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, str), "generate_text必须返回str"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试chat_completion返回str\n        try:\n            messages = [{"role": "user", "content": "测试"}]\n            result = await self.llm_provider.chat_completion(messages, "qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, str), "chat_completion必须返回str"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试generate_embeddings返回List[List[float]]\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.generate_embeddings(\n                ["测试"], "text-embedding-v1"\n            )\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "generate_embeddings必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(\n                    result[0], list\n                ), "generate_embeddings的元素必须是List"\n                assert isinstance(result[0][0], (int, float)), "embedding元素必须是数字"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试analyze_sentiment返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.analyze_sentiment("测试文本", "qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "analyze_sentiment必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试analyze_fact返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.analyze_fact(\n                "测试文本", "测试上下文", "qwen-plus"\n            )\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "analyze_fact必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试batch_process返回List[Dict]\n        try:\n            requests = [{"id": "1", "type": "text_generation", "prompt": "测试"}]\n            result = await self.llm_provider.batch_process(requests, "qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "batch_process必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], dict), "batch_process的元素必须是Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_available_models返回List[str]\n        try:\n            result = self.llm_provider.get_available_models()\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "get_available_models必须返回List"\n            if result:\n                assert isinstance(result[0], str), "get_available_models的元素必须是str"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试get_model_info返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = self.llm_provider.get_model_info("qwen-plus")\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "get_model_info必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        # 测试health_check返回Dict\n        try:\n            result = await self.llm_provider.health_check()\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "health_check必须返回Dict"\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_exception_handling(self) -> bool:\n        """测试异常处理是否符合契约"""\n        # 测试无效输入时抛出LlmProviderError\n        try:\n            await self.llm_provider.generate_text("", "INVALID_MODEL")\n        except LlmProviderError:\n            pass  # 期望的异常\n        except Exception as e:\n            # 其他异常也应该被包装为LlmProviderError\n            assert isinstance(e, LlmProviderError), f"异常类型错误: {type(e)}"\n\n        return True\n\n    async def _test_health_check(self) -> bool:\n        """测试健康检查格式"""\n        try']

使用契约测试生成器验证QwenProvider\n        assert await run_llm_provider_contract_tests(\n            qwen_provider\n        ), "QwenProvider不符合LlmProviderInterface契约"\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_generate_text_contract(self, qwen_provider):\n        """测试generate_text方法契约"""\n        # 验证返回类型\n            assert isinstance(result, str), "必须返回str"\n            assert result == "这是生成的文本", "返回内容应该正确"\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑，拆分为多个简单测试\n    async def test_chat_completion_contract(self, qwen_provider):\n        """测试chat_completion方法契约"""\n        # Mock HTTP响应\n        mock_response = Mock()\n        mock_response.status_code = 200\n        mock_response.json.return_value = {\n            "output": {"text": "这是聊天回复"},\n            "usage": {"total_tokens": 50},\n        }\n\n        with patch.object(qwen_provider.client, "post", return_value=mock_response):\n            messages = [{"role": "user", "content": "测试消息"}]\n            result = await qwen_provider.chat_completion(messages, "qwen-plus")\n\n            # 验证返回类型\n            assert isinstance(result, str), "必须返回str"\n            assert result == "这是聊天回复", "返回内容应该正确"\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑，拆分为多个简单测试\n    async def test_generate_embeddings_contract(self, qwen_provider):\n        """测试generate_embeddings方法契约"""\n        # 验证返回类型\n            assert isinstance(result, list), "必须返回List"\n            assert len(result) == 2, "应该返回2个嵌入向量"\n            assert isinstance(result[0], list), "嵌入向量必须是List"\n            assert isinstance(result[0][0], (int, float)), "嵌入向量元素必须是数字"\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑，拆分为多个简单测试\n    async def test_analyze_sentiment_contract(self, qwen_provider):\n        """测试analyze_sentiment方法契约"""\n        # Mock generate_text响应\n        mock_sentiment_response = json.dumps(\n            {"sentiment": "positive", "score": 0.8, "reasoning": "基于关键词分析"}\n        )\n\n        with patch.object(\n            qwen_provider, "generate_text", return_value=mock_sentiment_response\n        ):\n            result = await qwen_provider.analyze_sentiment("测试文本", "qwen-plus")\n\n            # 验证返回类型\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "必须返回Dict"\n\n            # 验证必需键\n            required_keys = ["sentiment", "score", "reasoning"]\n            assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                result.keys()\n            ), f"缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n\n            # 验证返回类型\n            assert isinstance(result, dict), "必须返回Dict"\n\n            # 验证必需键\n            required_keys = ["analysis", "confidence", "reasoning", "fact_check"]\n            assert set(required_keys).issubset(\n                result.keys()\n            ), f"缺少必需键: {required_keys}"\n\n            # list[dict[str, Any]]:\n        """\n        扫描单个文件的违规行为\n\n        Args:\n            file_path: 文件路径\n            patterns: 违规模式列表\n\n        Returns:\n            违规列表\n        """\n        violations = []\n\n        try:\n            content = file_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")\n            lines = content.split("\\n")\n\n            for line_num, line in enumerate(lines, 1):\n                for pattern in patterns:\n                    if pattern in line:\n                        violations.append(\n                            {\n                                "file":       }\n                        )\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            violations.append(\n                {\n                    "file": str(file_path),\n                    "line": 0,\n                    "content": f"文件读取失败: {e!s}",\n                    "pattern": "file_read_error",\n                }\n            )\n\n        return violations\n\n    def _get_module_name(self, file_path: Path) -> str:\n        """获取模块名称"""\n        relative_path = file_path.relative_to(Path("."))\n        module_name = str(relative_path).replace("/", ".").replace("\\\\", ".")\n        if module_name.endswith(".py"):\n            module_name = module_name[:-3]\n        return module_name\n\n    def _extract_imports(self, file_path: Path) -> list[str]:\n        """提取文件中的导入语句"""\n        imports = []\n\n        try:\n            content = file_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")\n\n            # 使用简单的正则表达式提取导入\n            import re\n\n            import_patterns = [r"from\\s+([^\\s]+)\\s+import", r"import\\s+([^\\s]+)"]\n\n            for pattern in import_patterns:\n                matches = re.findall(pattern, content)\n                imports.extend(matches)\n\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n        return imports\n\n    def _detect_cycles(self, graph: dict[str, list[str]]) -> list[list[str]]:\n return\n\n            visited.add(node)\n            rec_stack.add(node)\n\n            for neighbor in graph.get(node, []):\n                if neighbor.startswith("src."):\n ### 95. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/unit/backend/scripts/test_v11_9_workflow_integration.py
