检查表是否存在\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT COUNT(*) as table_exists\n                    FROM information_schema.tables\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'generated_reports\'\n                """)\n                table_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if table_exists == 0:\n                    self.logger.error("generated_reports表不存在")\n                    return False\n\n                # 检查必需字段\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_comment\n                    FROM information_schema.columns\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'generated_reports\'\n                    AND column_name IN (\'source\', \'sentiment_score\', \'keywords\', \'entities\', \'summary\')\n                """)\n                columns = result.fetchall()\n\n                required_columns = {\n                    "source",\n                    "sentiment_score",\n                    "keywords",\n                    "entities",\n                    "summary",\n                }\n                actual_columns = {col[0] for col in columns}\n                missing_columns = required_columns - actual_columns\n\n                if missing_columns:\n                    self.logger.error(f"缺少必需字段: {missing_columns}")\n                    return False\n\n                # 检查source字段约束\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT constraint_name, check_clause\n                    FROM information_schema.check_constraints\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'generated_reports\'\n                    AND constraint_name LIKE \'%source%\'\n                """)\n                constraints = result.fetchall()\n\n                if not constraints:\n                    self.logger.warning("source字段约束未找到")\n\n                self.logger.info("generated_reports表修改验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试generated_reports表修改失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_arbitration_analysis_stats_table(self) -> bool:\n        pass\n        """\n        测试arbitration_analysis_stats表\n\n        Returns:\n            测试是否通过\n        """\n        try:\n            self.logger.info("测试arbitration_analysis_stats表...")\n\n            with self.db_manager.get_session() as session:\n                # 检查表是否存在\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT COUNT(*) as table_exists\n                    FROM information_schema.tables\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'arbitration_analysis_stats\'\n                """)\n                table_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if table_exists == 0:\n                    self.logger.error("arbitration_analysis_stats表不存在")\n                    return False\n\n                # 检查表结构\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_comment\n                    FROM information_schema.columns\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'arbitration_analysis_stats\'\n                    ORDER BY ordinal_position\n                """)\n                columns = result.fetchall()\n\n                required_columns = {\n                    "id",\n                    "trade_date",\n                    "total_cases",\n                    "pending_cases",\n                    "completed_cases",\n                    "ignored_cases",\n                    "avg_divergence_score",\n                    "avg_priority_score",\n                    "high_priority_cases",\n                    "medium_priority_cases",\n                    "low_priority_cases",\n                }\n\n                actual_columns = {col[0] for col in columns}\n                missing_columns = required_columns - actual_columns\n\n                if missing_columns:\n                    self.logger.error(f"缺少必需字段: {missing_columns}")\n                    return False\n\n                self.logger.info("arbitration_analysis_stats表验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(\n                f"测试arbitration_analysis_stats表失败: {e}", exc_info=True\n            )\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_views(self) -> bool:\n        pass\n        """\n        测试视图创建\n\n        Returns:\n            测试是否通过\n        """\n        try:\n            self.logger.info("测试视图创建...")\n\n            with self.db_manager.get_session() as session:\n                # 检查视图是否存在\n                views_to_check = [\n                    "v_high_priority_cases",\n                    "v_arbitration_cases_overview",\n                ]\n\n                for view_name in views_to_check:\n                    result = session.execute(\n                        """\n                        SELECT COUNT(*) as view_exists\n                        FROM information_schema.views\n                        WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                        AND table_name = %s\n                    """,\n                        (view_name,),\n                    )\n                    view_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                    if view_exists == 0:\n                        self.logger.error(f"视图{view_name}不存在")\n                        return False\n\n                self.logger.info("视图验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试视图失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_stored_procedures(self) -> bool:\n        pass\n        """\n        测试存储过程创建\n\n        Returns:\n            测试是否通过\n        """\n        try:\n            self.logger.info("测试存储过程创建...")\n\n            with self.db_manager.get_session() as session:\n                # 检查存储过程是否存在\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT COUNT(*) as proc_exists\n                    FROM information_schema.routines\n                    WHERE routine_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND routine_name = \'UpdateArbitrationDailyStats\'\n                    AND routine_type = \'PROCEDURE\'\n                """)\n                proc_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if proc_exists == 0:\n                    self.logger.error("存储过程UpdateArbitrationDailyStats不存在")\n                    return False\n\n                self.logger.info("存储过程验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试存储过程失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_sample_data_insertion(self) -> bool:\n        pass\n        """\n        测试示例数据插入\n\n        Returns:\n            测试是否通过\n        """\n        try:\n            self.logger.info("测试示例数据插入...")\n\n            with self.db_manager.get_session() as session:\n                # 检查示例数据是否存在\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT COUNT(*) as sample_count\n                    FROM arbitration_cases\n                    WHERE case_id = \'ARB_000001_20250117\'\n                """)\n                sample_count = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if sample_count == 0:\n                    self.logger.warning("示例数据未找到,但这不是错误")\n                else:\n                    self.logger.info("示例数据验证通过")\n\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试示例数据失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    def run_all_tests(self) -> bool:\n        """\n        运行所有测试\n\n        Returns:\n            所有测试是否通过\n        """\n        self.logger.info("=== 开始数据库迁移测试 ===")\n\n        tests = [\n            ("arbitration_cases表结构", self.test_arbitration_cases_table),\n            ("generated_reports表修改", self.test_generated_reports_modifications),\n            (\n                "arbitration_analysis_stats表",\n                self.test_arbitration_analysis_stats_table,\n            ),\n            ("视图创建", self.test_views),\n            ("存储过程创建", self.test_stored_procedures),\n            ("示例数据插入", self.test_sample_data_insertion),\n        ]\n\n        passed = 0\n        total = len(tests)\n\n        for test_name, test_func in tests:\n            self.logger.info(f"运行测试: {test_name}")\n            if test_func():\n                self.logger.info(f"✅ {test_name} - 通过")\n                passed += 1\n            else:\n                self.logger.error(f"❌ {test_name} - 失败")\n\n        self.logger.info(f"=== 测试完成: {passed}/{total} 通过 ===")\n        return passed == total\n\n\ndef main():\n    """\n    主函数\n    """\n    try:\n        # 加载配置\n        config = load_config("config/main_config.json")\n\n        # 创建测试器\n        tester = DatabaseMigrationTester(config)\n\n        # 运行测试\n        success = tester.run_all_tests()\n\n        if success:\n            print("✅ 所有数据库迁移测试通过")\n            sys.exit(0)\n        else:\n            print("❌ 部分数据库迁移测试失败")\n            sys.exit(1)\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f"❌ 数据库迁移测试执行失败: {e}")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n\nif', 'formation_schema.tables\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'arbitration_cases\'\n                """)\n                table_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if table_exists == 0:\n                    self.logger.error("arbitration_cases表不存在")\n                    return False\n\n                # 检查表结构\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default, column_comment\n                    FROM information_schema.columns\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'arbitration_cases\'\n                    ORDER BY ordinal_position\n                """)\n                columns = result.fetchall()\n\n                # 验证必需字段\n                required_columns = {\n                    "id",\n                    "case_id",\n                    "stock_code",\n                    "trade_date",\n                    "qwen_report_id",\n                    "doubao_report_id",\n                    "divergence_score",\n                    "sentiment_diff",\n                    "keyword_overlap",\n                    "entity_diff",\n                    "consensus_summary",\n                    "conflict_summary",\n                    "priority_score",\n                    "company_importance",\n                    "event_importance",\n                    "status",\n                    "created_at",\n                    "updated_at",\n                }\n\n                actual_columns = {col[0] for col in columns}\n                missing_columns = required_columns - actual_columns\n\n                if missing_columns:\n                    self.logger.error(f"缺少必需字段: {missing_columns}")\n                    return False\n\n                # 检查索引\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT index_name, column_name\n                    FROM information_schema.statistics\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'arbitration_cases\'\n                    ORDER BY index_name, seq_in_index\n                """)\n                indexes = result.fetchall()\n\n                # 验证必需索引\n                required_indexes = {\n                    "idx_case_id",\n                    "idx_stock_date",\n                    "idx_status",\n                    "idx_priority_score",\n                }\n                actual_indexes = {idx[0] for idx in indexes}\n                missing_indexes = required_indexes - actual_indexes\n\n                if missing_indexes:\n                    self.logger.error(f"缺少必需索引: {missing_indexes}")\n                    return False\n\n                self.logger.info("arbitration_cases表结构验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试arbitration_cases表失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_generated_reports_modifications(self) -> bool:\n        pass\n        """\n        测试generated_reports表修改\n\n        Returns:\n            测试是否通过\n        """\n        try:\n            self.logger.info("测试generated_reports表修改...")\n\n            with self.db_manager.get_session() as session:\n                # 检查表是否存在\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT COUNT(*) as table_exists\n                    FROM information_schema.tables\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'generated_reports\'\n                """)\n                table_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if table_exists == 0:\n                    self.logger.error("generated_reports表不存在")\n                    return False\n\n                # 检查必需字段\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_comment\n                    FROM information_schema.columns\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'generated_reports\'\n                    AND column_name IN (\'source\', \'sentiment_score\', \'keywords\', \'entities\', \'summary\')\n                """)\n                columns = result.fetchall()\n\n                required_columns = {\n                    "source",\n                    "sentiment_score",\n                    "keywords",\n                    "entities",\n                    "summary",\n                }\n                actual_columns = {col[0] for col in columns}\n                missing_columns = required_columns - actual_columns\n\n                if missing_columns:\n                    self.logger.error(f"缺少必需字段: {missing_columns}")\n                    return False\n\n                # 检查source字段约束\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT constraint_name, check_clause\n                    FROM information_schema.check_constraints\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'generated_reports\'\n                    AND constraint_name LIKE \'%source%\'\n                """)\n                constraints = result.fetchall()\n\n                if not constraints:\n                    self.logger.warning("source字段约束未找到")\n\n                self.logger.info("generated_reports表修改验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试generated_reports表修改失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    # 检查表是否存在\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT COUNT(*) as table_exists\n                    FROM information_schema.tables\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'arbitration_analysis_stats\'\n                """)\n                table_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if table_exists == 0:\n                    self.logger.error("arbitration_analysis_stats表不存在")\n                    return False\n\n                # 检查表结构\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_comment\n                    FROM information_schema.columns\n                    WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND table_name = \'arbitration_analysis_stats\'\n                    ORDER BY ordinal_position\n                """)\n                columns = result.fetchall()\n\n                required_columns = {\n                    "id",\n                    "trade_date",\n                    "total_cases",\n                    "pending_cases",\n                    "completed_cases",\n                    "ignored_cases",\n                    "avg_divergence_score",\n                    "avg_priority_score",\n                    "high_priority_cases",\n                    "medium_priority_cases",\n                    "low_priority_cases",\n                }\n\n                actual_columns = {col[0] for col in columns}\n                missing_columns = required_columns - actual_columns\n\n                if missing_columns:\n                    self.logger.error(f"缺少必需字段: {missing_columns}")\n                    return False\n\n                self.logger.info("arbitration_analysis_stats表验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(\n                f"测试arbitration_analysis_stats表失败: {e}", exc_info=True\n            )\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_views(self) -> bool:\n        pass\n        """\n        测试视图创建\n\n        Returns:\n            测试是否通过\n        """\n        try:\n            self.logger.info("测试视图创建...")\n\n            with self.db_manager.get_session() as session:\n                # 检查视图是否存在\n                views_to_check = [\n                    "v_high_priority_cases",\n                    "v_arbitration_cases_overview",\n                ]\n\n                for view_name in views_to_check:\n                    result = session.execute(\n                        """\n                        SELECT COUNT(*) as view_exists\n                        FROM information_schema.views\n                        WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()\n                        AND table_name = %s\n                    """,\n                        (view_name,),\n                    )\n                    view_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                    if view_exists == 0:\n                        self.logger.error(f"视图{view_name}不存在")\n                        return False\n\n                self.logger.info("视图验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试视图失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    # 检查存储过程是否存在\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT COUNT(*) as proc_exists\n                    FROM information_schema.routines\n                    WHERE routine_schema = DATABASE()\n                    AND routine_name = \'UpdateArbitrationDailyStats\'\n                    AND routine_type = \'PROCEDURE\'\n                """)\n                proc_exists = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if proc_exists == 0:\n                    self.logger.error("存储过程UpdateArbitrationDailyStats不存在")\n                    return False\n\n                self.logger.info("存储过程验证通过")\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试存储过程失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    # 检查示例数据是否存在\n                result = session.execute("""\n                    SELECT COUNT(*) as sample_count\n                    FROM arbitration_cases\n                    WHERE case_id = \'ARB_000001_20250117\'\n                """)\n                sample_count = result.fetchone()[0]\n\n                if sample_count == 0:\n                    self.logger.warning("示例数据未找到,但这不是错误")\n                else:\n                    self.logger.info("示例数据验证通过")\n\n                return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f"测试示例数据失败: {e}", exc_info=True)\n            return False\n\n    def run_all_tests(self) -> bool:\n        """\n        运行所有测试\n\n        Returns:\n            所有测试是否通过\n        """\n        self.logger.info("=== 开始数据库迁移测试 ===")\n\n        tests = [\n            ("arbitration_cases表结构", self.test_arbitration_cases_table),\n            ("generated_reports表修改", self.test_generated_reports_modifications),\n            (\n                "arbitration_analysis_stats表",\n                self.test_arbitration_analysis_stats_table,\n            ),\n            ("视图创建", self.test_views),\n            ("存储过程创建", self.test_stored_procedures),\n            ("示例数据插入", self.test_sample_data_insertion),\n        ]\n\n        passed = 0\n        total = len(tests)\n\n        for test_name, test_func in tests:\n            self.logger.info(f"运行测试: {test_name}")\n            if test_func():\n                self.logger.info(f"✅ {test_name} - 通过")\n                passed += 1\n            else:\n                self.logger.error(f"❌ {test_name} - 失败")\n\n        self.logger.info(f"=== 测试完成: {passed}/{total} 通过 ===")\n        return passed == total\n\n\ndef main():\n    """\n    主函数\n    """\n    try']

模拟配置\n        mock_config = {\n            "database": {"database_url": "test_url"},\n            "data_pipeline": {"test": True},\n            "quant_engine": {"test": True},\n            "anomaly_thresholds": {"test": True},\n        }\n\n        # 创建工作流实例\n            workflow = MainWorkflow()\n\n            # 验证仲裁预处理器已初始化\n            assert hasattr(workflow, \'arbitration_preprocessor\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "仲裁预处理器未初始化"\n\n        print("✅ 工作流初始化测试通过")\n        return True\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f"❌ 工作流初始化测试失败: {e}")\n        return False\n\n\n# TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_arbitration_preprocessing_method():\n        pass\n    """测试仲裁预处理方法"""\n    try:\n        print("测试仲裁预处理方法...")\n\n        # 模拟配置\n        mock_config = {\n            "database": {"database_url": "test_url"},\n            "data_pipeline": {"test": True},\n            "quant_engine": {"test": True},\n            "anomaly_thresholds": {"test": True},\n        }\n\n        import unittest.mock as mock\n\n        with mock.patch("main_workflow.DatabaseManager"), mock.patch(\n            "main_workflow.DataPipeline"\n        ), mock.patch("main_workflow.QuantSignalEngine"), mock.patch(\n            "main_workflow.QwenFactAnalyzer"\n        ), mock.patch("main_workflow.DoubaoSentimentAnalyzer"), mock.patch(\n            "main_workflow.ArbitrationPreprocessor"\n        ) as mock_arbitration, mock.patch(\n            "main_workflow.load_config", return_value=mock_config\n        ):\n            # 设置模拟返回值\n            mock_arbitration.return_value.process_daily_arbitration_cases.return_value = {\n                "status": "success",\n                "processed_count": 2,\n                "failed_count": 0,\n            }\n\n            from main_workflow import MainWorkflow\n\n            workflow = MainWorkflow()\n\n            # 测试仲裁预处理方法\n            result = workflow._execute_arbitration_preprocessing("2025-01-17")\n\n            # 验证结果\n            assert result["status"] == "success", f"期望success,得到{result[\'status\']}"\n            assert (\n                result["processed_count"] == 2\n            ), f"期望2,得到{result[\'processed_count\']}"\n\n        print("✅ 仲裁预处理方法测试通过")\n        return True\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f"❌ 仲裁预处理方法测试失败: {e}")\n        return False\n\n\n# TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_report_saving_enhancement():\n        pass\n    """测试报告保存增强功能"""\n    try']

初始化归因监控器\n            self.attribution_monitor = AttributionMonitor()\n\n            logger.info("✅ AttributionEngine测试环境初始化完成")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"❌ AttributionEngine测试环境初始化失败: {e}")\n            return False\n\n    def cleanup(self):\n        """清理测试环境"""\n        try:\n            if self.db_conn:\n                self.db_conn.close()\n\n            logger.info("🧹 AttributionEngine测试环境清理完成")\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"❌ 清理测试环境失败: {e}")\n\n    def log_test_result(self, test_name: str, passed: bool, details: str = ""):\n        """记录测试结果"""\n        self.test_results["total_tests"] += 1\n        if passed:\n            self.test_results["passed_tests"] += 1\n            logger.info(f"✅ {test_name}: 通过")\n        else:\n            self.test_results["failed_tests"] += 1\n            logger.error(f"❌ {test_name}: 失败 - {details}")\n\n        self.test_results["test_details"].append(\n            {\n                "test_name": test_name,\n                "passed": passed,\n                "details": details,\n                "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n            }\n        )\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_rule_engine(self):\n        pass\n        """测试规则引擎功能"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试规则引擎功能...")\n\n            if self.rule_engine is None:\n                self.log_test_result("规则引擎", False, "规则引擎未初始化")\n                return False\n\n            # 创建测试事件数据\n            test_event_data = {\n                "code": "000001.SZ",\n                "price_change": 0.15,\n                "volume_ratio": 2.5,\n                "market_cap": 1000000000,\n                "sector": "银行",\n                "event_type": "earnings_announcement",\n            }\n\n            # 执行规则检查\n            attribution_result = self.rule_engine.execute_attribution_rules(\n                test_event_data\n            )\n\n            # 验证结果\n            if attribution_result is not None:\n                assert "attribution_label" in attribution_result, "结果应包含归因标签"\n                assert "rule_id" in attribution_result, "结果应包含规则ID"\n                assert "confidence" in attribution_result, "结果应包含置信度"\n                assert "priority" in attribution_result, "结果应包含优先级"\n                assert "cost_tier" in attribution_result, "结果应包含成本层级"\n\n            # 检查统计信息\n            stats = self.rule_engine.stats\n            assert "total_processed" in stats, "统计应包含总处理数"\n            assert "rules_matched" in stats, "统计应包含规则匹配数"\n            assert "auto_attributed" in stats, "统计应包含自动归因数"\n\n            self.log_test_result(\n                "规则引擎", True, f"处理了{stats[\'total_processed\']}个事件"\n            )\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("规则引擎", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # 测试指标记录\n            self.attribution_monitor.record_daily_metrics(test_metrics)\n\n            # 测试指标查询\n            recent_metrics = self.attribution_monitor.get_metrics_summary(days=7)\n            assert recent_metrics is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能获取最近指标"\n\n            # 测试性能仪表盘\n            performance_dashboard = self.attribution_monitor.get_performance_dashboard(\n                days=7\n            )\n            assert performance_dashboard is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能获取性能仪表盘"\n\n            self.log_test_result("归因监控", True, "监控功能正常")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("归因监控", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_database_integration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试数据库集成"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试数据库集成...")\n\n            # 测试数据库连接\n            cursor = self.db_conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)\n\n            # 查询测试数据\n            cursor.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM daily_prices LIMIT 1")\n            result = cursor.fetchone()\n            assert result is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能查询数据库"\n\n            # 查询归因相关表\n            cursor.execute("""\n                SELECT table_name\n                FROM information_schema.tables\n                WHERE table_schema = \'public\'\n                AND table_name LIKE \'%attribution%\' OR table_name LIKE \'%anomaly%\'\n            """)\n            tables = cursor.fetchall()\n\n            cursor.close()\n\n            self.log_test_result("数据库集成", True, f"找到{len(tables)}个相关表")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("数据库集成", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_attribution_analysis(self):\n        pass\n        """测试归因分析功能"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试归因分析功能...")\n\n            # 获取测试股票数据\n            cursor = self.db_conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)\n            cursor.execute("""\n                SELECT ts_code, trade_date, close, pct_chg, vol, amount\n                FROM daily_prices\n                WHERE trade_date >= \'2024-01-01\'\n                AND pct_chg > 5.0\n                LIMIT 5\n            """)\n            test_stocks = cursor.fetchall()\n            cursor.close()\n\n            if not test_stocks:\n                self.log_test_result("归因分析", False, "无测试股票数据")\n                return False\n\n            # 模拟归因分析\n            for stock in test_stocks:\n                # 创建事件数据\n                event_data = {\n                    "code": stock["ts_code"],\n                    "date": stock["trade_date"],\n                    "price_change": stock["pct_chg"],\n                    "volume": stock["vol"],\n                    "amount": stock["amount"],\n                    "event_type": "price_movement",\n                }\n\n                # 执行规则引擎分析\n                if self.rule_engine:\n                    attribution_result = self.rule_engine.execute_attribution_rules(\n                        event_data\n                    )\n                    if attribution_result:\n                        logger.info(\n                            f"股票 {stock[\'ts_code\']} 归因结果: {attribution_result[\'attribution_label\']}"\n                        )\n\n            self.log_test_result(\n                "归因分析", True, f"分析了{len(test_stocks)}个股票事件"\n            )\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("归因分析", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_performance_metrics(self):\n        pass\n        """测试性能指标"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试性能指标...")\n\n            # 测试规则引擎统计\n            if self.rule_engine:\n                stats = self.rule_engine.stats\n                assert "total_processed" in stats, "应包含总处理数"\n                assert "rules_matched" in stats, "应包含规则匹配数"\n                assert "auto_attributed" in stats, "应包含自动归因数"\n                assert "processing_times" in stats, "应包含处理时间列表"\n\n                # 计算平均处理时间\n                if stats["processing_times"]:\n                    avg_time = sum(stats["processing_times"]) / len(\n                        stats["processing_times"]\n                    )\n                    logger.info(f"平均处理时间: {avg_time:.2f}ms")\n\n            # 测试归因监控统计\n            monitor_stats = self.attribution_monitor.get_metrics_summary(days=7)\n            assert monitor_stats is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能获取监控统计"\n\n            self.log_test_result("性能指标", True, "性能指标正常")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("性能指标", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    def get_test_stocks(self) -> List[str]:\n        """获取测试股票列表"""\n        try:\n            cursor = self.db_conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)\n            cursor.execute("""\n                SELECT DISTINCT ts_code\n                FROM daily_prices\n                WHERE trade_date >= \'2024-01-01\'\n                LIMIT 5\n            """)\n            result = cursor.fetchall()\n            cursor.close()\n            return [row["ts_code"] for row in result] if result else []\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"获取测试股票失败: {e}")\n            return []\n\n    def run_all_tests(self):\n        """运行所有测试"""\n        logger.info("🚀 开始AttributionEngine全面测试...")\n\n        # 初始化测试环境\n        if not self.setup():\n            logger.error("❌ 测试环境初始化失败,退出测试")\n            return False\n\n        try:\n            # 运行各项测试\n            self.test_engine_initialization()\n            self.test_rule_engine()\n            self.test_attribution_monitor()\n            self.test_database_integration()\n            self.test_attribution_analysis()\n            self.test_performance_metrics()\n\n            # 输出测试结果\n            self.print_test_summary()\n\n            return self.test_results["failed_tests"] == 0\n\n        finally:\n            self.cleanup()\n\n    def print_test_summary(self):\n        """打印测试总结"""\n        logger.info("\\n" + "=" * 60)\n        logger.info("📊 AttributionEngine测试结果总结")\n        logger.info("=" * 60)\n\n        total = self.test_results["total_tests"]\n        passed = self.test_results["passed_tests"]\n        failed = self.test_results["failed_tests"]\n\n        logger.info(f"总测试数: {total}")\n        logger.info(f"通过测试: {passed} ✅")\n        logger.info(f"失败测试: {failed} ❌")\n        logger.info(f"成功率: {(passed/total*100):.1f}%" if total > 0 else "成功率: 0%")\n\n        if failed > 0:\n            logger.info("\\n❌ 失败的测试:")\n            for test in self.test_results["test_details"]:\n                if not test["passed"]:\n                    logger.info(f"  - {test[\'test_name\']}: {test[\'details\']}")\n\n        logger.info("=" * 60)\n\n\ndef main():\n    """主函数"""\n    tester = AttributionEngineTester()\n    success = tester.run_all_tests()\n\n    if success:\n        logger.info("🎉 AttributionEngine测试全部通过！")\n        sys.exit(0)\n    else:\n        logger.error("💥 AttributionEngine测试存在失败项！")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n\nif', 'format(),\n            }\n        )\n\n    # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "规则引擎应包含配置"\n                assert hasattr(self.rule_engine, \'stats\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "规则引擎应包含统计信息"\n\n            # 检查归因监控器\n            assert self.attribution_monitor is not None, "归因监控器未初始化"\n\n            self.log_test_result("引擎初始化", True, "所有组件正常初始化")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("引擎初始化", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # 创建测试事件数据\n            test_event_data = {\n                "code": "000001.SZ",\n                "price_change": 0.15,\n                "volume_ratio": 2.5,\n                "market_cap": 1000000000,\n                "sector": "银行",\n                "event_type": "earnings_announcement",\n            }\n\n            # 执行规则检查\n            attribution_result = self.rule_engine.execute_attribution_rules(\n                test_event_data\n            )\n\n            # 验证结果\n            if attribution_result is not None:\n                assert "attribution_label" in attribution_result, "结果应包含归因标签"\n                assert "rule_id" in attribution_result, "结果应包含规则ID"\n                assert "confidence" in attribution_result, "结果应包含置信度"\n                assert "priority" in attribution_result, "结果应包含优先级"\n                assert "cost_tier" in attribution_result, "结果应包含成本层级"\n\n            # 检查统计信息\n            stats = self.rule_engine.stats\n            assert "total_processed" in stats, "统计应包含总处理数"\n            assert "rules_matched" in stats, "统计应包含规则匹配数"\n            assert "auto_attributed" in stats, "统计应包含自动归因数"\n\n            self.log_test_result(\n                "规则引擎", True, f"处理了{stats[\'total_processed\']}个事件"\n            )\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("规则引擎", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_attribution_monitor(self):\n        pass\n        """测试归因监控功能"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试归因监控功能...")\n\n            # 创建测试指标\n            test_metrics = AttributionMetrics(\n                date=datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),\n                total_anomalies=10,\n                stage1_auto_attributed=8,\n                stage2_llm_processed=2,\n                stage3_expert_consulted=0,\n                stage1_cost=0.5,\n                stage2_cost=2.0,\n                stage3_cost=0.0,\n                manual_sample_checked=5,\n                manual_sample_correct=4,\n                processing_time_ms=1500.0,\n            )\n\n            # 测试指标记录\n            self.attribution_monitor.record_daily_metrics(test_metrics)\n\n            # 测试指标查询\n            recent_metrics = self.attribution_monitor.get_metrics_summary(days=7)\n            assert recent_metrics is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能获取最近指标"\n\n            # 测试性能仪表盘\n            performance_dashboard = self.attribution_monitor.get_performance_dashboard(\n                days=7\n            )\n            assert performance_dashboard is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能获取性能仪表盘"\n\n            self.log_test_result("归因监控", True, "监控功能正常")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("归因监控", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_database_integration(self):\n        pass\n        """测试数据库集成"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试数据库集成...")\n\n            # 测试数据库连接\n            cursor = self.db_conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)\n\n            # 查询测试数据\n            cursor.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM daily_prices LIMIT 1")\n            result = cursor.fetchone()\n            assert result is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能查询数据库"\n\n            # 查询归因相关表\n            cursor.execute("""\n                SELECT table_name\n                FROM information_schema.tables\n                WHERE table_schema = \'public\'\n                AND table_name LIKE \'%attribution%\' OR table_name LIKE \'%anomaly%\'\n            """)\n            tables = cursor.fetchall()\n\n            cursor.close()\n\n            self.log_test_result("数据库集成", True, f"找到{len(tables)}个相关表")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("数据库集成", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_attribution_analysis(self):\n        pass\n        """测试归因分析功能"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试归因分析功能...")\n\n            # 获取测试股票数据\n            cursor = self.db_conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)\n            cursor.execute("""\n                SELECT ts_code, trade_date, close, pct_chg, vol, amount\n                FROM daily_prices\n                WHERE trade_date >= \'2024-01-01\'\n                AND pct_chg > 5.0\n                LIMIT 5\n            """)\n            test_stocks = cursor.fetchall()\n            cursor.close()\n\n            if not test_stocks:\n                self.log_test_result("归因分析", False, "无测试股票数据")\n                return False\n\n            # 模拟归因分析\n            for stock in test_stocks:\n                # 创建事件数据\n                event_data = {\n                    "code": stock["ts_code"],\n                    "date": stock["trade_date"],\n                    "price_change": stock["pct_chg"],\n                    "volume": stock["vol"],\n                    "amount": stock["amount"],\n                    "event_type": "price_movement",\n                }\n\n                # 执行规则引擎分析\n                if self.rule_engine:\n                    attribution_result = self.rule_engine.execute_attribution_rules(\n                        event_data\n                    )\n                    if attribution_result:\n                        logger.info(\n                            f"股票 {stock[\'ts_code\']} 归因结果: {attribution_result[\'attribution_label\']}"\n                        )\n\n            self.log_test_result(\n                "归因分析", True, f"分析了{len(test_stocks)}个股票事件"\n            )\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("归因分析", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_performance_metrics(self):\n        pass\n        """测试性能指标"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试性能指标...")\n\n            # 测试规则引擎统计\n            if self.rule_engine:\n                stats = self.rule_engine.stats\n                assert "total_processed" in stats, "应包含总处理数"\n                assert "rules_matched" in stats, "应包含规则匹配数"\n                assert "auto_attributed" in stats, "应包含自动归因数"\n                assert "processing_times" in stats, "应包含处理时间列表"\n\n                # 计算平均处理时间\n                if stats["processing_times"]:\n                    avg_time = sum(stats["processing_times"]) / len(\n                        stats["processing_times"]\n                    )\n                    logger.info(f"平均处理时间: {avg_time:.2f}ms")\n\n            # 测试归因监控统计\n            monitor_stats = self.attribution_monitor.get_metrics_summary(days=7)\n            assert monitor_stats is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能获取监控统计"\n\n            self.log_test_result("性能指标", True, "性能指标正常")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("性能指标", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    def get_test_stocks(self) -> List[str]:\n        """获取测试股票列表"""\n        try:\n            cursor = self.db_conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)\n            cursor.execute("""\n                SELECT DISTINCT ts_code\n                FROM daily_prices\n                WHERE trade_date >= \'2024-01-01\'\n                LIMIT 5\n            """)\n            result = cursor.fetchall()\n            cursor.close()\n            return [row["ts_code"] for row in result] if result else []\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"获取测试股票失败: {e}")\n            return []\n\n    def run_all_tests(self):\n        """运行所有测试"""\n        logger.info("🚀 开始AttributionEngine全面测试...")\n\n        # 初始化测试环境\n        if not self.setup():\n            logger.error("❌ 测试环境初始化失败,退出测试")\n            return False\n\n        try:\n            # 运行各项测试\n            self.test_engine_initialization()\n            self.test_rule_engine()\n            self.test_attribution_monitor()\n            self.test_database_integration()\n            self.test_attribution_analysis()\n            self.test_performance_metrics()\n\n            # 输出测试结果\n            self.print_test_summary()\n\n            return self.test_results["failed_tests"] == 0\n\n        finally:\n            self.cleanup()\n\n    def print_test_summary(self):\n        """打印测试总结"""\n        logger.info("\\n" + "=" * 60)\n        logger.info("📊 AttributionEngine测试结果总结")\n        logger.info("=" * 60)\n\n        total = self.test_results["total_tests"]\n        passed = self.test_results["passed_tests"]\n        failed = self.test_results["failed_tests"]\n\n        logger.info(f"总测试数: {total}")\n        logger.info(f"通过测试: {passed} ✅")\n        logger.info(f"失败测试: {failed} ❌")\n        logger.info(f"成功率: {(passed/total*100):.1f}%" if total > 0 else "成功率: 0%")\n\n        if failed > 0:\n            logger.info("\\n❌ 失败的测试:")\n            for', 'try:\n            logger.info("🔧 初始化AttributionEngine测试环境...")\n\n            # 初始化数据库连接\n            self.db_conn = psycopg2.connect(\n                host="localhost",\n                database="news_analysis",\n                user="news_user",\n                password="news_password",\n                port=5432,\n            )\n\n            # 初始化规则引擎\n            rules_config_path = "config/attribution_rules.json"\n            if os.path.exists(rules_config_path):\n                self.rule_engine = AttributionRuleEngine(rules_config_path)\n            else:\n                logger.warning(f"规则配置文件不存在: {rules_config_path}")\n                self.rule_engine = None\n\n            # 初始化归因监控器\n            self.attribution_monitor = AttributionMonitor()\n\n            logger.info("✅ AttributionEngine测试环境初始化完成")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"❌ AttributionEngine测试环境初始化失败: {e}")\n            return False\n\n    def cleanup(self):\n        """清理测试环境"""\n        try:\n            if self.db_conn:\n                self.db_conn.close()\n\n            logger.info("🧹 AttributionEngine测试环境清理完成")\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f"❌ 清理测试环境失败: {e}")\n\n    def log_test_result(self, test_name: str, passed: bool, details: str = ""):\n        """记录测试结果"""\n        self.test_results["total_tests"] += 1\n        if passed:\n            self.test_results["passed_tests"] += 1\n            logger.info(f"✅ {test_name}: 通过")\n        else:\n            self.test_results["failed_tests"] += 1\n            logger.error(f"❌ {test_name}: 失败 - {details}")\n\n        self.test_results["test_details"].append(\n            {\n                "test_name": test_name,\n                "passed": passed,\n                "details": details,\n                "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),\n            }\n        )\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_green_phase_engine_initialization(self):\n        pass\n        """测试引擎初始化"""\n        try:\n            logger.info("🧪 测试AttributionEngine初始化...")\n\n            # 检查数据库连接\n            assert self.db_conn is not None, "数据库连接未初始化"\n\n            # 检查规则引擎\n            if self.rule_engine is not None:\n                assert hasattr(self.rule_engine, \'rules_config\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "规则引擎应包含配置"\n                assert hasattr(self.rule_engine, \'stats\')  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "规则引擎应包含统计信息"\n\n            # 检查归因监控器\n            assert self.attribution_monitor is not None, "归因监控器未初始化"\n\n            self.log_test_result("引擎初始化", True, "所有组件正常初始化")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("引擎初始化", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # 执行规则检查\n            attribution_result = self.rule_engine.execute_attribution_rules(\n                test_event_data\n            )\n\n            # 验证结果\n            if attribution_result is not None:\n                assert "attribution_label" in attribution_result, "结果应包含归因标签"\n                assert "rule_id" in attribution_result, "结果应包含规则ID"\n                assert "confidence" in attribution_result, "结果应包含置信度"\n                assert "priority" in attribution_result, "结果应包含优先级"\n                assert "cost_tier" in attribution_result, "结果应包含成本层级"\n\n            # 检查统计信息\n            stats = self.rule_engine.stats\n            assert "total_processed" in stats, "统计应包含总处理数"\n            assert "rules_matched" in stats, "统计应包含规则匹配数"\n            assert "auto_attributed" in stats, "统计应包含自动归因数"\n\n            self.log_test_result(\n                "规则引擎", True, f"处理了{stats[\'total_processed\']}个事件"\n            )\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("规则引擎", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # 查询测试数据\n            cursor.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM daily_prices LIMIT 1")\n            result = cursor.fetchone()\n            assert result is not None  # TODO: 替换为具体的值断言, "应能查询数据库"\n\n            # 查询归因相关表\n            cursor.execute("""\n                SELECT table_name\n                FROM information_schema.tables\n                WHERE table_schema = \'public\'\n                AND table_name LIKE \'%attribution%\' OR table_name LIKE \'%anomaly%\'\n            """)\n            tables = cursor.fetchall()\n\n            cursor.close()\n\n            self.log_test_result("数据库集成", True, f"找到{len(tables)}个相关表")\n            return True\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.log_test_result("数据库集成", False, str(e))\n            return False\n\n    # print("✅ 模拟策略合规性检查完成")\n\n    def test_assertion_precision_compliance(self):\n        """\n        测试：断言精确性合规性\n        \n        遵循第7条：断言必须精确且有意义\n        """\n        # 检查我们的测试文件是否使用了精确断言\n 断言精确性合规性检查完成")\n\n    def test_coverage_requirements(self):\n        """\n        测试：覆盖率要求\n        \n        遵循第3.1条：单元测试验收标准\n        """\n        # 检查测试文件是否覆盖了所有公共方法\n        main_workflow_path = method in public_methods if not method.startswith(\'_\')]\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查是否有足够的公共方法\n            assert len(public_methods) > 0, "应该至少有一个公共方法"\n            \n            print(f"✅ 断言精确性合规性检查完成")\n\n    def test_coverage_requirements(self):\n        """\n        测试：覆盖率要求\n        \n        遵循第3.1条：单元测试验收标准\n        """\n        # 检查测试文件是否覆盖了所有公共方法\n        main_workflow_path = project_root / "packages" / "backend-python" / "src" / "main_workflow.py"\n        \n        if main_workflow_path.exists():\n            content = main_workflow_path.read_text(encoding=\'utf-8\')\n            \n            # 提取公共方法（以def开头，不是以_开头）\n            import re\n            public_methods = re.findall(r\'def ([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\\(\', content)\n            public_methods = [method for method in public_methods if not method.startswith(\'_\')]\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查是否有足够的公共方法\n            assert len(public_methods) > 0, "应该至少有一个公共方法"\n            \n            print(f"✅ 发现 {len(public_methods)} 个公共方法需要测试")\n            print(f"   方法列表: {public_methods}")\n        \n        print("✅ 覆盖率要求检查完成")\n\n    def test_red_green_refactor_compliance(self):\n        """\n f"应该包含绿灯阶段说明: {test_file}"\n                \n        print("✅ 红灯-绿灯-重构原则合规性检查完成")\n\n    def test_file_organization_compliance(self):\n        """\n        测试：文件组织合规性\n        \n          "tools/tests/e2e/": "E2E测试目录",\n            "packages/backend-python/": "生产代码目录",\n            "docs/": "文档目录"\n        }\n        \n        for path, description in required_structure.items():\n            dir_path = project_root / path\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查目录存在\n            assert dir_path.exists(), f"{description}不存在: {path}"\n            assert dir_path.is_dir(), f"{description}不是目录: {path}"\n            \n        print("✅ 文件组织合规性检查完成")\n\n    def test_naming_convention_compliance(self):\n        """\n        测试：命名规范合规性\n        \n run_constitution_compliance_test():\n    """运行测试宪法合规性测试"""\n    print("🚀 开始测试宪法合规性检查...")\n    print("=" * 60)\n    \n    test_instance = TestScheme3ConstitutionCompliant()\n 测试不同的日期格式\n        test_dates = [\n            "2024-01-15",\n            "2024-12-31",\n            "2024-02-29",  # 闰年\n            "2023-02-28"   # 平年\n        ]\n        \n        for date_str in test_dates:\n            workflow_id = await adapter.run_daily_flow(date_str)\n            assert workflow_id.startswith("daily_")\n            assert adapter.active_workflows[workflow_id]["target_date"] == date_str\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_historical_backfill_with_different_date_ranges_when_various_ranges_provided(self, adapter):\n        pass\n        """测试:应该处理不同的日期范围"""\n        test_ranges = [\n            ("2024-01-01", "2024-01-31"),  # 一个月\n            ("2024-01-01", "2024-12-31"),  # 一年\n            ("2024-01-15", "2024-01-15"),  # 同一天\n        ]\n        \n        for start_date, end_date in test_ranges:\n            workflow_id = await adapter.run_historical_backfill(start_date, end_date)\n            assert workflow_id.startswith("backfill_")\n            workflow = adapter.active_workflows[workflow_id]\n            assert workflow["start_date"] == start_date\n            assert workflow["end_date"] == end_date\n\n    # 验证所有工作流都被正确记录\n        assert len(adapter.active_workflows) == 5\n        for workflow_id in workflow_ids:\n            assert workflow_id in adapter.active_workflows\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_concurrent_workflow_operations_when_multiple_operations_called(self, adapter):\n        pass\n        """测试:应该处理并发工作流操作"""\n        # 添加一个测试工作流\n        workflow_id = "test_workflow_123"\n        adapter.active_workflows[workflow_id] = {\n            "id": workflow_id,\n            "type": "test",\n            "status": "running",\n            "logs": []\n        }\n        \n        # 并发执行多个操作\n        tasks = [\n            adapter.get_workflow_status(workflow_id),\n            adapter.get_workflow_logs(workflow_id),\n            adapter.cancel_workflow(workflow_id),\n        ]\n        \n        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)\n        \n        # 验证所有操作都成功执行\n        assert results[0] != None  # get_workflow_status\n        assert len(results[1]) == 1  # get_workflow_logs (should have one log from cancellation)\n        assert results[1][0]["level"] == "warning"  # cancellation log\n        assert results[2] is True  # cancel_workflow\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_should_handle_log_timestamp_for']

 ]\n        \n        service = LLMService(llm_provider=mock_llm_provider)\n        result = await service.analyze_with_retry(service.analyze_fact, sample_input_data, max_retries=2)\n        \n        assert isinstance(result, AnalysisResult)\n        assert result.analysis == "success"\n        assert mock_llm_provider.generate_text.call_count == 2\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_fail_after_max_retries(self, mock_llm_provider, sample_input_data):\n        """测试:应该在达到最大重试次数后失败 - 精确断言"""\n        from src.exceptions.workflow_exceptions import LLMServiceError\n
