mock_llm_provider.generate_text.return_value = json.dumps(mock_response)\n\n        await llm_service.analyze_fact(input_data)\n\n        # 验证上下文被包含在提示词中\n        call_args = mock_llm_provider.generate_text.call_args\n        assert "特殊上下文" in call_args[1]["prompt"]\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_analyze_sentiment_with_valid_response(\n        self, llm_service, mock_llm_provider, sample_input_data\n    ):\n        """测试:应该使用有效响应进行情感分析"""\n        # 模拟LLM响应\n        mock_response = {\n            "sentiment": "positive",\n            "score": 0.8,\n            "reasoning": "基于积极财报的情感分析",\n        }\n        mock_llm_provider.generate_text.return_value = json.dumps(mock_response)\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_sentiment(sample_input_data)\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert isinstance(result, SentimentAnalysis)\n        assert result.sentiment == "positive"\n        assert result.score == 0.8\n        assert result.reasoning == mock_response["reasoning"]\n\n        # 验证调用计数\n        assert llm_service._call_count == 1\n        assert llm_service._error_count == 0\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_analyze_sentiment_with_invalid_json_response(\n        self, llm_service, mock_llm_provider, sample_input_data\n    ):\n        """测试:应该处理无效JSON响应,使用关键词分析"""\n        # 模拟无效JSON响应\n        mock_llm_provider.generate_text.return_value = "这不是有效的JSON"\n\n        # 使用包含积极词汇的内容\n        sample_input_data["news_content"] = "该公司营收上涨,盈利增长,突破新高"\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_sentiment(sample_input_data)\n\n        # 验证关键词分析结果\n        assert isinstance(result, SentimentAnalysis)\n        assert result.sentiment == "positive"\n        assert result.score > 0.5\n        assert "基于关键词的情感分析" in result.reasoning\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_analyze_sentiment_with_negative_keywords(\n        self, llm_service, mock_llm_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:应该识别消极关键词"""\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001",\n            "news_content": "该公司股价下跌,面临亏损风险,市场危机",\n        }\n\n        mock_llm_provider.generate_text.return_value = "无效JSON"\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_sentiment(input_data)\n\n        assert result.sentiment == "negative"\n        assert result.score < 0.5\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_analyze_sentiment_with_neutral_keywords(\n        self, llm_service, mock_llm_provider\n    ):\n        """测试:应该识别中性关键词"""\n        input_data = {\n            "stock_code": "000001",\n            "news_content": "该公司发布公告,市场表现平稳",\n        }\n\n        mock_llm_provider.generate_text.return_value = "无效JSON"\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_sentiment(input_data)\n\n        assert result.sentiment == "neutral"\n        assert result.score == 0.5\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_analyze_sentiment_with_provider_exception(\n        self, llm_service, mock_llm_provider, sample_input_data\n    ):\n        """测试:应该处理提供商异常"""\n        mock_llm_provider.generate_text.side_effect = Exception("API调用失败")\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await llm_service.analyze_sentiment(sample_input_data)\n\n        assert "情感分析失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n        assert llm_service._call_count == 1\n        assert llm_service._error_count == 1\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_analyze_with_retry_success_on_first_attempt(\n        self, llm_service, mock_llm_provider, sample_input_data\n    ):\n        """测试:重试机制 - 第一次尝试成功"""\n        mock_response = {"analysis": "成功分析", "confidence": 0.9, "reasoning": "成功"}\n        mock_llm_provider.generate_text.return_value = json.dumps(mock_response)\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_with_retry(\n            llm_service.analyze_fact, sample_input_data, max_retries=3\n        )\n\n        assert isinstance(result, AnalysisResult)\n        assert result.analysis == "成功分析"\n        assert llm_service._call_count == 1\n        assert llm_service._error_count == 0\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_analyze_with_retry_success_on_second_attempt(\n        self, llm_service, mock_llm_provider, sample_input_data\n    ):\n        """测试:重试机制 - 第二次尝试成功"""\n        # 第一次失败,第二次成功\n        mock_llm_provider.generate_text.side_effect = [\n            Exception("第一次失败"),\n            json.dumps(\n                {"analysis": "重试成功", "confidence": 0.8, "reasoning": "重试"}\n            ),\n        ]\n\n        result = await llm_service.analyze_with_retry(\n            llm_service.analyze_fact, sample_input_data, max_retries=3\n        )\n\n        assert isinstance(result, AnalysisResult)\n        assert result.analysis == "重试成功"\n        assert llm_service._call_count == 2\n        assert llm_service._error_count == 1\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_analyze_with_retry_exhaustion(\n        self, llm_service, mock_llm_provider, sample_input_data\n    ):\n        """测试:重试机制 - 重试次数耗尽"""\n        mock_llm_provider.generate_text.side_effect = Exception("持续失败")\n\n        with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n            await llm_service.analyze_with_retry']
- **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

### 129. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/unit/backend/services/test_quant_signal_engine_detailed.py
- **规则**: 第4条：简单性优先
- **违规**: ['if i < 20:\n                # 前20天:稳定上涨\n                price = base_price + i * 0.5\n                volume = 100000000 + i * 1000000\n                pct_chg = 0.5\n            else:\n                # 后10天:波动\n                price = base_price + 10 + (i - 20) * 0.2 + np.sin(i) * 2\n                volume = 120000000 + (i - 20) * 2000000\n                pct_chg = 0.2 + np.sin(i) * 0.8\n\n            prices.append(price)\n            volumes.append(volume)\n            pct_changes.append(pct_chg)\n\n        return [\n            {\n                "trade_date": date.strftime("%Y%m%d"),\n                "close": price,\n                "vol": volume,\n                "pct_chg": pct_chg,\n                "amount": price * volume,\n            }\n            for date, price, volume, pct_chg in zip(dates, prices, volumes, pct_changes)\n        ]\n\n    @pytest.fixture\n    def sample_financial_factors(self):\n        """创建标准财务因子数据"""\n        return {\n            "pe_ratio": 15.5,\n            "pb_ratio": 2.1,\n            "ps_ratio": 3.2,\n            "dividend_yield": 2.8,\n            "roe": 12.5,\n            "roa": 8.3,\n            "debt_to_equity": 0.6,\n            "current_ratio": 1.8,\n            "quick_ratio": 1.2,\n            "gross_margin": 0.35,\n            "operating_margin": 0.18,\n            "net_margin": 0.12,\n        }\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_green_phase_calculate_return_z_score_with_stable_data(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:稳定数据的收益率Z分数计算"""\n        # 使用前20天稳定数据\n        stable_data = sample_price_data[:20]\n\n        # 手动计算标准答案\n        # 前20天每天涨幅0.5%,标准差应该接近0\n\n        result = service._calculate_return_z_score(stable_data)\n\n        # 验证结果在合理范围内\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert -10 <= result <= 10  # Z分数应该在合理范围内\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_return_z_score_with_volatile_data(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:波动数据的收益率Z分数计算"""\n        # 使用后10天波动数据\n        volatile_data = sample_price_data[20:]\n\n        result = service._calculate_return_z_score(volatile_data)\n\n        # 波动数据应该产生更高的Z分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert abs(result) > 0  # 应该有非零的Z分数\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_volume_z_score_with_high_volume(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:高成交量的成交量Z分数计算"""\n        # 使用后10天高成交量数据\n        high_volume_data = sample_price_data[20:]\n\n        result = service._calculate_volume_z_score(high_volume_data)\n\n        # 高成交量应该产生正Z分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert result > 0  # 高成交量应该产生正Z分数\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_momentum_z_score_with_trending_data(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:趋势数据的动量Z分数计算"""\n        # 使用前20天上涨趋势数据\n        trending_data = sample_price_data[:20]\n\n        result = service._calculate_momentum_z_score(trending_data)\n\n        # 上涨趋势应该产生正动量Z分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert result > 0  # 上涨趋势应该产生正动量\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_volatility_z_score_with_stable_vs_volatile(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:稳定vs波动数据的波动率Z分数计算"""\n        # 稳定数据\n        stable_data = sample_price_data[:20]\n        stable_volatility = service._calculate_volatility_z_score(stable_data)\n\n        # 波动数据\n        volatile_data = sample_price_data[20:]\n        volatile_volatility = service._calculate_volatility_z_score(volatile_data)\n\n        # 波动数据应该产生更高的波动率Z分数\n        assert isinstance(stable_volatility, float)\n        assert isinstance(volatile_volatility, float)\n        assert volatile_volatility > stable_volatility\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_rsi_with_overbought_condition(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:超买条件下的RSI计算"""\n        # 创建连续上涨的价格数据\n        overbought_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 5.0, "vol": 100000000}\n            for _ in range(14)  # 14天连续5%涨幅\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_rsi(overbought_data)\n\n        # 连续上涨应该产生高RSI(接近100)\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 100\n        assert result > 50  # 应该高于中性水平(简化实现)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_rsi_with_oversold_condition(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:超卖条件下的RSI计算"""\n        # 创建连续下跌的价格数据\n        oversold_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": -5.0, "vol": 100000000}\n            for _ in range(14)  # 14天连续5%跌幅\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_rsi(oversold_data)\n\n        # 连续下跌应该产生低RSI(接近0)\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 100\n        assert result < 50  # 应该低于中性水平(简化实现)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_macd_signal_with_bullish_crossover(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:看涨交叉的MACD信号计算"""\n        # 创建看涨趋势数据\n        bullish_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 2.0 + i * 0.1, "vol": 100000000}\n            for i in range(26)  # 逐渐加速上涨\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_macd_signal(bullish_data)\n\n        # 看涨趋势应该产生正MACD信号\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert result > 0  # 应该产生正信号\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_bollinger_position_with_extreme_values(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:极端值的布林带位置计算"""\n        # 创建极端上涨数据\n        extreme_up_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 10.0, "vol": 100000000}\n            for _ in range(20)  # 20天连续10%涨幅\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_bollinger_position(extreme_up_data)\n\n        # 极端上涨应该产生接近1的布林带位置\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.5  # 应该高于中性水平(简化实现)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_ma_signal_with_trend_confirmation(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:趋势确认的移动平均信号计算"""\n        # 创建确认上涨趋势的数据\n        trend_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 1.0 + i * 0.05, "vol": 100000000}\n            for i in range(20)  # 逐渐加速\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_ma_signal(trend_data)\n\n        # 确认趋势应该产生正移动平均信号\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert result > 0  # 应该产生正信号\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_mda_fulfillment_rate_with_high_fulfillment(\n        self, service, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:高履行率的MDA履行率计算"""\n        # 模拟高履行率的情况\n        high_fulfillment_factors = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        high_fulfillment_factors.update(\n            {"mda_commitments_fulfilled": 8, "mda_commitments_total": 10}\n        )\n\n        result = service._calculate_mda_fulfillment_rate(high_fulfillment_factors)\n\n        # 高履行率应该产生高分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.7  # 应该高于70%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_management_credibility_score_with_consistent_performance(\n        self, service, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:一致表现的管理层可信度分数计算"""\n        # 模拟一致表现的情况\n        consistent_factors = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        consistent_factors.update(\n            {\n                "earnings_consistency": 0.85,\n                "guidance_accuracy": 0.90,\n                "management_stability": 0.80,\n            }\n        )\n\n        result = service._calculate_management_credibility_score(consistent_factors)\n\n        # 一致表现应该产生高可信度分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.6  # 应该高于60%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_disclosure_quality_score_with_high_transparency(\n        self, service, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:高透明度的披露质量分数计算"""\n        # 模拟高透明度的情况\n        transparent_factors = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        transparent_factors.update(\n            {\n                "disclosure_frequency": 0.95,\n                "disclosure_completeness": 0.90,\n                "disclosure_timeliness": 0.85,\n            }\n        )\n\n        result = service._calculate_disclosure_quality_score(transparent_factors)\n\n        # 高透明度应该产生高披露质量分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.7  # 应该高于70%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_financial_transparency_score_with_clear_financials(\n        self, service, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:清晰财务的财务透明度分数计算"""\n        # 模拟清晰财务的情况\n        clear_financials = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        clear_financials.update(\n            {\n                "audit_quality": 0.95,\n                "accounting_standards": 0.90,\n                "financial_clarity": 0.85,\n            }\n        )\n\n        result = service._calculate_financial_transparency_score(clear_financials)\n\n        # 清晰财务应该产生高透明度分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.7  # 应该高于70%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_overall_signal_strength_with_strong_signals(\n        self, service, sample_price_data, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:强信号的总体信号强度计算"""\n        # 直接调用方法,传入Z分数参数\n        result = service._calculate_overall_signal_strength(\n            return_z=2.5, volume_z=1.8, momentum_z=2.2, volatility_z=1.5\n        )\n\n        # 强信号应该产生高总体强度\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.6  # 应该高于60%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_overall_signal_strength_with_weak_signals(\n        self, service, sample_price_data, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:弱信号的总体信号强度计算"""\n        # 直接调用方法,传入弱信号Z分数参数\n        result = service._calculate_overall_signal_strength(\n            return_z=0.5, volume_z=0.3, momentum_z=0.4, volatility_z=0.2\n        )\n\n        # 弱信号应该产生低总体强度\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result < 0.4  # 应该低于40%\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_detect_anomalies_with_price_anomaly(\n        self, service, sample_price_data, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:价格异常检测"""\n        # 创建包含价格异常的数据 - 需要pct_chg > 10.0\n        anomaly_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 15.0, "vol": 100000000, "close": 115.0}\n        ]  # 15%涨幅,超过10%阈值\n\n        # 创建basic_data(简化版本)\n        basic_data = [{"trade_date": "20240116", "close": 115.0}]\n\n        anomalies = await service.detect_anomalies(\n            "000001.SZ", datetime(2024, 1, 16), anomaly_data, basic_data\n        )\n\n        # 应该检测到价格异常\n        assert isinstance(anomalies, list)\n        assert len(anomalies) > 0\n\n        # 验证异常类型\n        price_anomalies = [a for a in anomalies if a.anomaly_type.value == "price"]\n        assert len(price_anomalies) > 0\n\n        # 验证异常严重程度\n        for anomaly in price_anomalies:\n            assert anomaly.severity.value in ["low", "medium", "high"]\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_detect_anomalies_with_volume_anomaly(\n        self, service, sample_price_data, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:成交量异常检测"""\n        # 创建包含成交量异常的数据 - 需要volume_ratio > 3.0\n        anomaly_data = [{"pct_chg": 2.0, "vol": 100000000, "close": 102.0}]\n\n        # 创建basic_data,包含volume_ratio > 3.0\n        basic_data = [\n            {"trade_date": "20240111", "close": 102.0, "volume_ratio": 4.0}\n        ]  # 4倍成交量,超过3倍阈值\n\n        anomalies = await service.detect_anomalies(\n            "000001.SZ", datetime(2024, 1, 11), anomaly_data, basic_data\n        )\n\n        # 应该检测到成交量异常\n        assert isinstance(anomalies, list)\n        assert len(anomalies) > 0\n\n        # 验证异常类型\n        volume_anomalies = [a for a in anomalies if', 'for i, _date in enumerate(dates):\n            if i < 20:\n                # 前20天:稳定上涨\n                price = base_price + i * 0.5\n                volume = 100000000 + i * 1000000\n                pct_chg = 0.5\n            else:\n                # 后10天:波动\n                price = base_price + 10 + (i - 20) * 0.2 + np.sin(i) * 2\n                volume = 120000000 + (i - 20) * 2000000\n                pct_chg = 0.2 + np.sin(i) * 0.8\n\n            prices.append(price)\n            volumes.append(volume)\n            pct_changes.append(pct_chg)\n\n        return [\n            {\n                "trade_date": date.strftime("%Y%m%d"),\n                "close": price,\n                "vol": volume,\n                "pct_chg": pct_chg,\n                "amount": price * volume,\n            }\n            for date, price, volume, pct_chg in zip(dates, prices, volumes, pct_changes)\n        ]\n\n    @pytest.fixture\n    def sample_financial_factors(self):\n        """创建标准财务因子数据"""\n        return {\n            "pe_ratio": 15.5,\n            "pb_ratio": 2.1,\n            "ps_ratio": 3.2,\n            "dividend_yield": 2.8,\n            "roe": 12.5,\n            "roa": 8.3,\n            "debt_to_equity": 0.6,\n            "current_ratio": 1.8,\n            "quick_ratio": 1.2,\n            "gross_margin": 0.35,\n            "operating_margin": 0.18,\n            "net_margin": 0.12,\n        }\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_green_phase_calculate_return_z_score_with_stable_data(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:稳定数据的收益率Z分数计算"""\n        # 使用前20天稳定数据\n        stable_data = sample_price_data[:20]\n\n        # 手动计算标准答案\n        # 前20天每天涨幅0.5%,标准差应该接近0\n\n        result = service._calculate_return_z_score(stable_data)\n\n        # 验证结果在合理范围内\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert -10 <= result <= 10  # Z分数应该在合理范围内\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_return_z_score_with_volatile_data(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:波动数据的收益率Z分数计算"""\n        # 使用后10天波动数据\n        volatile_data = sample_price_data[20:]\n\n        result = service._calculate_return_z_score(volatile_data)\n\n        # 波动数据应该产生更高的Z分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert abs(result) > 0  # 应该有非零的Z分数\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_volume_z_score_with_high_volume(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:高成交量的成交量Z分数计算"""\n        # 使用后10天高成交量数据\n        high_volume_data = sample_price_data[20:]\n\n        result = service._calculate_volume_z_score(high_volume_data)\n\n        # 高成交量应该产生正Z分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert result > 0  # 高成交量应该产生正Z分数\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_momentum_z_score_with_trending_data(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:趋势数据的动量Z分数计算"""\n        # 使用前20天上涨趋势数据\n        trending_data = sample_price_data[:20]\n\n        result = service._calculate_momentum_z_score(trending_data)\n\n        # 上涨趋势应该产生正动量Z分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert result > 0  # 上涨趋势应该产生正动量\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_volatility_z_score_with_stable_vs_volatile(\n        self, service, sample_price_data\n    ):\n        """测试:稳定vs波动数据的波动率Z分数计算"""\n        # 稳定数据\n        stable_data = sample_price_data[:20]\n        stable_volatility = service._calculate_volatility_z_score(stable_data)\n\n        # 波动数据\n        volatile_data = sample_price_data[20:]\n        volatile_volatility = service._calculate_volatility_z_score(volatile_data)\n\n        # 波动数据应该产生更高的波动率Z分数\n        assert isinstance(stable_volatility, float)\n        assert isinstance(volatile_volatility, float)\n        assert volatile_volatility > stable_volatility\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_rsi_with_overbought_condition(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:超买条件下的RSI计算"""\n        # 创建连续上涨的价格数据\n        overbought_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 5.0, "vol": 100000000}\n            for _ in range(14)  # 14天连续5%涨幅\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_rsi(overbought_data)\n\n        # 连续上涨应该产生高RSI(接近100)\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 100\n        assert result > 50  # 应该高于中性水平(简化实现)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_rsi_with_oversold_condition(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:超卖条件下的RSI计算"""\n        # 创建连续下跌的价格数据\n        oversold_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": -5.0, "vol": 100000000}\n            for _ in range(14)  # 14天连续5%跌幅\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_rsi(oversold_data)\n\n        # 连续下跌应该产生低RSI(接近0)\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 100\n        assert result < 50  # 应该低于中性水平(简化实现)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_macd_signal_with_bullish_crossover(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:看涨交叉的MACD信号计算"""\n        # 创建看涨趋势数据\n        bullish_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 2.0 + i * 0.1, "vol": 100000000}\n            for i in range(26)  # 逐渐加速上涨\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_macd_signal(bullish_data)\n\n        # 看涨趋势应该产生正MACD信号\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert result > 0  # 应该产生正信号\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_bollinger_position_with_extreme_values(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:极端值的布林带位置计算"""\n        # 创建极端上涨数据\n        extreme_up_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 10.0, "vol": 100000000}\n            for _ in range(20)  # 20天连续10%涨幅\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_bollinger_position(extreme_up_data)\n\n        # 极端上涨应该产生接近1的布林带位置\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.5  # 应该高于中性水平(简化实现)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_ma_signal_with_trend_confirmation(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:趋势确认的移动平均信号计算"""\n        # 创建确认上涨趋势的数据\n        trend_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 1.0 + i * 0.05, "vol": 100000000}\n            for i in range(20)  # 逐渐加速\n        ]\n\n        result = service._calculate_ma_signal(trend_data)\n\n        # 确认趋势应该产生正移动平均信号\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert result > 0  # 应该产生正信号\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_mda_fulfillment_rate_with_high_fulfillment(\n        self, service, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:高履行率的MDA履行率计算"""\n        # 模拟高履行率的情况\n        high_fulfillment_factors = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        high_fulfillment_factors.update(\n            {"mda_commitments_fulfilled": 8, "mda_commitments_total": 10}\n        )\n\n        result = service._calculate_mda_fulfillment_rate(high_fulfillment_factors)\n\n        # 高履行率应该产生高分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.7  # 应该高于70%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_management_credibility_score_with_consistent_performance(\n        self, service, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:一致表现的管理层可信度分数计算"""\n        # 模拟一致表现的情况\n        consistent_factors = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        consistent_factors.update(\n            {\n                "earnings_consistency": 0.85,\n                "guidance_accuracy": 0.90,\n                "management_stability": 0.80,\n            }\n        )\n\n        result = service._calculate_management_credibility_score(consistent_factors)\n\n        # 一致表现应该产生高可信度分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.6  # 应该高于60%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_disclosure_quality_score_with_high_transparency(\n        self, service, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:高透明度的披露质量分数计算"""\n        # 模拟高透明度的情况\n        transparent_factors = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        transparent_factors.update(\n            {\n                "disclosure_frequency": 0.95,\n                "disclosure_completeness": 0.90,\n                "disclosure_timeliness": 0.85,\n            }\n        )\n\n        result = service._calculate_disclosure_quality_score(transparent_factors)\n\n        # 高透明度应该产生高披露质量分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.7  # 应该高于70%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_financial_transparency_score_with_clear_financials(\n        self, service, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:清晰财务的财务透明度分数计算"""\n        # 模拟清晰财务的情况\n        clear_financials = sample_financial_factors.copy()\n        clear_financials.update(\n            {\n                "audit_quality": 0.95,\n                "accounting_standards": 0.90,\n                "financial_clarity": 0.85,\n            }\n        )\n\n        result = service._calculate_financial_transparency_score(clear_financials)\n\n        # 清晰财务应该产生高透明度分数\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.7  # 应该高于70%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_overall_signal_strength_with_strong_signals(\n        self, service, sample_price_data, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:强信号的总体信号强度计算"""\n        # 直接调用方法,传入Z分数参数\n        result = service._calculate_overall_signal_strength(\n            return_z=2.5, volume_z=1.8, momentum_z=2.2, volatility_z=1.5\n        )\n\n        # 强信号应该产生高总体强度\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result > 0.6  # 应该高于60%\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_calculate_overall_signal_strength_with_weak_signals(\n        self, service, sample_price_data, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:弱信号的总体信号强度计算"""\n        # 直接调用方法,传入弱信号Z分数参数\n        result = service._calculate_overall_signal_strength(\n            return_z=0.5, volume_z=0.3, momentum_z=0.4, volatility_z=0.2\n        )\n\n        # 弱信号应该产生低总体强度\n        assert isinstance(result, float)\n        assert 0 <= result <= 1\n        assert result < 0.4  # 应该低于40%\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_detect_anomalies_with_price_anomaly(\n        self, service, sample_price_data, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:价格异常检测"""\n        # 创建包含价格异常的数据 - 需要pct_chg > 10.0\n        anomaly_data = [\n            {"pct_chg": 15.0, "vol": 100000000, "close": 115.0}\n        ]  # 15%涨幅,超过10%阈值\n\n        # 创建basic_data(简化版本)\n        basic_data = [{"trade_date": "20240116", "close": 115.0}]\n\n        anomalies = await service.detect_anomalies(\n            "000001.SZ", datetime(2024, 1, 16), anomaly_data, basic_data\n        )\n\n        # 应该检测到价格异常\n        assert isinstance(anomalies, list)\n        assert len(anomalies) > 0\n\n        # 验证异常类型\n        price_anomalies = [a for a in anomalies if a.anomaly_type.value == "price"]\n        assert len(price_anomalies) > 0\n\n        # 验证异常严重程度\n        for anomaly in price_anomalies:\n            assert anomaly.severity.value in ["low", "medium", "high"]\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_detect_anomalies_with_volume_anomaly(\n        self, service, sample_price_data, sample_financial_factors\n    ):\n        """测试:成交量异常检测"""\n        # 创建包含成交量异常的数据 - 需要volume_ratio > 3.0\n        anomaly_data = [{"pct_chg": 2.0, "vol": 100000000, "close": 102.0}]\n\n        # 创建basic_data,包含volume_ratio > 3.0\n        basic_data = [\n            {"trade_date": "20240111", "close": 102.0, "volume_ratio": 4.0}\n        ]  # 4倍成交量,超过3倍阈值\n\n        anomalies = await service.detect_anomalies(\n            "000001.SZ", datetime(2024, 1, 11), anomaly_data, basic_data\n        )\n\n        # 应该检测到成交量异常\n        assert isinstance(anomalies, list)\n        assert len(anomalies) > 0\n\n        # 验证异常类型\n        volume_anomalies = [a for']
- **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

"""测试:应该正确计算整体信号强度"""\n        strength = service._calculate_overall_signal_strength(0.5, 0.3, 0.2, 0.1)\n\n        # 加权平均: 0.3*0.5 + 0.2*0.3 + 0.3*0.2 + 0.2*0.1 = 0.29\n        # 归一化: 0.29 / 2.0 = 0.145\n        assert abs(strength - 0.145) < 0.001\n\n    def test_should_calculate_signal_confidence_correctly(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:应该正确计算信号置信度"""\n        financial_factors = {}\n        price_data = [{"pct_chg": 2.5}]\n        confidence = service._calculate_signal_confidence(financial_factors, price_data)\n\n        # 基于Z分数的标准差计算置信度\n        assert 0.0 <= confidence <= 1.0\n\n    def test_should_detect_price_anomaly_correctly(self, service):\n        pass\n        """测试:应该正确检测价格异常"""\n        stock_code = "000001.SZ"\n        trade_date = datetime(2024, 1, 17)\n signal.metadata\n        assert "financial_factors" in signal.metadata\n\n    # ===== P0 优先级测试:异常处理块 =====\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_calculate_quant_signal_exception(self, service):\n        """测试:应该正确处理calculate_quant_signal的异常"""\n        # 使用patch来模拟内部方法抛出异常\n        with patch.object(\n            service, "_calculate_return_z_score", side_effect=Exception("模拟计算异常")\n        ):\n            trade_date = datetime(2024, 1, 17)\n            financial_factors = {"pe_ratio": 15.0}\n            price_data = financial_factors, price_data\n                )\n\n            # 验证异常信息\n            assert "量化信号计算失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n            assert exc_info.value.signal_id == def test_should_handle_detect_anomalies_exception(self, service):\n        """测试:应该正确处理detect_anomalies的异常"""\n        # 使用patch来模拟内部方法抛出异常\n        with patch.object(\n            service, "_detect_price_anomaly", side_effect=Exception("模拟异常检测错误")\n        ):\n            trade_date = datetime(2024, 1, 17)\n            price_data = [{"pct_chg": 2.5}]\n            basic_data = price_data, basic_data\n                )\n\n            # 验证异常信息\n            assert "异常检测失败" in str(exc_info.value)\n            assert exc_info.value.stock_code == "000001.SZ"\n            assert exc_info.value.anomaly_type == "multi_type"\n            assert exc_info.value.context["stock_code"] == "000001.SZ"\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_save_quant_signal_successfully(self, service):\n        """测试:应该成功保存量化信号到数据库"""\n        # 使用patch来模拟数据库操作成功\n        with patch.object(service, "Session") as mock_session:\n mock_session_instance.refresh = Mock()\n\n            # 创建一个有效的QuantSignal对象\n            from quant_navigator_shared_types.quant_signals import (\n                QuantSignal,\n                SignalStatus,\n                SignalType,\n            )\n\n            valid_signal = QuantSignal(\n                signal_id="test_signal_123",\n                target_code="000001.SZ",\n volume_z_score=0.3,\n                momentum_z_score=0.2,\n                volatility_z_score=0.1,\n                macro_risk_z_score=0.0,\n                market_style_z_score=0.0,\n                industry_rotation_z_score=0.0,\n                concept_z_score=0.0,\n                mda_fulfillment_rate=0.8,\n                management_credibility_score=0.7,\n                disclosure_quality_score=0.75,\n                financial_transparency_score=0.8,\n                rsi=55.0,\n                macd_signal=0.25,\n                bollinger_position=0.525,\n                ma_signal=0.5,\n                overall_signal_strength=0.3,\n                signal_confidence=0.8,\n                validity_days=30,\n                model_version="v1.0.0",\n                calculation_params={"z_score_threshold": 2.0, "lookback_days": 30},\n                source="test",\n                metadata={"test": "data"},\n            )\n\n            #                result = await service.save_quant_signal(valid_signal)\n\n                # 验证结果\n                assert result == mock_entity\n mock_session_instance.refresh.assert_called_once_with(mock_entity)\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_should_handle_save_quant_signal_exception(self, service):\n 我们承诺将净利润率保持在10%以上。\n\n        2. 战略发展\n        公司将继续推进数字化转型战略,计划在未来三年内投资50亿元。\n        我们将重点布局人工智能和云计算领域。\n\n        3. 风险管控\n        公司将加强风险管控体系建设,确保合规经营。\n        我们承诺将风险损失控制在营业收入的1%以内。\n\n content="承诺将净利润率保持在10%以上",\n                category="财务承诺",\n                confidence=0.85,\n                source_text="我们承诺将净利润率保持在10%以上。",\n                position=(200, 250),\n test_verify_commitments_with_fulfilled_commitments(\n        self, verifier_service, sample_commitments, sample_current_data\n    ):\n        """测试:验证已履行的承诺"""\n        # 模拟LLM验证响应\n verifier_service.llm_provider.generate_text.side_effect = mock_responses\n\n        results = await verifier_service.verify_commitments(\n            sample_commitments, sample_current_data\n        )\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert len(results) == 3\n        assert results[0].is_fulfilled\n        assert results[0].fulfillment_rate == 0.95\n        assert results[0].confidence == 0.9\n        assert "收入95亿元" in results[0].evidence[0]\n\n        assert results[1].is_fulfilled\n        assert results[1].fulfillment_rate == 1.0\n        assert results[1].confidence == 0.95\n\n        assert not results[2].is_fulfilled\n        assert results[2].fulfillment_rate == 0.9\n        assert results[2].confidence == 0.8\n\n        # 验证LLM调用次数\n        assert verifier_service.llm_provider.generate_text.call_count == 3\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_verify_commitments_with_verification_error(\n        self, verifier_service, sample_commitments, sample_current_data\n    ):\n        """测试:验证过程中发生错误"""\n        # 模拟第一个验证成功,第二个失败\n        mock_responses = [\n            """\n            {\n                "is_fulfilled": true,\n                "fulfillment_rate": 0.95,\n                "evidence": ["验证成功"],\n                "confidence": 0.9,\n                "reasoning": "验证通过"\n            }\n            """,\n            Exception("验证失败"),\n        ]\n\n        verifier_service.llm_provider.generate_text.side_effect = mock_responses\n\n        results = await verifier_service.verify_commitments(\n            sample_commitments, sample_current_data\n        )\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert len(results) == 3\n        assert results[0].is_fulfilled\n        assert not results[1].is_fulfilled  # 验证失败\n        assert results[1].fulfillment_rate == 0.0\n        assert results[1].confidence == 0.0\n        assert "验证过程中发生错误" in results[1].reasoning\n        assert not results[2].is_fulfilled  # 没有响应\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_calculate_information_density_with_high_fulfillment(\n        self, verifier_service, sample_commitments\n    ):\n        """测试:计算高履行率的信息密度"""\n        # 创建高履行率的验证结果\n        verification_results = [\n            VerificationResult("commitment_1", True, 0.95, ["证据1"], 0.9, "推理1"),\n            VerificationResult("commitment_2", True, 1.0, ["证据2"], 0.95, "推理2"),\n            VerificationResult("commitment_3", True, 0.9, ["证据3"], 0.85, "推理3"),\n        ]\n\n        density = await verifier_service.calculate_information_density(\n            sample_commitments, verification_results\n        )\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert density.total_commitments == 3\n        assert density.fulfilled_commitments == 3\n        assert density.fulfillment_rate == 1.0\n        assert density.information_richness >= 0.5  # 有多个类别\n        assert density.clarity_score > 0.8  # 高置信度\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_placeholder(self):\n        pass\n\n    @pytest.mark.asyncio\n    async def test_calculate_information_density_with_low_fulfillment(\n        self, verifier_service, sample_commitments\n    ):\n        """测试:计算低履行率的信息密度"""\n        # 创建低履行率的验证结果\n        verification_results = [\n            VerificationResult("commitment_1", False, 0.3, [], 0.4, "未履行"),\n            VerificationResult("commitment_2", False, 0.2, [], 0.3, "未履行"),\n            VerificationResult(\n                "commitment_3", True, 0.6, ["部分证据"], 0.5, "部分履行"\n            ),\n        ]\n\n        # 修改测试数据中的承诺置信度,使其反映低清晰度\n        sample_commitments[0].confidence = 0.4\n        sample_commitments[1].confidence = 0.3\n        sample_commitments[2].confidence = 0.5\n\n        density = await verifier_service.calculate_information_density(\n            sample_commitments, verification_results\n        )\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert density.total_commitments == 3\n        assert density.fulfilled_commitments == 1\n        assert density.fulfillment_rate == 1 / 3\n        assert density.information_richness >= 0.5  # 有多个类别\n        assert density.clarity_score < 0.6  # str(sample_current_data["revenue_2024"]) in prompt\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_parse_commitment_response_with_valid_json(\n        self, verifier_service, sample_mda_text\n    ):\n        """测试:解析有效的承诺响应"""\n        response = """\n        {\n            "commitments": [\n                {\n                    "id": "commitment_1",\n                    "content": "测试承诺1",\n                    "category": "财务承诺",\n                    "confidence": 0.9,\n                    "source_text": "原始文本1",\n                    "position": [100, 200]\n                }\n            ]\n        }\n        """\n\n        commitments = verifier_service._parse_commitment_response(\n            response, sample_mda_text\n        )\n\n        # 验证结果\n        assert len(commitments) == 1\n     assert commitments[0].position == (100, 200)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_parse_commitment_response_with_invalid_json(\n        self, verifier_service, sample_mda_text\n    ):\n - **说明**: 测试逻辑过于复杂,应简化以提高可维护性

test_coverage_requirements_met(self):\n        """\n        测试：覆盖率要求满足\n        \n        遵循第3.1条：单元测试验收标准\n        """\n        # 检查是否覆盖了所有公共方法\n        main_workflow_path = project_root / "packages" "tools/tests/unit/backend/services/test_doubao_analyzer.py"\n            ]\n            \n            all_test_content = ""\n            for test_file in test_files:\n                file_path = covered_methods = 0\n            for method in public_methods:\n                if method in all_test_content:\n                    covered_methods += 1\n            \n            coverage_ratio = 开始方案3最终测试宪法合规性检查...")\n    print("=" * 70)\n    \n    test_instance = TestScheme3Final()\n    test_instance.setup_method()\n    \n    tests = [\n        ("主工作流分析器集成结构", test_instance.test_main_workflow_analyzer_integration_structure),\n        ("豆包分析器实现结构", test_instance.test_doubao_analyzer_implementation_structure),\n        ("Qwen分析器实现结构", test_instance.test_qwen_analyzer_implementation_structure),\n        ("外部边界模拟策略", test_instance.test_external_boundary_mocking_strategy),\n        ("精确断言策略", test_instance.test_precise_assertion_strategy),\n        ("文件组织合规性", test_instance.test_file_organization_compliance),\n        ("命名规范合规性", test_instance.test_naming_convention_compliance),\n        ("TDD原则合规性", test_instance.test_tdd_principle_compliance),\n        ("覆盖率要求满足", test_instance.test_coverage_requirements_met)\n    ]\n    \n    passed = 0\n    total = len(tests)\n    \n    for']

- **违规**: ['ify_mda\') as mock_verify_mda, \\\n                 patch.object(analyzer, \'_build_event_chain\') as mock_build_chain, \\\n                 patch.object(analyzer, \'_generate_final_report\') as mock_generate_report:\n                \n                # 设置模拟返回值\n                mock_load_data.return_value = {"test_data": "sample"}\n                mock_verify_mda.return_value = {"mda_score": 0.8}\n                mock_build_chain.return_value = {"events": ["event1", "event2"]}\n                mock_generate_report.return_value = {\n                    "stock_code": "000001",\n                    "trade_date": "2025-01-17",\n                    "analysis_result": "test_result"\n                }\n                \n                result = analyzer.analyze("000001", "2025-01-17")\n                \n                # 精确断言：检查具体返回值\n                assert result["stock_code"] == "000001"\n                assert result["trade_date"] == "2025-01-17"\n                assert result["analysis_result"] == "test_result"\n                \n                # 验证方法调用\n                mock_load_data.assert_called_once_with({"test_data": "sample"}, "000001", "2025-01-17")\n                mock_verify_mda.assert_called_once()\n                mock_build_chain.assert_called_once()\n                mock_generate_report.assert_called_once()\n\n    def test_analyze_method_error_handling(self):\n        """测试：analyze方法的错误处理"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 模拟内部方法抛出异常\n            with patch.object(analyzer, \'_load_internal_data_for_stock\', \n                             side_effect=Exception("Data loading failed")):\n                \n                with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc_info:\n                    analyzer.analyze("000001", "2025-01-17")\n                \n                # 精确断言：检查异常信息\n                assert "Data loading failed" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    def test_verify_mda_method_structure(self):\n        """测试：_verify_mda方法结构"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查方法存在且可调用\n            assert hasattr(analyzer, \'_verify_mda\')\n            assert callable(analyzer._verify_mda)\n\n    def test_build_event_chain_method_structure(self):\n        """测试：_build_event_chain方法结构"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查方法存在且可调用\n            assert hasattr(analyzer, \'_build_event_chain\')\n            assert callable(analyzer._build_event_chain)\n\n    def test_generate_final_report_method_structure(self):\n        """测试：_generate_final_report方法结构"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查方法存在且可调用\n            assert hasattr(analyzer, \'_generate_final_report\')\n            assert callable(analyzer._generate_final_report)\n\n    def test_load_internal_data_for_stock_method_structure(self):\n        """测试：_load_internal_data_for_stock方法结构"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查方法存在且可调用\n            assert hasattr(analyzer, \'_load_internal_data_for_stock\')\n            assert callable(analyzer._load_internal_data_for_stock)\n\n    def test_analyzer_config_validation(self):\n        """测试：分析器配置验证"""\n        # 测试有效配置\n        valid_config = {\n            "database": {"host": "localhost"},\n            "llm_service": {"qwen": {"api_key": "test"}}\n        }\n        \n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(valid_config)\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查配置被正确设置\n            assert analyzer.config == valid_config\n\n    def test_analyzer_with_missing_config(self):\n        """测试：分析器处理缺失配置"""\n        # 测试缺失必要配置的情况\n        incomplete_config = {\n            "database": {"host": "localhost"}\n            # 缺少 llm_service 配置\n        }\n        \n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            # 这应该会抛出异常或使用默认值\n            try:\n                analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(incomplete_config)\n                # 如果成功创建，检查默认行为\n                assert analyzer.config == incomplete_config\n            except Exception as e:\n                # 精确断言：检查异常类型\n                assert isinstance(e, (KeyError, ValueError, AttributeError))\n\n    def test_analyzer_logging_setup(self):\n        """测试：分析器日志设置"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\') as mock_logging:\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查日志设置被调用\n            mock_logging.assert_called_once_with("qwen_analyzer")\n\n    def test_analyzer_database_manager_initialization(self):\n        """测试：数据库管理器初始化"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\') as mock_db_manager, \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查数据库管理器被正确初始化\n            mock_db_manager.assert_called_once_with(self.mock_config["database"])\n\n    def test_analyzer_llm_service_initialization(self):\n        """测试：LLM服务初始化"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\') as mock_llm_service, \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 精确断言：检查LLM服务被正确初始化\n            mock_llm_service.assert_called_once_with(self.mock_config["llm_service"])\n\n\nif', 'for_stock\') as mock_load_data, \\\n                 patch.object(analyzer, \'_verify_mda\') as mock_verify_mda, \\\n                 patch.object(analyzer, \'_build_event_chain\') as mock_build_chain, \\\n                 patch.object(analyzer, \'_generate_final_report\') as mock_generate_report:\n                \n                # 设置模拟返回值\n                mock_load_data.return_value = {"test_data": "sample"}\n                mock_verify_mda.return_value = {"mda_score": 0.8}\n                mock_build_chain.return_value = {"events": ["event1", "event2"]}\n                mock_generate_report.return_value = {\n                    "stock_code": "000001",\n                    "trade_date": "2025-01-17",\n                    "analysis_result": "test_result"\n                }\n                \n                result = analyzer.analyze("000001", "2025-01-17")\n                \n                # 精确断言：检查具体返回值\n                assert result["stock_code"] == "000001"\n                assert result["trade_date"] == "2025-01-17"\n                assert result["analysis_result"] == "test_result"\n                \n                # 验证方法调用\n                mock_load_data.assert_called_once_with({"test_data": "sample"}, "000001", "2025-01-17")\n                mock_verify_mda.assert_called_once()\n                mock_build_chain.assert_called_once()\n                mock_generate_report.assert_called_once()\n\n    def test_analyze_method_error_handling(self):\n        """测试：analyze方法的错误处理"""\n        with patch(\'qwen_analyzer.DatabaseManager\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.LLMService\'), \\\n             patch(\'qwen_analyzer.setup_logging\'):\n            \n            analyzer = QwenFactAnalyzer(self.mock_config)\n            \n            # 使用字符串ID\n        assert entity.stock_code == "000001.SZ"\n        assert entity.anomaly_type == AnomalyType.PRICE.value\n        assert entity.severity == SeverityLevel.HIGH.value\n        assert entity.z_score == 2.5\n        assert entity.confidence == 0.85\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_entity_validation_success(self, session):\n        pass\n        """测试实体验证成功"""\n        valid_data = {\n            "id": "test_anomaly_002",\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "timestamp": int(datetime.now().timestamp() * 1000),\n            "anomaly_type": "volume",\n            "severity": "medium",\n            "description": "成交量异常",\n            "z_score": 1.8,\n            "current_value": 150000000,\n            "expected_value": 100000000,\n            "deviation": 50000000,\n            "confidence": 0.75,\n            "context_json": {\n                "market_state": "trading",\n                "sector_performance": 0.03,\n                "news_count": 5,\n                "volume_ratio": 2.0,\n            },\n            "metadata_json": {"source": "test"},\n        }\n\n        entity = AnomalyEventEntity(**valid_data)\n        session.add(entity)\n        session.commit()\n\n        assert entity.id == "test_anomaly_002"  # 使用字符串ID\n        assert entity.anomaly_type == "volume"\n        assert entity.severity == "medium"\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_entity_validation_failure(self):\n        pass\n        """测试实体验证失败"""\n        invalid_data = {\n            "id": "test_anomaly_003",\n            "stock_code": "000001.SZ",\n            "timestamp": int(datetime.now().timestamp() * 1000),\n            "anomaly_type": "invalid_type",  # 无效的异常类型\n            "severity": "medium",\n            "description": "测试描述",\n            "z_score": 1.8,\n            "current_value": 150000000,\n            "expected_value": 100000000,\n            "deviation": 50000000,\n            "confidence": 0.75,\n            "context_json": {\n                "market_state": "trading",\n                "sector_performance": 0.03,\n                "news_count": 5,\n                "volume_ratio": 2.0,\n            },\n            "metadata_json": {"source": "test"},\n        }\n\n        with pytest.raises(ValueError) as exc_info:\n            AnomalyEventEntity(**invalid_data)\n\n        assert "Invalid anomaly event data" in str(exc_info.value)\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_to_anomaly_event(self, session):\n        pass\n        """测试转换为Pydantic模型"""\n        entity = AnomalyEventEntity(\n            id="test_anomaly_004",\n            stock_code="000001.SZ",\n            timestamp=int(datetime.now().timestamp() * 1000),\n            anomaly_type=AnomalyType.PRICE.value,\n            severity=SeverityLevel.HIGH.value,\n            description="价格异常波动",\n            z_score=2.5,\n            current_value=12.50,\n            expected_value=10.00,\n            deviation=2.50,\n            confidence=0.85,\n            context_json={\n                "market_state": "trading",\n                "sector_performance": 0.05,\n                "news_count": 10,\n                "volume_ratio": 1.5,\n            },\n            metadata_json={"source": "test"},\n        )\n\n        session.add(entity)\n        session.commit()\n\n        anomaly_event = entity.to_anomaly_event()\n\n        assert isinstance(anomaly_event, AnomalyEvent)\n        assert anomaly_event.stock_code == "000001.SZ"\n        assert anomaly_event.anomaly_type == AnomalyType.PRICE\n        assert anomaly_event.severity == SeverityLevel.HIGH\n        assert anomaly_event.z_score == 2.5\n        assert anomaly_event.confidence == 0.85\n        assert anomaly_event.context == {\n            "market_state": "trading",\n            "sector_performance": 0.05,\n            "news_count": 10,\n            "volume_ratio": 1.5,\n        }\n        assert anomaly_event.metadata == {"source": "test"}\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_from_anomaly_event(self, session):\n        pass\n        """测试从Pydantic模型创建实体"""\n        anomaly_event = AnomalyEvent(\n            id="test_id",\n            stock_code="000001.SZ",\n            timestamp=int(datetime.now().timestamp() * 1000),\n            anomaly_type=AnomalyType.PRICE,\n            severity=SeverityLevel.HIGH,\n            description="价格异常波动",\n            z_score=2.5,\n            current_value=12.50,\n            expected_value=10.00,\n            deviation=2.50,\n            confidence=0.85,\n            context={\n                "market_state": "trading",\n                "sector_performance": 0.05,\n                "news_count": 10,\n                "volume_ratio": 1.5,\n            },\n            metadata={"source": "test"},\n        )\n\n        entity = AnomalyEventEntity.from_anomaly_event(anomaly_event)\n\n        session.add(entity)\n        session.commit()\n\n        assert entity.id == "test_id"\n        assert entity.stock_code == "000001.SZ"\n        assert entity.anomaly_type == AnomalyType.PRICE.value\n        assert entity.severity == SeverityLevel.HIGH.value\n        assert entity.z_score == 2.5\n        assert entity.confidence == 0.85\n        assert entity.context_json == {\n            "market_state": "trading",\n            "sector_performance": 0.05,\n            "news_count": 10,\n            "volume_ratio": 1.5,\n        }\n        assert entity.metadata_json == {"source": "test"}\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_round_trip_conversion(self, session):\n        pass\n        """测试往返转换"""\n        original_entity = AnomalyEventEntity(\n            id="test_anomaly_005",\n            stock_code="000001.SZ",\n            timestamp=int(datetime.now().timestamp() * 1000),\n            anomaly_type=AnomalyType.PRICE.value,\n            severity=SeverityLevel.HIGH.value,\n            description="价格异常波动",\n            z_score=2.5,\n            current_value=12.50,\n            expected_value=10.00,\n            deviation=2.50,\n            confidence=0.85,\n            context_json={\n                "market_state": "trading",\n                "sector_performance": 0.05,\n                "news_count": 10,\n                "volume_ratio": 1.5,\n            },\n            metadata_json={"source": "test"},\n        )\n\n        # 转换为Pydantic模型\n        anomaly_event = original_entity.to_anomaly_event()\n\n        # 从Pydantic模型创建新实体\n        new_entity = AnomalyEventEntity.from_anomaly_event(anomaly_event)\n\n        # 验证数据一致性\n        assert new_entity.stock_code == original_entity.stock_code\n        assert new_entity.anomaly_type == original_entity.anomaly_type\n        assert new_entity.severity == original_entity.severity\n        assert new_entity.z_score == original_entity.z_score\n        assert new_entity.confidence == original_entity.confidence\n        assert new_entity.context_json == original_entity.context_json\n        assert new_entity.metadata_json == original_entity.metadata_json\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_nullable_fields(self, session):\n        pass\n        """测试可空字段"""\n        entity = AnomalyEventEntity(\n            id="test_anomaly_004",\n            stock_code="000001.SZ",\n            timestamp=int(datetime.now().timestamp() * 1000),\n            anomaly_type=AnomalyType.PRICE.value,\n            severity=SeverityLevel.HIGH.value,\n            description="价格异常波动",\n            z_score=2.5,\n            current_value=12.50,\n            expected_value=10.00,\n            deviation=2.50,\n            confidence=0.85,\n            context_json={\n                "market_state": "trading",\n                "sector_performance": 0.05,\n                "news_count": 10,\n                "volume_ratio": 1.5,\n            },\n            metadata_json={},  # 测试可空字段,使用空字典而不是None\n        )\n\n        session.add(entity)\n        session.commit()\n\n        assert entity.metadata_json == {}\n\n        # 转换为Pydantic模型时应该使用默认值\n        anomaly_event = entity.to_anomaly_event()\n        assert anomaly_event.metadata == {}\n\n    # TODO: 简化复杂测试逻辑,拆分为多个简单测试\n    def test_confidence_constraint(self, session):\n        pass\n        """测试置信度约束"""\n        # 测试有效置信度\n        entity = AnomalyEventEntity(\n            id="test_anomaly_004",\n            stock_code="000001.SZ",\n            timestamp=int(datetime.now().timestamp() * 1000),\n            anomaly_type=AnomalyType.PRICE.value,\n            severity=SeverityLevel.HIGH.value,\n            description="价格异常波动",\n            z_score=2.5,\n            current_value=12.50,\n            expected_value=10.00,\n            deviation=2.50,\n            confidence=0.5,  # 有效置信度\n            context_json={\n                "market_state": "trading",\n                "sector_performance": 0.05,\n                "news_count": 10,\n                "volume_ratio": 1.5,\n            },\n            metadata_json={"source": "test"},\n        )\n\n        session.add(entity)\n        session.commit()\n\n        assert entity.confidence == 0.5\n\n    # complex_result\n        }\n        \n        entity = ProcessedEventEntity(**data)\n        processed_event = entity.to_processed_event()\n        \n        assert processed_event.processing_result ==    "priority": "high"\n            },\n            "timeline": {\n                "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",\n                "updated_at": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",\n                "processed_at": "2024-01-15T10:35:00Z"\n            },\n            "quality_metrics": {\n                "readability_score": 0.85,\n                "factual_accuracy": 0.92,\n                "bias_score": 0.15\n            },\n            "related_entities": [\n                {"type": "company", "name": "平安银行", "code": "000001.SZ"},\n                {"type": "person", "name": "张三", \n        assert processed_event.metadata == complex_metadata\n        assert processed_event.metadata["source"] == "financial_news"\n        assert processed_event.metadata["author"] == "分析师张三"\n ### 153. /Users/pengcheng/Documents/papa/tools/tests/unit/backend/entities/test_base_entity.py
